I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Washington=20State=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Exciting Update: Liz Harrington to Keynote the Republican Action Conference!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us May 5th and 6th in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

body:
MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7ED22NhmwSKplS7SXlWV-reKjG2SucIGgSnK21dE9G6_czQ6n8bGacD-2RJ1JgAP9AsBIPxEAK7i_PtNXn9dTfn92xdWGlmLbU_hEwHIzyl8VI8rVYgWh50qU_gWnAbnitAyqamsFWeyeLTSCcv7hom-k8Ab2te91q6moWu8U64rsAUKnApaU8ZqBpUKQJmXXuimgYZ2RNANU-XHZAf_nuc1TpUbYzG0j5yn5TXpQuCyBLfOodowzcHvjZ3Zv6G0MczobPk-YsplvyY_W1ww3Us3xog5h0DgktzANHjVqdB33GkLlPDLmuMtBo9rJNwcvnKHy7jOLhBuHN7swZyNk8V7ItwcTuJ_MqYcUibc6ForAvKWBvSEm60zn2Od336cX_D1EW5OP_X0OP2RX4u59dOGw4CLVETQ-75gd_sXAAD__9_UjPs)

Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America – but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed today was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuRHZY7DJgUO2Vi5pq2oP_XOKzHgIs8KGgtlov31FlO71955G76fxcR65_2iFfREAA4dVAAh9EgCX6uX3d3P5dXHl64-vqnSmru57Cl8EQP6Y6bP6vHKg6HncqXVFaAEbQCyoVaaRprZamWJole2ALPkO60CmV2iwR1Vjd5TB-1oW3IIELStZS6VqBQdLIFUwoWqORzjKTlTyzukQpuTH8JaXLc4HnGIxtkPO8_qYdBZwXgm3hQ53TguFvbEz_06lj7Qw-vJt4pTLfkth8bxyupU4xcg5Ewk4JxxVA8F2lvpOY-NBCn3ecrxGCrxFod3T1-xwnbYFSWiHfPVPhj7Onm9JaPd0qv4nU8qUstCuqRsrwFzTyEFot73bMER6rf4-4OMj2p1-NvNw-mO-FUsb5juPI6_Gikre9gW7278AAAD__8s6jfg)**

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.

They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: My walk with God
body:
My decision to run for President of the United States was not made lightly.

It’s been a journey.
| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztc4s4hnj0od0gosnk951a3kihegittej9bqgj8o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o74c3h2bs)
---

Friend,

My decision to run for President of the United States was not made lightly. Securing a better future for my children is what fuels my fight each and every day.

But there is something else that has guided me through life's biggest questions and challenges: _**My faith.**_

I am a proud Christian but growing up my parents taught me to respect everyone's path to God.

I'm the daughter of Indian immigrants who came to the United States legally. I was born into a Sikh family. My parents were and are very serious about their Sikh faith. We were exposed early to lots of different faiths. I converted to Christianity because the teachings of Christ spoke to me in a way that I could understand and that would help me live my life.

**Having the choice to define what my faith looks like is the very _essence of the American Dream._ [Will YOU help me restore our country's faith in the American Dream?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmhec0apq2qkjoj7j6esoitia7crs54h80qg30tg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o74c3h2bs "Will YOU help me restore our country’s faith in the American Dream?")**

Whatever your faith looks like to you, Friend, know that we are blessed to live in a country where we have the freedom to choose. I was reminded of that every day growing up and made it a point to remind my children that freedom isn't free.

Let's get one thing straight - my personal relationship with God has nothing to do with earning your vote. I fiercely believe it's not what you say, it's what you do. What I plan to do is fight.

**[I pledge to stand for and protect your freedoms everyday as your next President of the United States. Can I count on you to join me in this fight today?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z35s1363fv89rbtfl41ek7nqkkgkjijjglidefqg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o74c3h2bs "I pledge to stand for and protect your freedoms everyday as your next President of the United States. Can I count on you to join me in this fight today?")**

---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6edu1q4sukoallonvf7vciqks9vd3lmrv3q7kvg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o74c3h2bs)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: We’re all paying for it
body:
The Dems’ spending spree

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654123%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I7zZQasoWpkHRmhbVCXGvQ&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Thanks to the Democrats’ out-of-control spending, our economy is suffering. From soaring gas prices to record-high inflation over the past two years--_families are paying more and getting less._

Gas prices have _**risen**_ under Joe Biden, but instead of unleashing American energy, he's cracked down on it.

Guess who has paid the price at the pump? _Hardworking Americans like YOU._
_**[Help put an END to Democrats’ harmful policies! Chip in $25 now to win back the White House so we can rebuild our economy →](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654124%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V0xIRERUQntbM6uzg45Ozg&sysid=1 "Help put an END to
Democrats’ harmful policies! Chip in $25 now to win back the White House so we can
rebuild our economy →")**_
Out-of-touch Democrats can’t fathom the impact rising prices have on families like yours. But as parents to two children, my husband and I have faced these hardships.

Democrats’ war on American energy is hurting everyday families and we have to hold them accountable. _**[Show Democrats you are FED UP with Joe Biden’s failed leadership and help elect a new generation to lead us into the future!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654135%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eTYRT%2fjpedD%2bKq9QONLo1g&sysid=1 "Show Democrats you are FED
UP with Joe Biden’s failed leadership and help elect a new generation to lead us
into the future!")**_

_**[Americans have a choice and I’m asking you to choose me. Will you support me in my fight for the future of our nation?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654136%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DWs3CVsRgjBCX%2fDvUFQ0%2bA&sysid=1 "Americans have a choice
and I’m asking you to choose me. Will you support me in my fight for the future of
our nation?")**_

I’m ready to fight for YOU but I need your help, friend.

Thank you in advance for your support. |
My very best,

---

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Trump Indictment (Urgent Update)
body:
I have major news to share with you...

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdlm2gu9n1nt1gpurcrilr4gqad356uocu9rr9q8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o74c5h2bs)
---
Fellow patriot, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney Alvin Bragg's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**WE WILL _EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. **_ **Thank you for your support >> **[**secure.winred.com/AFL **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkui8ulvopm6t4s213pg1m9rpacjrh4bispvmsfg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o74c5h2bs) [**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US TO EXPOSE THE LEFT_ >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0tnmk7jmoph1h88fkobi2bg9hd2kqe8d84jv2g0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o74c5h2bs) America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left's weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. _With sincere thanks for your crucial support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

Trump. For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... Think about this: the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, is undeniable and truly dangerous. Make no mistake: America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. WE WILL EXPOSE THE TRUTH behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. Thank you for your support >> America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left's weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. name: ICYMI News
subject: His insights reveal the truth
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zef5hpvgcepfnp8mc8mh1hcaaph0pmag4uuubbao_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o71c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a video we’d like to share with you today. It’s the trailer for our free online course,**[“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu563mpsptqntbu0n42rr9r6d2pvj582hbg9tml0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o71c1h2bs)** **You can watch your video and register for the course below:** **_[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/c-s-lewis-on-christianity](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk9oh75kamns2rq4pvigq2lp1up392j7oql5sf38_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o71c1h2bs)**_
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9hsnl97bnoi9kb2hsg1ir9kjcecv20rg5om7aro_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o71c1h2bs)
---
| | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That’s why we have produced this course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

But how do you explore the depths of Lewis’s writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we’re thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward—one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis—as the instructor for this course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s_ The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! **After watching the trailer, I hope you’ll want to join us and learn from C.S. Lewis by[registering for this free online course](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0jq4reggemq6aa642rf8e60j9qqk85r6h0qnl9g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdge1o71c1h2bs). You can easily do so on the same page as the video****.** This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of the Christian faith. That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis—enjoy your sneak peek! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04086%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=15cvOQE5JoOUw2nKd9L4SA&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04086%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=15cvOQE5JoOUw2nKd9L4SA&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04087%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IttTLS5tHW%2fvXDpJvGP3fA&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04088%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sk28WpToD%2fh1%2bmtT9oxubw&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04089%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JAM%2bkTzCc7rQcA0vbgFPWA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04080%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TYDsQJrd8IOEKY5rIzVVNw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04081%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UR%2fZfNs0B3%2bMJdjelJ1cyg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04082%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tqp0jkZKMhss7IAKqJGgQw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04083%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b4qNHyukbpuxK0%2fjqQqCmg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04084%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cnLn6QD6FzTjyhcEtib1KQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04095%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NTOZadsX4XaRHJnbIjHvow&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04096%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6kIujpHDZ9lB7YUn2vFodg&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04097%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YtqhSNU6JasOtYMnqzebNw&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04098%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9qMMY3Z4ARs4IOyFFTxPVw&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04099%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hj7GOIZZWCSfbKZqQCtTKw&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Your America News

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Trump Indictment (Urgent Update)
body:
I have major news to share with you...

| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0ape6bp94hursg6kuhldik8n59fn06kbs291l80_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdie4ob0cjh2bs)

Fellow patriot, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney Alvin Bragg's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**WE WILL _EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. **_ **Thank you for your support >> **[**secure.winred.com/AFL **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zan5i8nqas8phkjjk6g3c25a1ii6f0jmffr4hjig_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdie4ob0cjh2bs) [**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US TO EXPOSE THE LEFT_ >>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z02cg5g3ffpm0p6sdpiee5k81nqcm4cqv8kso6eg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdie4ob0cjh2bs) America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left's weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. _With sincere thanks for your crucial support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

# Celebrating Passover
# A Time of Reflection and Renewal
---
| | |
---|---
|
Dear Peter,

As Passover approaches, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on the significance of this holiday for the Jewish people and extend my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones.

Passover, or Pesach in Hebrew, is one of the most important holidays in the Jewish faith, and it holds deep meaning for Jews around the world.
Passover is a time of remembrance, as the Jewish people retell the story of the Exodus from Egypt and recall the struggles and triumphs of their ancestors. It is a time of renewal and rebirth, as they celebrate the coming of spring and the promise of new beginnings. And it is a time of community and togetherness, as they all gather with family and friends to share traditional meals and reflect on the blessings in their lives.
At the heart of the Passover story is the idea of freedom - the freedom to live their lives as they choose and to pursue dreams and aspirations. For the Jewish people, this idea of freedom is particularly poignant, as they remember their ancestors who were enslaved in Egypt and who fought for their right to be free. Passover is a time to honor their courage and determination, and to celebrate the freedoms that the Jewish people enjoy today as a result of those past sacrifices.
As you celebrate Passover this year, I hope that it will be a time of joy, reflection, and renewal for you and your loved ones. May the traditions and rituals of this holiday bring you comfort and strength, and may the blessings of freedom, peace, and happiness be with you always.
Wishing you a very happy Passover!
|

clean_body: A Time of Reflection and Renewal | | | | == | | == | == | | | Celebrating Passover A Time of Reflection and Renewal | | | ---|--- | Dear Peter, As Passover approaches, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on the significance of this holiday for the Jewish people and extend my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones. Passover, or Pesach in Hebrew, is one of the most important holidays in the Jewish faith, and it holds deep meaning for Jews around the world. Passover is a time of remembrance, as the Jewish people retell the story of the Exodus from Egypt and recall the struggles and triumphs of their ancestors. It is a time of renewal and rebirth, as they celebrate the coming of spring and the promise of new beginnings. And it is a time of community and togetherness, as they all gather with family and friends to share traditional meals and reflect on the blessings in their lives. At the heart of the Passover story is the idea of freedom - the freedom to live their lives as they choose and to pursue dreams and aspirations. For the Jewish people, this idea of freedom is particularly poignant, as they remember their ancestors who were enslaved in Egypt and who fought for their right to be free. Passover is a time to honor their courage and determination, and to celebrate the freedoms that the Jewish people enjoy today as a result of those past sacrifices. As you celebrate Passover this year, I hope that it will be a time of joy, reflection, and renewal for you and your loved ones. May the traditions and rituals of this holiday bring you comfort and strength, and may the blessings of freedom, peace, and happiness be with you always. Wishing you a very happy Passover! | | | | == | == 248 Route 25A, Suite 5 East Setauket, NY 11733 (631) 762-3410 | mailto:TeamFig@anthonyfigliola.com | == == == == | | | | | | | Friends of Anthony Figliola | 248 Route 25A, Suite 5, East Setauket, NY 11733 | | Sent by mailto:teamfig@anthonyfigliola.com in collaboration with

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: NEW Explosive Revelations on Biden Corruption
body:
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522070:6Uj8NFGNV:m:1:3365131770:15BCC1ED449E36C45AEF8C33163B25E3:r)
---
Fellow Patriot, I have breaking news to share with you... My team at America First Legal just released our second batch of **Biden Documents** that the federal government attempted to keep hidden until we forced their release with our aggressive litigation and investigatory tactics. [**_Support us now to help expose Biden corruption_ >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522070:6Uj8NFGNV:m:1:3365131770:15BCC1ED449E36C45AEF8C33163B25E3:r) This **second trove of shocking documents** confirms there was effectively no daylight between Joe Biden and Hunter Biden regarding the Biden family's business dealings in Ukraine. But there is more. **These never-before-seen records and emails contain more explosive revelations** , _including:_ **#1 -** Then Vice President Biden personally signed off on the statement given in response to reporters about whether Hunter's appointment to **Burisma** undermines the Vice President's credibility in pushing anti-corruption measures in the Ukraine; **#2 -** The Office of the Vice President connected reporters writing about Hunter's appointment to**Burisma** to Amos Hochstein, a trusted Biden advisor who was then the "point person" for International Energy Affairs at the U.S. Department of State, to provide a "unique and valuable perspective" on the relationships in Ukraine; **#3 -** The Office of the Vice President coordinated closely with Hunter Biden's notorious firm **Rosemont Seneca Advisors** (the firm has been prominently involved in Hunter Biden's various international business dealings, which Joe Biden has claimed to know nothing about) in response to press inquiries; **#4 -** U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine, Marie L. Yovanovitch, reported _- to the Department of State's Victoria Nuland, Anna Makanju in Vice President Biden's Office, and the National Security Counsel's Eric Ciaramella-_**that "this time there are accusations that Burisma allegedly had a subsidiary dump natural gas as a way to pay bribes" and "mentions that Hunter Biden and former Polish President Kwasniewski are on the Burisma board."** Taken together with the Oversight Committee's revelations about the Biden Family finances, **it is now _indisputable_ that there is a need for a full criminal investigation** into the Bidens' foreign influence peddling and exotic foreign financial payoffs. We now have the evidence in plain sight. _This can be ignored no longer!_
| [**HELP EXPOSE BIDEN >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522070:6Uj8NFGNV:m:1:3365131770:15BCC1ED449E36C45AEF8C33163B25E3:r)
---
This is yet another example of how our hard work at America First Legal is paying off and getting results for _YOU_ , the American People. [**Please make a generous and urgently needed donation now to help my team continue the fight and expose Biden 's corruption in a court of law. ****_Please help us continue the investigation right now >> _****_ _**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522070:6Uj8NFGNV:m:1:3365131770:15BCC1ED449E36C45AEF8C33163B25E3:r) _With deep gratitude for your continuously brave support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|
---
Note: This hard evidence which shows the intertwinement of Hunter Biden's foreign dealings with then Vice President Joe Biden, _including proof that people inside Biden's Vice Presidential Office knew about and were worried about Biden's Burisma_ _dealings_ would not have been discovered without our lawsuits.**
| [**DONATE HERE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522070:6Uj8NFGNV:m:1:3365131770:15BCC1ED449E36C45AEF8C33163B25E3:r)

| TOMORROW NIGHT IN BON AIR, VIRGINIA
---
|
Greetings!
Senator Amanda Chase will be hosting a Meet & Greet in Bon Air tomorrow evening at the Fairfield Inn on North Pinetta Road. RSVP today to attend this Thursday's Meet & Greet in support of Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate.
If you'd like to financially support or help Senator Chase by pitching in to help pay for the event, you can serve as an event sponsor or purchase a ticket to the VIP Reception.
If you haven't had a chance to meet Senator Chase or funds are tight right now, attend the FREE event from 6:30-7:30pm that is open to the public. RSVP to Chris at chris@chaseforva.com or 804-912-6007.
Reserve your seat today while there are still seats available. Space is limited so please be sure to RSVP TODAY.

RSVP today to attend this Thursday's Meet & Greet in support of Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. name: 2024 Republican Platform Survey
subject: Your input is needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)

[2024 REPUBLICAN PLATFORM SURVEY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)
_[An Official Project of the National Republican Senatorial Committee](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)_

Peter,

Do you have a quick moment?

Republican leaders and our top Senators are convening a MAJOR meeting to set our platform for 2024, _and they need your assistance. _

_**Your opinions, concerns, and interests need to be heard by Republican Party leaders as we formulate our 2024 campaign platform.**_

That's why you have been selected to participate in this historic, touchstone grassroots survey, the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)

2024 is the best chance our Party has to secure a Senate Majority for the next 10 YEARS - an entire decade. That's why we **must accurately grasp what issues and opinions our grassroots supporters care about the most.**

Your response is crucial because it represents your city, and our Nationwide survey cannot be complete without YOUR response.

**[Please submit YOUR RESPONSE to the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to ensure your answers are recorded and set our Platform for 2024.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)

Make no mistake, the **2024 election** will be one of the most consequential political battles of our lifetime, so it's ESSENTIAL we get this right - we only have ONE shot.

Our team wants to present your response FIRST, so you must submit your form before 4/3/2023. Thank you in advance for your support!

**[Take the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey to represent your city and set the Official Republican Platform for 2024!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)**

Thank you,

NRSC Team

******************************************************[TAKE THE OFFICIAL FLASH POLL>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522174:6qPOsFGNo:m:1:3331421248:8FC74CB9EB1218B6FED5C9051DD44A5C:r)******************************************************

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=552436de740d4520bac5cb5a2c119b5d&_e=xovhDGq0vv82n3mrOA7ADgNJdtRlupzn66nLLz9WeBWxPMWUEJuCvFMBNHXeDXvfw3Edd65bsPXoPQJOUhcKAkfIbn9q1ZXuu0y59T5royyiLpjPgylPsQBbXqM44x6YhEhDkQ47m5uvQQpn1-AwFiIJKWzMfspzsO7XBok7wBYGMZW2RqnIGTlakcJ5fyiDWy93-tNcX96LdkZcq_pfer2n-Ln5DUiSiMuYTFhUOUtFuxybes-knw9WY62-xcWosUqah9M6qxIKo3FUkzARQA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=552436de740d4520bac5cb5a2c119b5d&_e=xovhDGq0vv82n3mrOA7ADgNJdtRlupzn66nLLz9WeBWxPMWUEJuCvFMBNHXeDXvfw3Edd65bsPXoPQJOUhcKAkfIbn9q1ZXuu0y59T5royyiLpjPgylPsQBbXqM44x6YL7LfGrgaA-3DFzhjwPwM1jEiAZf-oQPbzeofWqFy0oTC7h_z1K1910o_HpsJPFlp9I9A3UIRoon8AB6VZtEgXm3Z_UDwtSerYt8ZNbS6JCSOEg6S9zkd29QY_WFHrbvfUIXzYvoaI7HLzv0RMxMAUQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=552436de740d4520bac5cb5a2c119b5d&_e=xovhDGq0vv82n3mrOA7ADgNJdtRlupzn66nLLz9WeBWxPMWUEJuCvFMBNHXeDXvfw3Edd65bsPXoPQJOUhcKAkfIbn9q1ZXuu0y59T5royyiLpjPgylPsQBbXqM44x6Y-G9P7L5D_Vr86fCKpCCaYovkHQ-MUmsmkWdE3DuXrb6mx4qg0ZLT60w0ceBZiJamm0W2G6euE2TmYkUX5og1u_qRosJjuLn67uhlFR5XUD0olCPyeu9lcTgYx1T192SDJq62x-5yJnxXV5fNY3WbFA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=552436de740d4520bac5cb5a2c119b5d&_e=xovhDGq0vv82n3mrOA7ADgNJdtRlupzn66nLLz9WeBWxPMWUEJuCvFMBNHXeDXvfw3Edd65bsPXoPQJOUhcKAkfIbn9q1ZXuu0y59T5royyiLpjPgylPsQBbXqM44x6YRkCjaSUGMEJGjFkl3PtlQZIVDAgIsFQjieQJVIUFcu6gIKQymsxJpg8hn8LgubeLHLMqG_dvrdV2oqvQGe2ReSH1eINZ3qFTOywR2rj_6H-4x6-Uir1N19pmSFH45M3__-aID5GYqjIzdKmHukcwyA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: bad news from The Washington Post
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I'll get right to it, team: The Washington Post just named my seat in Nevada one of the most endangered seats heading into 2024.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
I'm vulnerable, and I'm counting on your early grassroots support to help me fight back against the GOP. That's why I'm asking you directly: So please, will you split $20 or more right now between my campaign and Serve America to keep Nevada and the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He has done it before, and he nearly succeeded. That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now – today.
Because it's not just your $20. It's your $20 combined with $20 from your neighbor, your friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat blue.
Senate control could all come down to what happens in Nevada – so please, team, we need all hands on deck: Will you split $20 or more now between my campaign and Serve America – every dollar makes a crucial difference in these early days of the election cycle – to fuel our reelection campaign to victory and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
I can't tell you how grateful I am for your support. Thank you.
– Jacky

subject: Re: The witch hunt against Trump

body:
I cannot believe that this is actually happening.

| |
---
| | | I cannot believe that this is actually happening. After years of threats, the Democrats are actually bringing _criminal_ _charges_ against President Trump.

Not only is this political persecution, it's an assault on American Democracy.

The media is doing its best to convince the American people that these charges are justified and supported by all.

**That is __not__ the case. House Republicans will not let this stand - that's why I've personally directed Congress to investigate this blatant abuse of power by a leftist DA.**

Fellow patriot, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney Alvin Bragg's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**WE WILL _EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. name: Caitlin O'Dea
subject: ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER SLAMS ATLANTA, MANHATTAN DISTRICT ATTORNEYS IN NEW OP-ED
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t1YU9ocKf18FhbLQJdEWIjiSXXT-YZvKxlDrYUQmnRof9Kd86UdJo63-guMSnXjgyivY4e_hLQ5BSQPCHyiB6bx7er8wbdqhHg==&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, APRIL 5 ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER SLAMS ATLANTA, MANHATTAN DISTRICT ATTORNEYS IN NEW OP-ED ATLANTA - In case you missed it, former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler published a [new op-ed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx61KwTCUOg789lyMCfS28qusV1uvl3fJjAZ9zR78pMbJNRo-gEdW-Jxkq-vVZZJd2dOqFfoUwIWtfWBVaI_5U3astG5RG-ZPhjmpITNjrlV54mR0HVhOHhvc4aZU5rdjIw-nENZfG0Oghs9KLakZEjziJPqW_wSGzKW1bgFFcvvHYbiTKfHWWqlwYVCkvf1MjLaH4iNGPq3-iy4_XRwr1WSbyuCoj4tMDpbC-OYSh3q57U=&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==) in the Washington Examiner slamming partisan DAs in cities like Atlanta and Manhattan who are pursuing political vendettas instead of criminal prosecutions in cities where violent crime is rampant. Read the full op-ed [here,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx61KwTCUOg789lyMCfS28qusV1uvl3fJjAZ9zR78pMbJNRo-gEdW-Jxkq-vVZZJd2dOqFfoUwIWtfWBVaI_5U3astG5RG-ZPhjmpITNjrlV54mR0HVhOHhvc4aZU5rdjIw-nENZfG0Oghs9KLakZEjziJPqW_wSGzKW1bgFFcvvHYbiTKfHWWqlwYVCkvf1MjLaH4iNGPq3-iy4_XRwr1WSbyuCoj4tMDpbC-OYSh3q57U=&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==) or see excerpts below:
Leftist district attorneys pursue political vendettas, not criminals
The Manhattan grand jury indictment of former President Donald Trump says far more about the state of America's justice system than it does about a former U.S. president.
For months, media outlets in Georgia and New York have published breathless coverage on the two cities' grand jury investigations into Trump with predictable leaks, courthouse stakeouts, glowing coverage of prosecutors, and panicky op-eds on "threats to democracy."
Meanwhile, in the real world, Americans are working to pay massively inflated prices, tutoring their children to help them catch up after school lockdowns set them back academically, and taking daily precautions against rising crime.
Atlanta, for example, finished 2022 with its [highest number](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t_a1adOB2x62DgStLhIdQLEGCrjdx2FqGOGuqMXiB6wj6tqus64rTqGDJU4P1xktq4aZZytYgzD7KPAIksSfSq1_g3l47yh89HvwMjWelitv9cbAaIlL7D6s5lAKBObHP7_qhzfUYEYepemuQst25guyVWK00_5mpqUkKdKHWAVfKbDKMVY_c7Yna71vWYblPutbwoW--uKGv8dM1CxWJv7KCEwNeMj1KuUGtRq7YpKL&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==) of homicides in more than two decades. The city ranked [No. 1 in per-capita murders](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t_a1adOB2x62qz3ntRdI8mlLUhIsWR9NK9vQCd9p14J2UChFnPrTAaq4qMB1hYPeYvULy1TwVG6BHd0tr1desKj1M54QggrzHOAX2ESpSoEXtYsAq_bF-fjpBcZOYzJUJB7_wtL0X6tsaHYfAz3P-gIqIDb0S2nAuDTKIF27zNFmCN3zxxhBMw_4aS9GzpkfG6Y3lDX0XJ7s&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==), and the police department is [understaffed by about 450 officers](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t_a1adOB2x62fhlAsz2v-NKRiphZMF2W2mNQieDSCFFncsv0OYt-fg3QIwsbz2phA6eMOfBy8a9wLK-BMD8ICvfYd1Hje1DVd_XKqHJQ4RRWNmK2kn24CSKX0jl72d0En63PJ7xc5iTnuVdTf2V4sD5GGdaHQRnUEwfe1znqnwCdjdbi96npprYpYf5YRzzwdKWDgVg47e9CU1W3sn0avX1JYsmJgNGq-IWpp-3cyP-WXLj1SaRe1JPWw1hnRM1la8MpHnhRmyQKAvGnzRbRPXZT2TuFkG6SRCYn1hEHf_5oL-_-lbMVc7izLcJ7GM7_wnQeYE85655iXEuLJCt2ksMCfrY6u4Sht1oBjn8cqCB2rgIy5pKVTAl67sCTy1zFyhtoNd450X0b8Xpiyd_YHcYFTA3iJwaaQYZLPjvDOSdoi2fTczGEHlP8gzxJgfxNiF408bZBbDB5Lq3FunVFwjrFV6lUjCDIh7nS6pD-Y43zPKDZyGvOswcqNj5CoKHVlzIomkiITWmrN42UAbHNhs8=&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==) -- roughly a quarter of the force. Likewise, crime in New York City was [up ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx61j3ZvjdufvonvCbnnIPRAnKoMlhEPXfvcRLvACEqw0_Tl34FbXIZ4SEoK-7UjIQIxWcqoeF5LjQGQdue4DmTwKBP4O_CGptV3gdk_6ZZ6gqA4-wiyCVMpuwrGBhlv7VG1uQq2FBokkItVzPUVQyquVtJxgPsadH7ZUH5o8f9F6DHznf0ruI5bXA==&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==)[22% last year](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx61j3ZvjdufvonvCbnnIPRAnKoMlhEPXfvcRLvACEqw0_Tl34FbXIZ4SEoK-7UjIQIxWcqoeF5LjQGQdue4DmTwKBP4O_CGptV3gdk_6ZZ6gqA4-wiyCVMpuwrGBhlv7VG1uQq2FBokkItVzPUVQyquVtJxgPsadH7ZUH5o8f9F6DHznf0ruI5bXA==&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==), including a 40% increase in transit-related crimes such as the terrifying trend of subway attacks.
...
With case backlogs in the thousands, victims and their families slip through the cracks. Justice delayed is justice denied, and too often, it's denied intentionally. Instead of enforcing the law, the new prosecutorial order means limited resources are funneled into a few headline-grabbing cases, such as Bragg's case against Trump. Meanwhile, criminals are back on the street, undeterred or absolved by soft-on-crime policies, burdening understaffed police departments.
Bragg and Atlanta District Attorney Fani Willis have been racing one another to secure an indictment against Trump instead of racing to reduce their case backlogs. In Atlanta, Willis faces a 10,000-plus case backlog estimated to take [18 months to prosecute](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx617qThUIqfZsnsm1Fe4XwsdVYtICUvHTHu1lvSF2W91kqk3m-hcYxYdBzZEb2yScA_JB2w25MEx2VfCd6HuyNh3Ln6ypqM-06rCGqJJguUqmdfGt1r61BeQiUqQmG4nDGP28fA-Fz_sQs8KnFqRQCMW0htGniDbvTnuIaS6YVlar1IegwCxvpo2IA-3adodWV_3EydXub8mG7liHNJA61pxw==&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==). In Manhattan, Bragg has [downgraded more than half](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx61c5Yy9x9GW5HH-Xsp-PUQ612JnJnRL1-GrVBBE6DGqE4anbodCNSTiURz2MxQuKwY5oME38-EbD6WJqIB_qoIe27pRFqnmsaqNgLUhY9O_tYSlOED6e_F8HcMcXLrcB8N1SrL2X301sESWesa4X3yQTgfXmYOv8_VxdCAr8IhCw1g3VkgACFUAyF5wvtBxFYucumaq15v5fJPUL4MOOW_eA==&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==) of all felony charges in his office but [infamously charged](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx61dzlDJLNMWHi-Go9Ij9o-rgaFaL0AVZm1lHXY3VIwex__qAnrep2JmOk85v1kEyVUUGriax3oV8NqkcF1uAM2swxBHPOUbD-NigrbvDbM7T7ZrjXbw97LDK0xaJgTDui5U8UPAMY67aM48WfzDks3NBVRYngatklv&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==) NYC store clerk Jose Alba with murder when he acted in self-defense during an armed robbery.
...
Lawmakers in Georgia responded [l](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx61vebddwuAMDCdlZpCu8Lgho3XaCGUfmrH_1Wx957HgE8YnbKLwTwFmtE4afp_7T7RO-Nf9Rmn3PeOQorYpA18QTlXRZEKj0rQlTr-qygJjttNaxjBVXIotSP4Y4-gzFNGkNQOYhOfgPvSr9ZsPYyZkg0SrlHpWI3xVoeQsf0ZaVzgQbAXigvKm1EB66lvBERvX2hHHQ--xsg=&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==)[ast week](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8MROFUvR7PGrWyuXWYSYOCE7LSHjcU4ng05Dix8I404Vhs5YmF8t0aG-mBYpx61vebddwuAMDCdlZpCu8Lgho3XaCGUfmrH_1Wx957HgE8YnbKLwTwFmtE4afp_7T7RO-Nf9Rmn3PeOQorYpA18QTlXRZEKj0rQlTr-qygJjttNaxjBVXIotSP4Y4-gzFNGkNQOYhOfgPvSr9ZsPYyZkg0SrlHpWI3xVoeQsf0ZaVzgQbAXigvKm1EB66lvBERvX2hHHQ--xsg=&c=JZbUqYKDQxSFkywXZWDoAjsm3x85CK9-p7r71c6F0xKI5lUfW3wXJA==&ch=vuweGasvWH2GfdZmDDp6NbsGXP4NSO-f2_JmHEj5N6bDNOwhgRGVmg==) by passing legislation to create an oversight committee to discipline and remove district attorneys who routinely flout the law. And although voters will also have an opportunity to stand up for public safety in the 2024 election cycle -- as they did recently by ousting Mayor Lori Lightfoot in Chicago -- for many, rampant crime has already caused irreversible harm.
The hard leftward turn against justice in local court systems should trouble every law-abiding citizen. But what should trouble us even more is the Left's embrace of outright political persecution. Our social fabric is fraying at the hands of criminal enterprises that are empowered by partisan prosecutors who would rather pursue political vendettas than violent criminals.
Unchecked crime is weakening the foundation of civil society. And the growing weaponization of American justice, which has been hijacked to take down political opponents, is no longer confined to Washington. So, the next time you see headlines from liberal media about "threats to democracy," remember the real threat: partisan district attorneys who sacrifice your family's safety to score political points.
### Media Contact: Caitlin O'Dea press@kellyloeffler.com

name: Drag Queens vs. The Marine Corps
subject: Military Readiness is threatened by Pronouns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
Everywhere I look, Biden is protecting his friends in China no matter how hard they try to undermine and threaten our nation.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522191:6DwjkFGFN:m:1:3331421248:2A1D82E3CE673C594562C3F2AB049258:r "Putin & Xi") Peter: Instead of worrying about an investment in "climate, environmental justice and conservation," I want Joe Biden and the rest of Washington investing in America's future. And there won't be a be a future if we allow China, Iran and Russia to threaten our military readiness and national security. The more our military fails to meet recruitment goals, the more our adversaries will know that our military won't deter them any longer because diversity training and CRT never scared a highly trained soldier with a rifle in his hands. More to the point, the war over pronouns won't stop the cyber attacks and potential nuclear attacks we face from foreign adversaries. **[Will you help me wake up Washington and keep our country safe? Donate and let's make our nation the world's leading superpower once again!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522191:6DwjkFGFN:m:1:3331421248:2A1D82E3CE673C594562C3F2AB049258:r "Will you help me wake up Washington and keep our country safe?
Donate and let’s make our nation the world’s leading superpower once again!")** Everywhere I look, Biden is protecting his friends in China no matter how hard they try to undermine and threaten our nation. From trade, to TikTok, to their threats to our manufacturing and investments in technology, to their military prowess. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522191:6DwjkFGFN:m:1:3331421248:2A1D82E3CE673C594562C3F2AB049258:r "Tweet")**How many warnings do you need?** Now China's President is meeting with Vladimir Putin and helping him perpetuate his threats to Ukraine, our country and anyone who opposes his tyranny. When I entered the Marine Corps for my 40+ year career, we emphasized marksmanship and survival over political correctness and that caused everyone to remain in awe of our Armed Forces. **[Join the Bergman Brigade and let's force Biden to remove DEI and pronoun training from our ranks! Donate TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522191:6DwjkFGFN:m:1:3331421248:2A1D82E3CE673C594562C3F2AB049258:r "Join the Bergman Brigade and let’s force Biden to remove
DEI and pronoun training from our ranks! Donate TODAY!")** Biden is the same man who allowed a Chinese spy balloon to fly over our country undeterred and requested your taxpayer dollars be used to fund gender transitions in our military. His Administration has refused to stop spies from running around Capitol Hill who were posing as reporters. He's back peddled on the nuclear deal with Iran and reversed President Trump's action that hold them accountable. And no matter how he claims to be handling Putin, the war in the Ukraine is well into its second year. We cannot allow our military to be a second-class military power because someone thinks acceptance of drag queens and diversity training will somehow strengthen military recruitment and military readiness. **[Help me show Biden what protecting of our nation should looks like!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522191:6DwjkFGFN:m:1:3331421248:2A1D82E3CE673C594562C3F2AB049258:r "Help me show Biden what protecting of our nation should looks
like!")** Our enemies don't prioritize pronouns over military readiness, and neither should the United States. We must Save America first if we want to save our children and our planet. **[If you agree, then join me!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522191:6DwjkFGFN:m:1:3331421248:2A1D82E3CE673C594562C3F2AB049258:r "If you agree, then join me!")** For our safety,
Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.) | | [JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62522191:6DwjkFGFN:m:1:3331421248:2A1D82E3CE673C594562C3F2AB049258:r "JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION")
---

| **Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
---

name: Tom Nelson
subject: Fourth Time is Another Time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nelson**
body:
We won! Thank you for all of your support.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61315467/399771800/-1531703117?refcode=footer_button&amount=25&refcode2=d64b8ead-c6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjRiOGVhZC1jNmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1loP2ZOVL1ZaM4Jg0kLZLjuJwLDd9k2Bclohy_VMSis=)
---
| | **Thank you for helping us score a decisive victory and an unprecedented fourth term as Outagamie County Executive.**
Many supported my recent run for the U.S. Senate and some have been pulling for us since my first State Assembly campaign in 2004. New or old, silver or gold, you are a true treasure and I am truly humbled by your constant support, encouragement and kind words.
It wasn't easy coming off a loss and in four months putting a campaign together, raising $250,000, personally knocking 4,000 doors, organizing dozens of volunteers to knock almost 9,000 doors (Thank you, Democratic Party of Outagamie County!), making hundreds of texts (You rock, Our Wisconsin Revolution!), and sticking up yard signs.
From Bernie Sanders to the Wisconsin Realtors Association, we collected endorsements that built a real coalition and solid campaign. And that was the secret sauce; **you allowed us to forge a truly big tent campaign that paved the way for a 12 point victory in a red county. **
Maria and the kids are grateful for your support as well. Every knock, every call, every text got us closer to victory and gave dad an extra minute or two to take a pause and spend some time with the family.
From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Until next time, godspeed.
Yours, Tom Nelson
---
|
* * *

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Re: The witch hunt against Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I cannot believe that this is actually happening.

| |
---
| | | I cannot believe that this is actually happening. After years of threats, the Democrats are actually bringing _criminal_ _charges_ against President Trump.

Not only is this political persecution, it's an assault on American Democracy.

The media is doing its best to convince the American people that these charges are justified and supported by all.

**That is __not__ the case. House Republicans will not let this stand - that's why I've personally directed Congress to investigate this blatant abuse of power by a leftist DA.**

If you're with us, I urge you to add your name in the next hour to stand with House Republicans' efforts to defend President Trump:

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: [Your Input Needed] Weak and vulnerable mama bears won't survive these brutal hunting laws. Act now.
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | Our bear populations may NEVER recover | |
---
| | | **Should trophy hunters be allowed to SLAUGHTER mama bears and cubs in their dens? **
---
[ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1707299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | | [YES](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1707299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| [NO](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1707299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_** This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share with anyone else. Deadline for responses: 11:59 p.m._
---
Right now, mama bears are emerging from their winter dens to find food for their fragile cubs. But instead of foraging in the safety of a protected habitat, these bears face a deadly threat. **Because of Trump-era policies and a powerful pro-hunting lobby, it’s completely legal for hunters to MURDER mama bears and cubs in their dens!**
Weakened and under-fed from winter, vulnerable mama bears are at extreme risk from these brutal hunting laws – and their cubs’ chances of surviving this senseless violence are worryingly low. **Our bear populations may NEVER recover from decades of ruthless hunting and trapping.**
But it gets even worse. Because the trophy hunting lobby and their anti-environment allies are working to remove **Endangered Species Act** protections for these threatened creatures. This landmark law **BLOCKS greedy corporations in the logging, factory farming and fossil fuel industry from destroying essential habitats** for bears and other endangered species – and it’s under constant attack for the sake of profits!
Without stronger wildlife protections, heartless trophy hunters will MURDER struggling mama bears without consequence – and could wipe out the next generation of cubs. Meanwhile, corporate interests will be free to swoop in and wreak havoc on their vital habitats, **worsening the pollution crisis that threatens our lands, water and climate. We can’t let that happen, but we need an immediate outcry from the public to fight back, and that's why we're asking YOU to speak up now!**
**We need 19 more people from your area to take our urgent poll before the 11:59 p.m. deadline tonight – and we’re counting on you to be one of them. Please, tell us now:**
| | **Should trophy hunters be allowed to SLAUGHTER mama bears and cubs in their dens?** ** **
---
| | | [YES](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1707299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| [NO](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1707299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_** This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share with anyone else. Deadline for responses: 11:59 p.m._
---

---

_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

name: Team IDCCA
subject: We couldn’t have done it without you, fellow Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
We are beyond grateful to have you on Team IDCCA.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/r7-3xWdPIgQ4X9sQ94MmzWi8lzEI92V7nCUKe0_ncOQ=/Ss4xKLURLU-NJuEGpzXc3lrtq7PJzcYCPLc-D_L6uKU=?refcode=EM_C_230405Thanks_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrats,

YOU DID IT! We knew we could count on this grassroots team to protect our state from the extremist agenda. Yesterday, over 70% of Democrats running against fringe extremist school board candidates WON!

Despite the best attempts of Illinois' fringe far-right extremist groups, we have continued to move our state forward -- and protect our public schools, our children, and our local government from these extremists' hateful agenda.

We cannot thank you enough for the time and effort you put into the success of progressive candidates across Illinois.

It is thanks to you that our team was successful in stopping extremists from sneaking their way into office. And with you on our side, we will be ready together heading into the 2024 election cycle.

Thank you again for your continuous support, and we are grateful to have you with us.

In appreciation,

Team IDCCA

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Platforming Marjorie Taylor Greene’s advocacy of domestic terrorism shakes the very foundation of democracy. We need to fight back every year, all year round.
body:
MTG’s threat to democracy
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3288a73-20d6-4430-a2b6-aa684499b159/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_In one of the most despicable acts by a mainstream media organization, 60 Minutes had on raving lunatic, anti-Semite, anti-Muslim bigot, etc., Marjorie Taylor Greene, one of only two Republicans to show up at Trump’s New York arraignment to defend him._** _Greene called the Parkland school shooting fake, 9/11 an inside job, said Jewish lasers started California forest fires and visited the Jan 6th terrorists, whom she called political prisoners (you may recall she asked Trump for a pardon for her activities Jan 6th)._ I could go on, but why bother, you know what kind of pond scum we're dealing with here. **_This platforming of domestic terrorism shakes the very foundation of democracy._** **_Meanwhile, The Center for American Progress (CAP) fights to strengthen our democratic foundation, holding elected representatives accountable and, as they share in their mission statement, "cutting through the noise to get the facts out." With 60 Minutes broadcasting Greene's idiot-ideas & weapons-grade propaganda to a network audience, we need CAP to "get the facts out" more than ever._** [**_To ensure people get the truth and not "Taylor-made" propaganda attacking our democracy, will you please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Center for American Progress' Action Fund?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0555e97f-e20b-451e-bc8e-22ff0915bda5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to keep this mind pollution out of our public space._ Cliff
---
|

| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbca711f2-24de-4121-a095-6c8caf874833/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Greene called the Parkland school shooting fake, 9/11 an inside job, said Jewish lasers started California forest fires and visited the Jan 6th terrorists, whom she called political prisoners (you may recall she asked Trump for a pardon for her activities Jan 6th). I could go on, but why bother, you know what kind of pond scum we're dealing with here. This platforming of domestic terrorism shakes the very foundation of democracy. Meanwhile, The Center for American Progress (CAP) fights to strengthen our democratic foundation, holding elected representatives accountable and, as they share in their mission statement, "cutting through the noise to get the facts out." With 60 Minutes broadcasting Greene's idiot-ideas & weapons-grade propaganda to a network audience, we need CAP to "get the facts out" more than ever. Thank you for fighting to keep this mind pollution out of our public space. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18924?t=1001&akid=3122%2E346206%2E5bLQyt ][IMG]
Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my
family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States
Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party
switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a
record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that
can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there.
And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.

So I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18924?t=1002&akid=3122%2E346206%2E5bLQyt ]Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can
afford between Charles Booker and my campaign? The amount isn’t as
important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping
in. So please.

CHIP IN →

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230405-3122-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3122_346206_5bLQyt&akid=3122%2E346206%2E5bLQyt

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3122%2E346206%2E5bLQyt

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
I have major news to share with you...

| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z64en7oqfrtsk2a6l2icdep2r8qqp5uj9a3qa610_rp22sh2s8i66o70cti62o32c5h2bs)

Fellow patriot, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney Alvin Bragg's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**WE WILL _EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. **_ **Thank you for your support >> **[**secure.winred.com/AFL **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaifphcn5vmroehn9hdp83dqupn5s2ong5bvbe0g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cti62o32c5h2bs) [**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US TO EXPOSE THE LEFT_ >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq3qhea8ls9eut794bti1493p0ctlho5bk4gn3u8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cti62o32c5h2bs) America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left's weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. _With sincere thanks for your crucial support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

subject: 1) the result of a two-tiered justice system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
I will not stand by and pretend this is how our justice system is supposed to work.

| |
---
| | **BREAKING NEWS ALERT**
---
| | **PRESIDENT TRUMP WAS JUST ARRESTED IN A TWO-TIERED JUSTICE SYSTEM** _[_**SEND A MESSAGE TO DA BRAGG >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8sgpg3qigvmrf67tn4u5g6as6le3kud0f05ctsg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cti6cp34cdh2bs)_
---
| | Friend, Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg’s decision to arrest President Trump proves one thing: his actions are politically-motivated, NOT based on the facts of the case... This ordeal is evidence we have a _two-tiered justice system_ : one standard for the Left and one for the Right. [_**_I AGREE >>_**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh9rn5job2b7i44tuid8445tr4q76gd9lv5ktgq0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cti6cp34cdh2bs) _→ That’s not how our Constitution was constructed._ _→ That’s not how our justice system was designed._ _→ And that’s not how the government should be conducting business, especially when taxpayers are footing the bill._ I will not stand by and pretend this is how our justice system is supposed to work. You know why? **Because this is an egregious abuse of power. ** _[**Chip in now to stand with Rand and send message to Alvin Bragg — the out-of-control, overreaching Manhattan DA — who seeks to shred our Constitution over a political opponent he dislikes.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztrefdsv4632k17mjc772vn4ofoqsmeo2vdvn4vg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cti6cp34cdh2bs)_
