subject: Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt Trump indictment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

|
---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/updated-tucker-email/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20230405_WG-GAU.102400_t1327324-1756&ex_tid=20230405_WG-GAU.102400_t1327324-1756&utm_content=tv-gau-20230405&xunv=tv-gau-20230405 "Sign the petition
demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/updated-tucker-email/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20230405_WG-GAU.102400_t1327324-1756&ex_tid=20230405_WG-GAU.102400_t1327324-1756&utm_content=tv-gau-20230405&xunv=tv-gau-20230405 "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's
freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

| | We’ll keep this short, Peter, because Donald Trump’s indictment won’t stop the rise of his MAGA extremism in the Republican party.

We still need to work as hard as possible to keep Georgia blue in 2024.

We still need to work to flip control of the state legislature.

_**And we still need to work to defeat radical MAGA Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene._**

Trump’s indictment means that he’ll be on TV _constantly_ to spread his lies and divisive rhetoric. [**_That means we need to push back by talking directly with voters: at the doors, online, and through radio, digital, and TV ads. Will you pitch in to help us combat Trump’s lies?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61298347/399724706/-1313339816?refcode=20230405.1_GADems_4I&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWYxMTllMC1iMmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BpO3O9Gu-wmWbP_q3z6Rc2pwuySKR7yjZwXjeUGqvpE=)_

Thank you,

GA Dems

clean_body: | | | We’ll keep this short, Peter, because Donald Trump’s indictment won’t stop the rise of his MAGA extremism in the Republican party. We still need to work as hard as possible to keep Georgia blue in 2024. We still need to work to flip control of the state legislature. And we still need to work to defeat radical MAGA Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene. Trump’s indictment means that he’ll be on TV constantly to spread his lies and divisive rhetoric. =_ Thank you, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Get ‘em young, then the damage is done [WATCH IT HERE]
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524441:6gfKrFGNq:m:1:3371812801:A6DC379802E3DEEC471373DC5885513C:r)
---
**_" It's well known that 80%, even up to 85% of children who experience gender dysphoria and cross sex identification feel differently when they reach puberty after the early phases of puberty."_**
---
-Dr. Riittakerttu Kaltiala, Chief Psychiatrist, Tampere University Hospital and one of Finland's leading experts on pediatric gender care
---
|
---
I've filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family, manipulating her into taking medication and having surgery to become a "boy." In fact, my client and I joined Laura Ingraham the other night on her great Fox News show _Ingraham Angle_ to discuss the lawsuit and the dangerous lies that woke doctors are telling patients and their parents to push their radical ideology. [**Please take a moment right now to watch video from this primetime interview and learn what we 're up against in this monumental battle - then consider making a tax-deductible gift to help fund this critical lawsuit.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524441:6gfKrFGNq:m:1:3371812801:A6DC379802E3DEEC471373DC5885513C:r) Chloe Cole was just 9 years old when she was bombarded with transgender ideology. As a child Chloe was bombarded--largely through social media--with the idea that "transitioning" would make her special, accepted and popular. When she shared with her pediatrician that she felt uncomfortable as a girl, leftist activist doctors put her on an irreversible path to chemically and surgically "transitioning" her gender. At age 13, the doctors began pumping Chloe full of dangerous drugs with unknown long-term side effects. At 15, they performed a double mastectomy on her. And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents. They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son. That's right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.) EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country. That's why we're not just suing Kaiser Permanente... **We 're suing Dr. Lisa Taylor** for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe's other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. **We 're suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le** for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. **And we 're suing Dr. Susanna Watson** who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe's mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe's mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria. _If folks like you and I don 't stand up and fight back now, who will? _ [**Chloe deserves justice, and children deserve protection - so can we count on your tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524441:6gfKrFGNq:m:1:3371812801:A6DC379802E3DEEC471373DC5885513C:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us. I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately, legal battles aren't free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly. **But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win - but as a nonprofit organization, that's only possible with your help.** In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children. I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you'll be with us every step of the way. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524441:6gfKrFGNq:m:1:3371812801:A6DC379802E3DEEC471373DC5885513C:r) Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won't turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child - if she's even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be "normal." But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: **_There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries ... and we're coming for you!_** My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, "you can either have a dead daughter or a live son." And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry "Big Pharma" and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole's case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice - and attack on American children - in its tracks.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524441:6gfKrFGNq:m:1:3371812801:A6DC379802E3DEEC471373DC5885513C:r)
---
P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to "just another part of her gender journey." Because they'd already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. [**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today, and give our lawyers the resources they need to win this crucial fight.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524441:6gfKrFGNq:m:1:3371812801:A6DC379802E3DEEC471373DC5885513C:r)
---
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524441:6gfKrFGNq:m:1:3371812801:A6DC379802E3DEEC471373DC5885513C:r)
---

---

---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America – but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed today was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.

body:
We've made historic progress over the last two years, but the DNC is relying on you to pitch in today to keep it up. | |
---

We passed legislation to transform America’s rail, ports, and airports and to tackle the climate crisis. We’ve given folks breathing room by lowering everyday health and energy costs. clean_body: We've made historic progress over the last two years, but the DNC is relying on you to pitch in today to keep it up. | | Folks -- We’ve made historic progress in the last two years. We’ve created 12 million new jobs -- more than any president has created in four years. We passed legislation to transform America’s rail, ports, and airports and to tackle the climate crisis. We’ve given folks breathing room by lowering everyday health and energy costs. I mean this, and the past two years have been proof of it: There is nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together.Nothing. There is still so much opportunity to continue making progress for the American people. If we’re going to finish the job, it’s essential that the DNC hit its fundraising goals. This team and your support have helped make real progress for the American people. But we can’t lose sight of what we’re up against this year and next. I’ve said it before, but let me say it again: This is not your father’s Republican Party. They are a different breed of cat. And they are threatening to undo every bit of progress we’ve made over the last two years. Your $7 donation right now will make all the difference in races up and down the ballot across the country. Thank you, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD: We're still fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
The Left is watching how we are responding in the days following the announcement of this indictment. |
---

Fellow American, I was on Sean Hannity last night and discussed why we must support President Trump and future Republican Senate candidates NOW.

I've heard from thousands of you over the past couple of days showing your support and I thank you. But as I said last night - [**Team Graham needs to step up now and show President Trump we have his back and we're ready for him in 2024.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61672757:ssgVBhDNT:m:1:877327319:9F3DC023E3C74DC032A86D4E5D82A676:r)

Making sure that President Trump is re-elected and that he has a Republican Senate, in addition to a Republican House, is the only way we can end this banana republic created by Joe Biden and the Democrats.

As one of Team Graham's biggest champions - [**will you show your support to President Trump with a split contribution to Team Graham and Trump Save America of just $5?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61672757:ssgVBhDNT:m:1:877327319:9F3DC023E3C74DC032A86D4E5D82A676:r)

Thank you,

Lindsey Graham
* * *

**From:** Lindsey Graham
**Date:** Tuesday, April 4, 2023
**To:** Fellow American
**Subject:** fwd: We're still fighting

Fellow American,

Now that President Donald Trump has been arraigned, I keep thinking how shocking it is that this weaponization of the rule of law is _actually_ taking place in the United States.

Democrats have been threatened by President Trump's political power for years, but now they've stooped to a new low. This is their attempt to silence him, knock him down, and eliminate him from contention before the 2024 campaign jumps into high gear. They know Joe Biden stands no chance in a rematch, and they don't want to risk Republicans taking control of the House, the Senate, **and** the White House.

I'm going to be on with Sean Hannity again tonight to discuss what happened today in Manhattan and why it is critical that we support President Trump now.

Since Thursday night, I've heard from thousands of members of Team Graham who support President Trump and his fight against this rogue Democrat District Attorney. **I want Team Graham to step up today so we can show President Trump we have his back.**

[**Fellow American, you are one of Team Graham's biggest champions. Will you show your support to President Trump with a split contribution to Team Graham and Trump Save America of just $5 before I go live with Hannity?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61672757:ssgVBhDNT:m:1:877327319:9F3DC023E3C74DC032A86D4E5D82A676:r)

The Left is watching how we are responding in the days following the announcement of this indictment. They think this will divide us and defeat us, but I'm seeing firsthand that this has just reinvigorated our fight. [**So please, Fellow American, show your support of President Trump right now before I go live.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61672757:ssgVBhDNT:m:1:877327319:9F3DC023E3C74DC032A86D4E5D82A676:r)

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61672757:ssgVBhDNT:m:1:877327319:9F3DC023E3C74DC032A86D4E5D82A676:r)
Lindsey Graham

| [**DONATE TODAY -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61672757:ssgVBhDNT:m:1:877327319:9F3DC023E3C74DC032A86D4E5D82A676:r)

subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.
| | | [ ](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGOozoQRb_G7ECm7Nh4wSIdK4oUvSfNbGZ2kbGLpHqwQWAa5e9HROnZnntVukfl4jRQ_2yZ_mAADwoLA2DiyACu8uP3_-r662rLP7w7llYd5LancGIA-Tnhv-r7SoXR0bBTbYvQqk7WOhTY1qrhmkOtVfFoudK1R8mD12AM6L7vVaMFCiF9x40oqAUOgkt-qIWEg6yAcyON6RwqYzoTmOSU-rEKY3JD-MzzGqfKj7EY2kfO0_LadGZwXtCvM1YbpRnD3tiZ-8LSRZzJu_JzpJTLfk1hdrRQupd-jJFyRmRwTn6oGwi609h3wjcOOBPnNcdbxEBrZMK-hdUOl3GdPTJhPd3cm3kXJ0f3xIT9lvpOxpQxZSZsczCagbqlgQITdjupy3a5_ITrC75eIqw0-ut0fP73o5jbMG00DLQozSS_7wt2t78BAAD__6ZsjGs)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America – but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kb2O2zAQhJ-G6iRQyz-xUOE7wo2RA1IESWdQ5Nrei0gJEnWG3z6Q4Uv77WAwH9aneaTLo2fmjQHcKK4MgIkDAzjJtz8f-vT75Oq_fDjUTit536_wzgDKY8b_0VdLg8nTuFPjqtjrQbYmVti3uuOGQ2t0detRm84qbwYFKsROxhhM18noARUAqop64CC45KoVEpRsgHMrrR08amsHG5nklC9TE6fsx_hZli3NTZhSNfa3Uub1uenI4Lhi2BZs7pQXjHtiZ_4La59woeDrz4lyqS9bjounlfK1DlNKVAoig2MOY9tBNIPByyBC54EzcdxKOieMtCUm3EtY73CdtiUgEy7Q2b9Y8Gn2dM1MuG-p78uUC-bChOuUNQz0OY8U90r3sap4336tT_h8iXDSmq_3w-PHz2rp43yncaRVGyb5dV-wu_0LAAD__0pljXs)**

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying – and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

clean_body: I have never been more determined than I am right now. | | | Friend, I never thought this could happen in America – but it has. The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying – and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom. Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country. Thank you, | Donald J. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I'm officially running for reelection.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | I wanted to personally share the big news: **Today I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!**

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC today to become a Founding Donor to my campaign and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&akid=10352%2E9716520%2EajF5HR) But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:**

1. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back _as early as possible_ to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. **That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors within the first 24 hours of our campaign launch – and I’m counting on you to be one of them:**

**[So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&akid=10352%2E9716520%2EajF5HR)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Jacky Rosen and the DSCC.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&akid=10352%2E9716520%2EajF5HR)

| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=8&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&akid=10352%2E9716520%2EajF5HR)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&akid=10352%2E9716520%2EajF5HR)

Thank you so much. Your support today is absolutely crucial. I’m grateful.

– Jacky Rosen

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&akid=10352%2E9716520%2EajF5HR)

Jacky Rosen is running for reelection in Nevada to fight for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Americans.

_**[Chip in now to help Jacky keep Nevada's seat blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230405-JackyRosen-RosenReelectionFoundingDonor-ETG-sl1&akid=10352%2E9716520%2EajF5HR)**_

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: Ohio Republicans are trying to rewrite the rules.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Once calling special elections "unnecessary," Frank LaRose is now all-in for a $20 million dollar, taxpayer-funded special election that would change citizen-led ballot initiatives in Ohio.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312397/399759410/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2E2N2E0Zi1iZmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTBehEyFMDwtyxhkFbEViejl4xhRjL8qgUfhsH5IXys=) | This is unbelievable, team.

Once calling special elections _"unnecessary,"_ Secretary of State Frank LaRose is now all-in for a **$20 million dollar, taxpayer-funded** special election that would change citizen-led ballot initiatives in Ohio.

Republicans are doing everything they can to take away our ability to amend our state constitution. And if they get their way, this change could impede our efforts to put a reproductive freedom initiative on the ballot.

LaRose's latest cave to extremists in the statehouse is yet another example of his willingness to do or say anything to further his own political ambitions — even if it means making it harder for Ohioans to make their voices heard at the polls.

Here's the bottom line, team: The will of the people needs to be heard, and Ohio Democrats are fighting back against these anti-voter attacks. **[Will you join Ohio Democrats in demanding LaRose keep Once calling special elections "unnecessary," Secretary of State Frank LaRose is now all-in for a $20 million dollar, taxpayer-funded special election that would change citizen-led ballot initiatives in Ohio. I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: **Today I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!**
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[split $5 between my campaign and Sherrod Brown's today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312327/399759144/-584253567?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk104-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDc2ZWQwOS1iZmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHv3CpIJZySc3YSo2GG9_nr4ZlkU41H7Bw7n9rkpZF4=)** **But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:**
1\. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.
With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. **That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors within the first 24 hours of our campaign launch – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend:**

Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: We’ve accomplished so much already, but I’m running for re-election to Congress because our work isn’t done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I hope you’ll join me in the fight.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312663/399760688/-1844931500?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_gs_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiOGVhYmEtYmZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MY1aJZRWRAOz20bfmMoFxAaMOtbgjBksC2s98fZ8KEk=) Team –

Accomplishment means hitting milestones and then going further. That’s why I fought for record infrastructure investment, funding to crack down on drugs coming across our border, and a plan to protect our water supply. And after decades of trying, we secured Medicare’s ability to negotiate lower prescription drug prices.

**We’ve accomplished so much already, but I’m running for re-election to Congress because our work isn’t done.[I hope you’ll join me in the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312665/399760692/-1844931500?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_gs_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiOGVhYmEtYmZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MY1aJZRWRAOz20bfmMoFxAaMOtbgjBksC2s98fZ8KEk=)**

In the desert, water has always been scarce. And in the face of the worst drought in centuries, we have more work to do so the Colorado river doesn’t dry up. **If we want to protect Arizona’s future, we don’t have a minute or a drop to waste.**

Abortion is about choice, self-determination, and liberty – a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions is fundamental. The Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe has already inflicted immediate and devastating effects on women’s health and safety. **In Congress, I’ll continue the fight to protect women’s access to abortion.**

I know first-hand that our democracy is in crisis – I was on the House floor, readying to defend Arizona’s election results, when insurrectionists broke into the Capitol attempting to overturn the will of the voters. **Defending our democracy is my highest priority.**

I’m running to continue to represent the people of Arizona because too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines. **Kelly Cooper, the MAGA extremist who came close to beating me in November, has already announced he’s running again.**

Cooper made opposing abortion rights a core issue of his candidacy. He refused to acknowledge the results of the 2020 election and has called for the immediate release of insurrectionists. He’s simply too extreme for Arizona.

[**I’m counting on this grassroots team to set our campaign up for success. Your support is crucial to stopping Cooper and ensuring that I can keep fighting for you in Congress. Even $10, $25, or $50 would make a big difference, so team, will you step up and chip in?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312668/399760694/-1844931500?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_gs_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiOGVhYmEtYmZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MY1aJZRWRAOz20bfmMoFxAaMOtbgjBksC2s98fZ8KEk=)

Your support means the world to me, and it’s critical to our success.

Thank you,

– Greg | To learn more about Greg Stanton's work, visit [**StantonForArizona.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312672/399760697/857584668?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiOGVhYmEtYmZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MY1aJZRWRAOz20bfmMoFxAaMOtbgjBksC2s98fZ8KEk=&emci=1369debe-37d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ab8eaba-bfd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7714718) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312676/399760701/1318673875?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiOGVhYmEtYmZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MY1aJZRWRAOz20bfmMoFxAaMOtbgjBksC2s98fZ8KEk=&emci=1369debe-37d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ab8eaba-bfd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7714718) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312681/399760705/1105092824?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiOGVhYmEtYmZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MY1aJZRWRAOz20bfmMoFxAaMOtbgjBksC2s98fZ8KEk=&emci=1369debe-37d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ab8eaba-bfd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7714718) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61312684/399760710/-1518155066?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiOGVhYmEtYmZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MY1aJZRWRAOz20bfmMoFxAaMOtbgjBksC2s98fZ8KEk=&emci=1369debe-37d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ab8eaba-bfd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7714718)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Peter,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA - for 1,500% impact.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-IXMmg)**
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-9GBKtggkDHZQ-KZ8Q)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $24 >>](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
---

---

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we've witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Congress: Prevent future toxic train derailments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
The health and safety of Americans in communities like East Palestine and Raymond must be a priority over rail industry profits.
#
Friend,
Since February’s toxic train derailment, citizens of East Palestine and CDC investigators tasked with studying the derailment’s health impacts have [gotten sick](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11322?t=8&akid=2675%2E946728%2Ehq_ibB) from the hazardous chemicals in the environment. Meanwhile, [another train carrying toxic materials derailed in Raymond, Minnesota last week](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11323?t=9&akid=2675%2E946728%2Ehq_ibB), causing a fire and forcing an evacuation.
The health and safety of Americans in communities like East Palestine and Raymond must be a priority over rail industry profits. [**Will you write a letter to your lawmakers urging them to pass legislation that would prevent future derailments?**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11324?t=10&akid=2675%2E946728%2Ehq_ibB)
Derailments like this highlight the need to improve rail safety regulations to protect Americans and hold the rail industry accountable. That’s why Representative Chris Deluzio and I have introduced the DERAIL Act, legislation that would broaden the definition of a “high-hazard flammable train” to enforce higher safety standards on our nation’s railways. Meanwhile, a bipartisan group in the Senate has just announced the Railway Safety Act, which would, mandate minimum two-person train crews on all major trains. President Joe Biden strongly supports the legislation, saying it “provides us with tools to hold companies accountable to prevent terrible tragedies like the Norfolk Southern derailment in East Palestine.”
Congress has a responsibility to protect Americans who have felt abandoned and invisible in the wake of this harm and hold these companies accountable by strengthening our nation’s rail safety standards. The passage of both of these bills is essential to better protect communities from derailments.
[**Tell Congress: Pass legislation to prevent toxic train derailment.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11324?t=11&akid=2675%2E946728%2Ehq_ibB)
In solidarity,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230405-2675-footer&t=12&refcode2=2675_946728_hq_ibB&akid=2675%2E946728%2Ehq_ibB)**
---
[](https://facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto: info@rokhanna.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Ro for Congress, PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.rokhanna.com/signup/update-your-information/?t=13&akid=2675%2E946728%2Ehq_ibB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=2675%2E946728%2Ehq_ibB)

name: Team Evergreen
subject: A new agricultural revolution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The IRA helps farmers lead the way
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz) | The Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) was a massive climate win...but now that it's law, how is it actually changing our country and building our clean energy future? No matter where you live, the IRA is already providing real, tangible benefits to you and your community. **We fought hard for this. Now, let's meet the Inflation Reduction Act..._in real life._**
---
Friend, as climate-related extreme weather events threaten rural communities, the IRA is helping farmers fight back, cut energy costs, and reduce pollution. Check out this critical impact of the IRA and more in the latest edition of **IRA _irl._**
* * *
**_The IRA is helping farmers lead an agricultural clean energy revolution_**
America's farmers are on the front lines of the climate crisis. Shifting seasons and extreme weather events like heat waves, droughts, and flooding are impacting farmers' bottom lines. But thanks to the IRA, farmers now have a huge opportunity to cut costs and pollution by deploying clean energy.
The IRA [_provided billions of dollars of new funding_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4441?t=3&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz) for the Rural Energy for America Program (REAP); [_raised the ceiling_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4442?t=4&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz) for funding new clean energy projects; lowered the barrier for installing new clean energy projects like cost-saving solar panels; and made the benefits of clean energy more accessible for farmers, ranchers, and small business owners.
The IRA also invests further in critical [_USDA programs_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4443?t=5&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz) that assist and protect U.S. farms and farmers, while providing investments that ensure the [_conservation of vital American farming lands_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4444?t=6&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz).
We're already seeing the IRA make an impact in farming communities—from the [_Northeast_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4445?t=7&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz) to [_middle_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4389?t=8&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz) America, and we know it's just getting started.
* * *
**__Quick Hits:_ The Inflation Reduction Act is providing..._**
* [_A big boost to green manufacturing in the U.S._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4446?t=9&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz)
* [_A massive clean energy hiring boom in places like Nevada_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4447?t=10&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz)
* [_Important energy storage deployments_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4448?t=11&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz)
* [_North America’s first commercial lithium-ion battery recycling hub_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4449?t=12&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz)
* [_$6 billion in funding to speed up decarbonization in heavy industries like steel, aluminum, and cement that contribute nearly 25% of U.S. greenhouse gas pollution_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4450?t=13&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz)

We're thrilled to be a part of this clean energy revolution and to have you along with us.
Warmly,
Team Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=13307%2E53494%2ECYRrSz). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

subject: RE: “136 YEARS IN PRISON, maximum sentence”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Our country is dying, but we will save it!
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuYHMGP_hwKFbK6qUtqdK2_YSGXsgs8WGgmmUb18RZff6e0-j99O4uEw03DumXxjAlcLGAJj4xADOzcvP7-r8erZl_3W8l1bJ5nak8JkB5PuCH9XnlQqjo-mg2hahA2_A-wK7WhmuuTatLK5dC7Vp2wFQ-F7p2kgnhsFrgWhcI3ldUAccBG-4rGVtal6ZAQbkXPbGeKU5sobfKFVhTm4Kb3nd41L5ORZTd8152R6TTgxOG_p9xepGacVwNA7m_mHpIq7kXfk2U8rlsKewOtoojaWfY6ScERmckp-GNggNfS9829Y9MnHac7xEDLRHJuxTVx1wm_fVIxPW08U9mXdxcTQmJuy70nsyp4wpM2GN4pyBuqSJAhNW_krfXhepf2wP-HiIsL__jvaLaf6EYu3CcqNpok1p1vDxWHCo_Q8AAP__6LmNLA)
---
Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved – to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country – because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you – I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_

clean_body: Our country is dying, but we will save it! | | | Friend, I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved – to hear that I could face 136 YEARS IN PRISON for having committed NO CRIME. But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself. I felt sorry for our country – because this is NOT America. Let me assure you – I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It’s about the survival of our Free Republic. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Burt Jones for Georgia
subject: Lieutenant Governor Jones Session Highlights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Friend,
Last week, we adjourned Sine Die, capping a busy but productive 40-day legislative session. We were able to accomplish so much for Georgia families during this short time, from workforce development, tax rebates, pay increases for law enforcement and teachers, increased public safety, and so much more. I wanted to take a minute to share some of our priorities that passed this year.

Create a Stable Workforce Cut burdensome regulations so that Georgia's businesses can hire more employees and grow our economy
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 3](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1AvqHVvQ_LLZtVjWw6lSqQUfHZ3yXu-2TBylPbCu9Qn5cPI06Jg5Rrx7wtex-1vZsfEgE-hM2BSayD_-WOkJwS2xm7s8KU9hf6INMSjvOq5lNIE=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) "Reducing Barriers to State Employment Act of 2023"
* Senate Bill 3 instructs state agencies to examine qualifications for state government jobs to not require a college degree unless truly necessary.
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 86](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1AvqwYUnYbXfqcSxVefN6T8xEhYOfmAfTfj1J-x_ovMm78CsXkvZA9Nx4IBXtj_OqhSIkQh99-dbvFA_sqCklWWl0EXZh1mZ4lRoVFemMCThpAg=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) \- Expands Access to HOPE Career Grant
* Senate Bill 86 would allow eligible students participating in the Dual Enrollment program to access HOPE Grant funds for certain Career Technical and Agricultural Education (CTAE) courses if they've reached maximum credit hour caps or not.

Strengthen Public Safety
* Limit the pretrial release of any suspected gang members and impose tougher jail time to ensure these criminals are not allowed back onto the streets
* Support increased funding and higher salaries for public safety personnel
* Tighten Georgia's gang law to require mandatory minimums and consecutive sentencing for any gang related activity

* Legislation: [Senate Bill 44](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1AvqkVZ7oBGhORSv5UcxPhPE6nnVXgbRUHcy18hQwbmlKm-pCfNFmrUheERny6mT-KCpvw8oMUHq4UgYtTm7-LlkiRCDTigTZrMRee5HAnP-r7c=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) "The Street Gang Terrorism and Prevention Act"
* Senate Bill 44 addresses gang violence by creating a new offense for recruiting minors to gangs and establishes a mandatory minimum sentencing scheme for all gang offenses.
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 68](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1Avqvr8BHPub71ZGYP1Zbf2F5geQJkL--yce296-YphYxlAxzHcDRX92n2ZKyGyrzXE3khHOPiCfOUy08g5iJK-JhckxLnMY8_yuUKaKFHfZl7E=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) \- Dogfighting/RICO
* Under Senate Bill 68, the commission of more than one dogfighting offense (or a conspiracy to do so) would constitute "a pattern of racketeering activity" that would subject the participants to liability under the RICO statute and allow them to be punished as an organized criminal enterprise.
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 92 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1Avq08iMmeuxOZ100wgGR15BYyZUME_qHwWv46bu5A8jrOewaUtaR-wg_7t8ov2GdE60MmZk4Cw8l1CrhK4tWnfw2jSI0_ywYN95PC-52aRaOM4=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) Prosecuting Attorneys Qualifications Commission
* Senate Bill 92 creates an oversight commission for Georgia's district attorneys. The eight member panel could remove district attorneys and solicitor generals for a variety of issues, including refusal to prosecute certain crimes.

Put Children and Families First
* Give a bigger platform to critically important issues and develop policies that benefit children and families across our state
* Support increased funding for students, teachers, and other critical educational improvements
* Support increased funding for additional counselors throughout the state of Georgia
* Make Georgia the most affordable place to adopt

Creation of the Senate Children and Families Committee
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 131](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1Avqv0xQIatVR-jdvjfcMvSBIeek7IsR-5eYD9isKQir7jrb8ojNQ3Nkk2cbhFqhaXF23vfw-7NWr0xaaDqj8K39rXhyrf_rtHkC0QV0MWlcfSw=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) \- Aligns notice requirements for permanent guardianship
* Senate Bill 131 aligns notice requirements for permanent guardianship with termination of parental rights (TPR) proceedings. Additionally, SB 131 addresses the termination of parent rights when a surviving parent is being criminally indicted for the offense of murder or voluntary manslaughter of the other parent.
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 133](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1Avqbg2D3CrHyIF-SuVIzMHl2g2_6LRw2LEUlv-fMI2eX96w5zZUrWvlzdE4VQKze7UaRoEn8tkeD9Hd5oyu7srst5635FFBJ7Ve25G-MLk8DcM=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) - Child in Need of Services (CHIN) hearings
* Senate Bill 133 establishes a uniform process for the Division of Family and Children Services (DFCS) to address custody of children for delinquency disposition orders and Child in Need of Services (CHIN) hearings.
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 134](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1Avq3UMWe-MqsGz2fGk5JzlVGVV03xH9ncXIJU6RnYb7JELzB8e5DFqGFXrGsMnswNxvbNax1pxmeTlkvdw4CLfW50YcDrzTXjEjIRSRGgvOTJs=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) \- Addresses parental rights
* Senate Bill 134 helps streamline proceedings addressing parental rights by expediting the use of medical narratives and makes it easier for children to testify in proceedings
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 135](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1AvqT4Kuo6jDgOpftNvva7IgjsOFDuIHX4WCDbXG4aT04P0FEUZUnprwOvmeCrmaqNq_TwSgo6A0Y2wcm1WgXvw8Qrt257zBz_Z6LN5TLiJxsXs=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) \- Addresses genetic testing
* Senate Bill 135 which establishes standards for admissibility and authenticity of genetic testing
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 216](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1AvqsmEoClJ0VImF8nkx5xcASFX2_8BYQdU4aDA0o5KUtqvZ9kuFvPz9bl0e8a5ylS-XU18TgYc0mTaQnmxJzQXeL10VzZo3yehdReS571pvtDY=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) \- Respite care for foster parents
* Allows for up to 72 hours of respite care for foster parents. 'Respite care' means occasional or short-term relief for a caregiver by a person or entity.

Secure Elections
* Legislation: [Senate Bill 222](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrj_796WkK2xRMJKZLp1WaUgLNaJuqj7bs2fAttuMXjGWC86quOlcpAWMgNJ1AvqnMze_MPMjvIrzm2Zkgh1BPTnE8GvxMaUQoDvQXGhw8aOr1__tdnkftwB3R-5n-Ioa3c-8yUQ1cbeHePCjyakM9IOylHyrsfpPVD0dRxCB8g=&c=Uxh8DzETStz1YOJKMp7cKM-5_XhZiFF4KFdTUOzqQjJ2Ab7AdvJuGg==&ch=d4KC8DiQ1HNyIt_bLLfzHEVc0L6dwZL0L3l-jgB8XzZ0b0Yd2z6taQ==) - Zuckerberg Election Reform
* Ensures that all costs and expenses relating to election administration are paid for with lawfully appropriate public funds and would prohibit certain local governments and individuals from soliciting or accepting donations or other things of value to support election administration.

2023 Priority Study Committees
* Senate Resolution 85: The Senate Occupational Licensing Study Committee sponsored by Senator Larry Walker (R - Perry) addresses Georgia's current occupational licensing laws and requirements.
* Senate Resolution 275: Senator John Albers (R - Roswell) sponsored the Senate Study Committee on Expanding Georgia's Workforce, which will examine current practices, pilot programs, private-public partnerships, and initiatives by industries across Georgia to increase workforce opportunities.
* Senate Resolution 279: The Senate Study Committee on Certificate of Need (CON) Reform sponsored by Senator Greg Dolezal (R - Cumming) will address CON reform policies that will preserve the ability of hospitals to continue to provide open access to all patients in a community.
* Senate Resolution 282: Senator Kay Kirkpatrick (R - Marietta) sponsored the Senate Study Committee on Foster Care and Adoption, which will review current guidelines and processes related to foster care and adoption.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Last week, we adjourned Sine Die, capping a busy but productive 40-day legislative session. We were able to accomplish so much for Georgia families during this short time, from workforce development, tax rebates, pay increases for law enforcement and teachers, increased public safety, and so much more. I wanted to take a minute to share some of our priorities that passed this year. Create a Stable Workforce Cut burdensome regulations so that Georgia's businesses can hire more employees and grow our economy Legislation: == "Reducing Barriers to State Employment Act of 2023" Senate Bill 3 instructs state agencies to examine qualifications for state government jobs to not require a college degree unless truly necessary. Legislation: == \- Expands Access to HOPE Career Grant Senate Bill 86 would allow eligible students participating in the Dual Enrollment program to access HOPE Grant funds for certain Career Technical and Agricultural Education (CTAE) courses if they've reached maximum credit hour caps or not. Strengthen Public Safety Limit the pretrial release of any suspected gang members and impose tougher jail time to ensure these criminals are not allowed back onto the streets Support increased funding and higher salaries for public safety personnel Tighten Georgia's gang law to require mandatory minimums and consecutive sentencing for any gang related activity Legislation: == "The Street Gang Terrorism and Prevention Act" Senate Bill 44 addresses gang violence by creating a new offense for recruiting minors to gangs and establishes a mandatory minimum sentencing scheme for all gang offenses. Legislation: == \- Dogfighting/RICO Under Senate Bill 68, the commission of more than one dogfighting offense (or a conspiracy to do so) would constitute "a pattern of racketeering activity" that would subject the participants to liability under the RICO statute and allow them to be punished as an organized criminal enterprise. Legislation: == Prosecuting Attorneys Qualifications Commission Senate Bill 92 creates an oversight commission for Georgia's district attorneys. The eight member panel could remove district attorneys and solicitor generals for a variety of issues, including refusal to prosecute certain crimes. Put Children and Families First Give a bigger platform to critically important issues and develop policies that benefit children and families across our state Support increased funding for students, teachers, and other critical educational improvements Support increased funding for additional counselors throughout the state of Georgia Make Georgia the most affordable place to adopt Creation of the Senate Children and Families Committee Legislation: == \- Aligns notice requirements for permanent guardianship Senate Bill 131 aligns notice requirements for permanent guardianship with termination of parental rights (TPR) proceedings. Additionally, SB 131 addresses the termination of parent rights when a surviving parent is being criminally indicted for the offense of murder or voluntary manslaughter of the other parent. Legislation: == - Child in Need of Services (CHIN) hearings Senate Bill 133 establishes a uniform process for the Division of Family and Children Services (DFCS) to address custody of children for delinquency disposition orders and Child in Need of Services (CHIN) hearings. Legislation: == \- Addresses parental rights Senate Bill 134 helps streamline proceedings addressing parental rights by expediting the use of medical narratives and makes it easier for children to testify in proceedings Legislation: == \- Addresses genetic testing Senate Bill 135 which establishes standards for admissibility and authenticity of genetic testing Legislation: == \- Respite care for foster parents Allows for up to 72 hours of respite care for foster parents. 'Respite care' means occasional or short-term relief for a caregiver by a person or entity. Secure Elections Legislation: == - Zuckerberg Election Reform Ensures that all costs and expenses relating to election administration are paid for with lawfully appropriate public funds and would prohibit certain local governments and individuals from soliciting or accepting donations or other things of value to support election administration. 2023 Priority Study Committees Senate Resolution 85: The Senate Occupational Licensing Study Committee sponsored by Senator Larry Walker (R - Perry) addresses Georgia's current occupational licensing laws and requirements. Senate Resolution 275: Senator John Albers (R - Roswell) sponsored the Senate Study Committee on Expanding Georgia's Workforce, which will examine current practices, pilot programs, private-public partnerships, and initiatives by industries across Georgia to increase workforce opportunities. Senate Resolution 279: The Senate Study Committee on Certificate of Need (CON) Reform sponsored by Senator Greg Dolezal (R - Cumming) will address CON reform policies that will preserve the ability of hospitals to continue to provide open access to all patients in a community. * Senate Resolution 282: Senator Kay Kirkpatrick (R - Marietta) sponsored the Senate Study Committee on Foster Care and Adoption, which will review current guidelines and processes related to foster care and adoption. | | | | Malcolm Mitchell's Share the Magic Foundation Gala | In February, we had a fantastic time speaking at Malcolm Mitchell's Share the Magic Foundation gala at the historic Fox Theatre! Malcolm is a dear friend and DGD who is inspiring kids to read to a better future and equipping them with the resources to do it--and I'm proud to support their continued success! | == | == | == | == | | | | Butts County Chamber of Commerce Award This year, I was honored to be recognized as the Butts County Chamber of Commerce Citizen of the Year! I'm so grateful for my home county and the small town values I carry with me every day to work for our state. | == | | | | Women of Achievement Ceremony We took time to celebrate the achievements of female leaders across our state recently at our inaugural Women of Achievement Ceremony! I am incredibly grateful for the accomplishments of these and so many women across our state who make Georgia the best place to live, work and raise a family. | | | | | | | | Spring Break 2023 Earlier this week, we took off for Spring Break 2023. We're looking forward to enjoying some down time as a family before we get back to work. We hope you all are having a wonderful springtime and enjoying this beautiful weather, and hope to see you all very soon! | | | | God bless, Burt Jones | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@burtjonesforga.com | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | == | == == == | PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA | | Burt Jones for Georgia | P.O. Today, more than two dozen young leaders will lead a Texting Day of Action to help drive ICE out of Harris County, Texas.
Why is this so important? ICE’s involvement in Harris County puts immigrants at risk of intimidation, detention, and even deportation. But Harris County is only working with ICE on a voluntary basis, and can end their agreement whenever they want.
**That’s why Squad members will distribute petitions and help get signatures calling on Harris County — the largest county in Texas — to end their cooperation with ICE.**
Driving ICE out of Harris County will be the Squad’s first major action of 2023, but they have even more in store to fight back against anti-immigration policies and keep our communities safe.
**Will you make a donation today to fuel the Squad’s critical work in 2023? With your help, we’ll be able to lead even more Days of Action, grow the Squad’s numbers, and win more major victories for immigrant communities.**

| | | Donald Trump has been indicted on 34 counts by the state of New York, and will finally face a trial and justice. But GOP speaker Kevin McCarthy is trying his best to get the Manhattan DA to drop the case. He's been using threats, telling outright lies, and allowing his fellow GOP House members to do the same. **This case is none of McCarthy's business. McCarthy is a federal official, and this case is a state case. McCarthy has no jurisdiction, and needs to mind his own business.** [**Add your name: Tell Kevin McCarthy to Stop Interfering in the NY Trump Case >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8852ca79-9aae-4600-8f47-1608246de547/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Hillsdale College via Fierce America
subject: You need to know
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524156:686fYFGUN:m:1:3391001263:AB283ECD77F9FEA6ED5082EAAE336E68:r)
---
| | Peter,

I hope you're having a great day so far!

It's been busy here at Hillsdale College because we've finally completed a project that's been in the works for a long time.

You're probably wondering what I'm talking about, so I won't keep you in suspense any longer.

Here it is:

Our _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum **_for K-12 students is ready for classrooms across the country!

We're all very excited and hopeful about this project's potential impact, and I know you will be as well... especially after I give you more details!

The _**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**_ is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively.

The curriculum was not designed by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College. It's so important that we are making it available absolutely **free of charge**.

The massive 2,200-page, 85-lesson curriculum comes from years of diligent study of America, its history, and its founding principles. And it was developed and tested in school classrooms around the country.

As I mentioned, our K-12 Education Office at the College built this curriculum over many months of intense and focused effort, in many ways, its roots extend back to the beginning of the College itself in 1844.

I'm sure you've noticed how far too many politicians, media personalities, and sadly even educators are pushing an anti-American narrative on our children.

This means there is now a choice before us: will we allow these education bureaucrats to choose what schoolchildren learn? Or, will we teach them the **whole** truth through a sound curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation's history?

Personally, and I hope you agree that this choice is **obvious**. When we provide students with the unbiased history of our country, they will naturally recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth defending.

**You can make the _Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_ a success by helping us blanket the nation with promotions about it and our other outreach efforts like _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and other educational programs.

** Our K-12 education staff spent months putting the curriculum together. And our marketing team has already designed the print and online ads, and we've recorded the radio commercials...

...all we need now is your support to keep these promotions running so we can place the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_** into the hands of as many teachers and homeschool families as possible.

**Oh...and did I mention that educators (and you) can download the full curriculum for FREE? Well, you can!

** The **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum _**is available for absolutely no cost because it's a part of our 179-year-old-mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

**We've set a goal to raise $1,500,000 for this vital and important effort, and I hope you'll join us. With students around the country back in their classrooms, we cannot lose a moment promoting this curriculum and our other educational outreach.

** **Please give your best tax-deductible gift toward our goal at this secure link:**

[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum

**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524156:686fYFGUN:m:1:3391001263:AB283ECD77F9FEA6ED5082EAAE336E68:r) Everything we do to **reach** and **teach** Americans of all ages about the principles of liberty **depends on the support of informed patriots like you!

** That's because we refuse to accept any government funding...EVERY PENNY, even indirect aid like federal or state student loans and grants.

I'm thrilled to tell you about the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum. **_It's part of our promise to redouble our efforts to restore and defend liberty this year.

Hopefully, you're as excited as I am to present a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation's history to our nation's schoolchildren.

Please help us reach our $1,500,000 budget goal. And thank you in advance for preserving liberty for our children and grandchildren!

For our children,

Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

P.S. We've just made a big announcement. After 18 months of work, the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum**_ is available for free to educators, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens like you. It covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively.

It's a part of our effort to defend liberty through education, but we need your help putting the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_** into the hands of as many teachers and homeschool families as possible.

Will you give a special tax-deductible gift today to promote the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_** and our other outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide? We have a budget goal to raise $1,500,000 for this vital effort**. Would you please join us today using this secure link: **

[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524156:686fYFGUN:m:1:3391001263:AB283ECD77F9FEA6ED5082EAAE336E68:r)
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system February 17, 2023.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i686fYFGUN). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o686fYFGUN)
