name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I want to share a bit more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend: I just launched my first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate here in Nevada – and I couldn’t be more grateful for the outpouring of support from people like you. **As we kick things off, I want to share a bit more about why I’m in this fight.**
It really comes down to where my story began: in a working-class family, as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. At a young age, my loved ones instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I’ve carried them with me throughout my entire life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327717/399814591/920832744?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4038-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhNmFmNC1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y1d0fvXmPfvZ_8pCTxW4cKulEup4ysrgvoT4WslVyU=)
These values drove me to become the first in my family to graduate from college – working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace and taking out student loans to cover the cost.

They drove me while I worked as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field – seeing inequality in our workforce firsthand.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327720/399814592/920832744?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4038-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhNmFmNC1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y1d0fvXmPfvZ_8pCTxW4cKulEup4ysrgvoT4WslVyU=)
And they drove me during my first Senate race when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds to become only the second woman senator in Nevada's history.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327725/399814593/920832744?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4038-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhNmFmNC1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y1d0fvXmPfvZ_8pCTxW4cKulEup4ysrgvoT4WslVyU=)
To this day, my path is lit by these guiding lights. They fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans, no matter who you are or where you come from.
**But right now,_The Washington Post_ is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. That’s why the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat.**
I simply can’t fight back and defend my battleground seat without your critical grassroots support, friend. **That’s why I have to ask:[_Please, will you split $5 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's now – before our crucial midnight deadline – to become one of the essential Reelection Founding Donors we need to win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327732/399814594/920832744?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4038-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhNmFmNC1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y1d0fvXmPfvZ_8pCTxW4cKulEup4ysrgvoT4WslVyU=)**
Thank you. Your support will go such a long way – especially in these crucial early days.

– Jacky Rosen
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327735/399814595/1575385346?refcode=jtk4038-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhNmFmNC1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y1d0fvXmPfvZ_8pCTxW4cKulEup4ysrgvoT4WslVyU=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327736/399814596/1575385346?refcode=jtk4038-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhNmFmNC1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y1d0fvXmPfvZ_8pCTxW4cKulEup4ysrgvoT4WslVyU=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327743/399814597/1575385346?refcode=jtk4038-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhNmFmNC1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y1d0fvXmPfvZ_8pCTxW4cKulEup4ysrgvoT4WslVyU=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=nsyGXzO%2FHRMHcv7tMfI0%2FK0oq9wNEUZIqtxTNsce67U1Tjwgg88uD7LGWY3U9yUC61hrbGsZlTrEOoya8QyoshbbRax2zS8oABQ5qGSu2O%2F1WPwfMcMyf%2FYbQWS1i%2F0PLO%2F7tSHqxrzIFNCMwcE%2F4t%2FwT4OxozSs7FxMtwGQd9hPrwMtLABOZvvESwUWuxWH6rogEIdN7MwsEtF6YfuzFkrvgzNXeFT%2F7T9koCjdYCKZrtJLpN5D1L%2FabAU3lJ94tDcHkIv%2Bie1%2FazITPszsRkXv1ryBF0BA8gDRYrfHVgASrtABARJLYDxl%2FsRWkjm6OznYjzc4eOr7VSyTWTEpxclsM%2BSsEYw0aiAbOeSGuUGNuitn18Q116S5hVtn2YwOv2MU7e104CaSg1H3z4BnLpYHb%2BASqBBIqu1UF%2FypkE0%3D).

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za0isd1mbieb53cmg1ppj37l88qu7lp4u4p00vt0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cth6co34cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America – but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfkals1ioi9f5dcpgeevhn4df8kvkq34siuerg1o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cth6co34cdh2bs)**

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying – and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying – and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom. Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country. Thank you, | Donald J. clean_body: We just closed the books on the first quarter of the year, and Kim has already had a busy year in Congress! Peter, We just closed the books on the first quarter of the year, and Kim has already had a busy year in Congress! She had her 16th bill signed into law, was appointed to chair a task force on the upcoming national Farm Bill, and introduced bills to increase health care access for children and provide crucial support to Washington farmers. Kim is working hard to fight for the issues that matter most to you. As we begin the next quarter of the year, Kim wants to hear from this grassroots team about which issues are at the top of your mind. Kim's top priority has always been listening to the people of Washington's 8th District. That's why Kim's held 100 town halls across the district and traveled over 17,000 miles, and it's why she sends out surveys like this to ensure every person has a chance to make their voice heard. Our team will share the results of this survey with Kim later this week, so make sure you take a moment to make your voice heard! Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Dan Kildee
subject: grateful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| I am so grateful for your support.

We reached our fundraising goals before our first major FEC deadline because of the contributions of folks like you, so thank you.

We’re in for another competitive race in 2024. As a “top target” of Speaker McCarthy and National Republicans, we’ve already seen negative TV attack ads against us.

**I also want to take this opportunity to thank everyone for their well wishes following my announcement of my diagnosis on Friday. I am going to get through this. I'm going to beat cancer. I am so grateful for the outpouring of support we have received.**

From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
Dan

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! name: 7 Directions of Service
subject: MVP loses key water permit! + April Rights of Nature Events
body:
We're celebrating a major MVP win this week. Check it out! | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yj6cBoP2vcn6KEpSm74SwRHohHAX8g5ATnPCv71yIyljYKEL7y4fDqHaI8IztpoOKrdO9ubOgFe5BwtfSC4GGsW58zL0vpj7XtYjE87SZKwxD9YcepWzP84vm_sib3G1gxMO49IOamLoFm8eh69TDGOJjkKurONdZlnefsJJX4n8GyHfm3gwQ1nKubVuuWGAJS4JDF8sWkg_RYV8sKkker_NZQ8egSOXhnYdtKdvCEu-zCffLBiGvl7kOMTNlqFA98/3v3/q5XlbiDIQOGxRboLIYwaRg/h0/INVPRFA5F6abKaKwWq_WOwHWsOKA4DLX0IMLLHfWPz4)
---
---
We're celebrating a major win for water this week in WV! [A federal appeals court vacated](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXe4douC3tgBC8Z9ep0H3FC1FHjsAAk8PfRauxO3cYGOd6Rb9wyO2DoCss_K7LTNaGBBvridUy_ZO5hPmoJH2fIVpOPtegNaDRUH8UKHAKZIGBYhS-NXy5KKG9BXhce1VqgcVGNsozNNRndowG6fux0sdvGwCC_R8MOp94OrtZU8Lk2Qnv66n7uPAI2yItGnOOXIub9bNAG-bJpwmO2YaIVSXMu87IpW2Ap2f53MCjyO3BsuR1ZWF_3koAT29ZPj1hnKGY_SETjGtkeMV649-_GKvvqXZJA_M2VaSuoeKBx74/3v3/q5XlbiDIQOGxRboLIYwaRg/h1/dHwP2rcLdUe9J3L4jxGqX4Sy28GMbUHu2w4Rtaaybng) the WV Dept. of Environmental Protection’s 401 Clean Water Act certification for the Mountain Valley Pipeline, saying the project failed to meet WV state water quality standards.This certification is needed to resume construction in WV, and MVP will now have to reapply. **** Without it, the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers cannot issue the related water quality permit that MVP needs for its stream and wetland crossings. In addition, MVP still has not received authorization to cross the Jefferson National Forest. **** The longer we can delay construction, the more likely funders pull out. This is how pipelines die y’all, a result of tireless grassroots efforts on multiple fronts. **** As we celebrate, we are fueled to fight even harder to strengthen our bedrock environmental laws and reject legislation like [H.R.1](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0t6Ke6oybIu7rip7-lZ0ciyhe7xwSoHAcrE0U0yVG9tZx1LQXZCG8ryF6k5EQ3vAPRRjq-hULwfBUulf0ydeCoEZQ7CK7MSaAez4Mp13pxZmLl5hQQLHK67BukQUq11LKQlgx2rSiUW9R57KjVskJo4baqQRB4e_7zRsfOaBKD1NYCdfn25q4ZCixsuDMMhMToZEolFyeq1yPELhrtA-wuphsZBIuqKKHrFPgMHvAuji6lsn69yP8GTzxawAmpp64IMUnO8Wr6uCR_EvP9i_q39hGYqq60ylDtEYko_vjGqDqzgwDfrTNkpb42Zcchq4Xg/3v3/q5XlbiDIQOGxRboLIYwaRg/h2/xI3HP5q-58i8uymq7SrG8LuBflA2AvNrHTNmAzxPig8) that put “Polluters Over People”.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yirr3nc5HANDxAGbgBkpIfeWh05cP8FtFFRXvbDWrVScfe9ZlDSD2P_IH8PQEb1-t_9z7fvlRuli-g7xfU6C_lIwDYpfS152tczmn3wyQqi8ZSlTug0Axx74XKbXbXc2LSp9Qv7PZlydiWPoMUrA1oNX5h4Md2XntHIhnHGC-P6zJ88kOx0pcymcEO4L0rjbqwWsgFo53dIUVcV8s6R8aj8VUAAnjFaNbVwH_wg_DJ560824j2tTlESQ_nXXjzd9ZsZKNC2L9Goc4iD6qxwNepm/3v3/q5XlbiDIQOGxRboLIYwaRg/h3/MkV6-8IBpH9ury1obo004i-69CuEBu3IRx3XRWtZXyY)
---
Join us for an upcoming community information session about the Indigenous-led movement for legal Rights of Nature, and its application to protect our waterways and communities in North Carolina. **** In each session, we’ll cover:
* The Indigenous-led Rights of Nature Movement

clean_body: We're celebrating a major MVP win this week. Check it out! | | We're celebrating a major win for water this week in WV! the WV Dept. of Environmental Protection’s 401 Clean Water Act certification for the Mountain Valley Pipeline, saying the project failed to meet WV state water quality standards.This certification is needed to resume construction in WV, and MVP will now have to reapply. ** Without it, the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers cannot issue the related water quality permit that MVP needs for its stream and wetland crossings. In addition, MVP still has not received authorization to cross the Jefferson National Forest. The longer we can delay construction, the more likely funders pull out. This is how pipelines die y’all, a result of tireless grassroots efforts on multiple fronts. As we celebrate, we are fueled to fight even harder to strengthen our bedrock environmental laws and reject legislation like that put “Polluters Over People”. | | Join us for an upcoming community information session about the Indigenous-led movement for legal Rights of Nature, and its application to protect our waterways and communities in North Carolina. In each session, we’ll cover: The Indigenous-led Rights of Nature Movement Rights of Nature in NC Vision and Strategy Becoming an Advocate **** Toolkit: Petition: | Bila:huk, 7 Directions of Service | | | Sent via . Friend,
My father was arrested despite having committed NO CRIME.
_It 's hard to believe I just typed those words. It's hard to believe something so tyrannical could happen in America... _
...But this is the reality of our country now that the Radical Left Democrats run America.
As you know - and as I've personally witnessed my entire life - my father is a WARRIOR.
_He will not let this sham indictment stop our mission to Make America Great Again! Our movement will prevail - just as we've prevailed after every other vicious attack._

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61316941/399778123/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg4YjMxMGUtY2JkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C6VOuZ_Z9tDGVCiv-wasVUopkwTjVNoo1Ybvq2ghMnI=)
---
**Turns out women still care about protecting abortion!** Last night, voters delivered a victory in Wisconsin for Judge Janet Protasiewicz. Her election will flip the state Supreme Court to a liberal majority, protecting women all over the state from an 1849 abortion ban still on the books. Time and time again, we’ve seen that committing to protect and defend reproductive rights is a winning issue. Women and young people will turn up at the polls to protect their right to an abortion. [_**This is EXACTLY how HER Time plans to mobilize voters in the upcoming elections, and with your help, we’ll see the same results. body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

|
---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**

name: Coach
subject: Beyond chaos – this is a CRISIS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Watch now to learn more about the Border Security and Safety Act >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/850a0761c48cac76/7788c8d78d8dfe86c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

Did you catch my recent interview with Eric Bolling on Newsmax TV?

My Republican colleagues and I are fed up and taking action. The situation at our southern border is completely out of control – _I’ve seen it with my own eyes_.

As I said in the interview, words like “chaos” or “disaster” don’t do it full justice anymore.

This is a CRISIS in the truest sense of the word.

We’ve introduced the **Border Security and Safety Act** to hold Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas accountable and eliminate the Biden administration’s endless excuses.

[**You can watch my conversation with Eric to learn more >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/850a0761c48cac76/f07df78c86bd2e00c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

The situation at the border has never been worse. We’re at a critical juncture.

**If the Biden administration is going to continue to fail the American people, then we need to let border states do whatever it takes to STOP this deadly chaos.** \- Coach
---

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Oh brother 🙄
body:
At Courier Newsroom, we know the best antidote to their bad information is good information (AKA ‘the facts’).
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=811%2E120351%2EI2hX2H)
Yesterday, Donald Trump turned himself into authorities and was arraigned at the Manhattan County Courthouse — **making him the first US President in history to face criminal charges.**
What happens next is anyone’s guess, but that isn’t stopping right-wing bad actors like Tucker Carlson and Marjorie Taylor Greene from seizing the moment to push their extreme agenda.
To millions of people, online and on cable TV, they’ve spent the last 24 hours amplifying Trump’s lies. Their goal is obvious. To get Trump elected, they’re trying to create doubt about our legal system and sow distrust in our democracy.
Our dedicated news teams are countering their bad information in real-time through fact-based news pieces and social posts —**they’re even engaging with people on social media to answer their questions:**
[****](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3591?refcode=em-20230405&t=2&akid=811%2E120351%2EI2hX2H)
[**At a historic moment like this, our work has never been more important. Will you chip in $5 to power our team?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3591?refcode=em-20230405&t=3&akid=811%2E120351%2EI2hX2H)
Peter, the misinformation being promoted by Tucker Carlson and Marjorie Taylor Greene is charged with racist, anti-semitic, and violent rhetoric. Full stop.
They’re motivated by self-promotion, profit, and power — all at the expense of the truth and our democracy.
At Courier Newsroom, we know the best antidote to their bad information is the truth. That’s why our newsrooms are working in real-time to counter these false claims and spread their trustworthy journalism to as many people as possible — **but they need the resources to do it.**
[**Please help us keep up this important work by contributing $5 today:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3591?refcode=em-20230405&t=4&akid=811%2E120351%2EI2hX2H)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3591?refcode=em-20230405&t=5&akid=811%2E120351%2EI2hX2H)**
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=811_120351_I2hX2H&akid=811%2E120351%2EI2hX2H)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=811%2E120351%2EI2hX2H)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Do you have a moment to share your thoughts, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter,
Lucas Kunce is running for U.S. Senate because he’s on a mission to take back power for working people in Missouri and all across the country.
Unlike Missouri’s current U.S. Senator Josh Hawley, Lucas isn’t taking cues from the corrupt mega-donors and corporate elites who’ve spent decades tearing our country up. He’s relying on input from real voters like you to drive our campaign’s message and priorities from the very start — **and that’s why we’re reaching out to you today.**
**[Will you take just a few moments to share your thoughts with Lucas about your priorities this year, our campaign, and what you think we need to accomplish before November 2024?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230405-1-survey?t=1&akid=2959%2E614464%2EVfDFQi)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230405-1-survey?t=2&akid=2959%2E614464%2EVfDFQi)**
Lucas doesn’t have a network of shady mega-donors or corporate elites backing up his campaign — and he doesn’t want ‘em. We’re committed to building a truly grassroots movement because everyday people like you are the only folks Lucas wants to serve in the U.S. Senate.
Part of that means he won’t accept ANY corporate PAC money in this race. But it also means we need input from folks like you to guide our strategy and priorities throughout this campaign. **So Peter:**
**[Can you take just a minute or two to share your priorities and thoughts with Lucas in this quick survey? Your feedback is invaluable as we build out this campaign to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230405-1-survey?t=3&akid=2959%2E614464%2EVfDFQi)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230405-1-survey?t=4&akid=2959%2E614464%2EVfDFQi)**
Thank you so much,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230405-2959-footer&t=5&refcode2=2959_614464_VfDFQi&akid=2959%2E614464%2EVfDFQi)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Washington=20State=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Exciting Update: Liz Harrington to Keynote the Republican Action Conference!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us May 5th and 6th in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb51smkhf39p58kv1qjcpj56dteqir0sbd4g0evg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cth66or2cph2bs)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America – but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zul67mr75s6goj9dvgg1o4oftqgrsb5efft0lj2g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cth66or2cph2bs)**

---

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying – and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

body:

---
Friend,

Right now, JD Vance has shown that he's not buying this political witch hunt taking place in Washington, D.C. He's leading the charge in the Senate to end this **_persecution being carried out by the Socialist Left against my father._**

What's my father's crime? **Being a patriot and standing up to their radical agenda that threatens to cripple our country 's very foundation.**

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: blood clots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230405_charles_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230405_charles_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230405_charles_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230405_charles_logo]Hello.
Nearly a decade ago, I lost my husband, Charles Rochester, to sudden complications from blood clots that went to his heart and lungs.
He was a healthy man in his early 50s who kept a vegetarian diet and worked out every morning. One day, he ruptured his Achilles tendon playing basketball before a business meeting with his colleagues. A few weeks later, he passed away.
Why am I telling you this?
When I decided to step up and run for office for the very first time ever, it was on the anniversary of his passing.
I made that decision with the knowledge that I didn’t know how to run a campaign. I had never done it before.
Looking back on that first campaign in 2016, I realize I was in mourning. As I traveled up and down our state, people shared their stories of challenge and triumph with me. They inspired me and gave me the motivation to keep going.
I’m just as inspired by Delawareans today as I was then, and I’m so grateful for the hope and healing they unknowingly gave me. It’s why I plan to continue to be an advocate and a fighter.
The reality is that many deaths from blood clots are preventable. Because of my own experience and the countless stories I’ve heard on the campaign trail, I’m spearheading a bipartisan effort in Congress to raise awareness and recognize March as Deep Vein Thrombosis and Pulmonary Embolism Awareness Month.
It would mean so much to me if you could be a part of this effort. Will you add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/T237LVMs0EabR0SLIgiXcA2]
Thank you,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230405_charles_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]
Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

Rush was right when he boldly proclaimed in 2019 that those leading the Witch Hunt against President Trump "ought to be in jail."
And if he were alive today to see the arrest of the greatest President in modern history, he'd be saying the same thing.
District Attorney Alvin Bragg is an anti-American radical who's committed a grave crime against our country.
**President Trump was right when he said that Alvin Bragg, "should be prosecuted."**
His goal is to put President Trump behind bars, sabotage his presidential campaign, and give Democrats tyrannical control over our whole country.

subject: we did it, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8YeWuy-fBdEcU4I7ntH-E2moFVhO_-bi2Q7uom4Bqsx46jFSO2W0MCmlusoFPgveNOruU4H4M4VEyBR9TQklSk6j-SkbdWF_G4ceFqvrit9vUn46Q8c8ONVht5wNVeUbo_LR-AKy3q_38AUNKk3XJavW17zFIagJXClg8NLNsic0Rrsi2ssoaN-LnzTkkIEv7CIvkDuuj6bK_hkwH75rg5PE75L8w7Hyz4fa-Fzv6iNN6Wt5z_6iCOzAWYp21OZ1dmuUJXxoR9_yxxNNl5DvIqGnnqOYjlcTyKsyAJO-LccQ/3v3/qpVe4jK4S_OPEyPCqlJLXw/h0/5A8BqQzoKd94YqXbsGYb7uLxbJipGkQfMjOWom1iZ8Q)
| | Peter — WE DID IT!!! 🥳

**After defeating his opponent, progressive Black champion Brandon Johnson has officially been elected Mayor of Chicago!** With Black mayors continuing to lead the four largest cities in America, it’s clear that Black voters are demanding representation in our government louder than ever — **_and we’re determined to give it to them_**. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTM-uYj7Sa3_tzCHVHRey5fSgUEGk1d4KNq05QKcYJM8jZ32MFeo907VStNPVsN9dfemIhYOsDGTEQh-Vx83JFwcMAoNdU58Gusa3eYTHs-L8MzXWH3g_fnWBrylcPxcEVaGR5rhlMVn2EgmTLj8lPrPKCaZugsU_bvTAClsVzi-1ag8GyasMZCKqd0lSl0XCt62797RsNWcT38Sud4oV59lgUhBXX_WQ-_3DRgFiiOvmlhcIbGzFBJsGzyZ_VPEpI852cNE-eh88EmM64nQcGuyqkWRg4kXp7dVQiOQSRjdvxfPcilxAqbo0myj7RHaXVffP2qszNEOwpCPdVE-kFqv0sV418TmqJBCODaq6KZbotR8lyiHWEjz0rmerfgLX5/3v3/qpVe4jK4S_OPEyPCqlJLXw/h1/x6pmiYaCLS8a-lsbyET6QpZaNSowS85hHV3UazNaDBg) Peter, we elected a teacher and community organizer. One who’s ready to fight tooth and nail for ALL of the people of Chicago. Brandon is ready to get to work and build Chicago into a stronger and more equitable city.

[Now, there’s one thing left to do — congratulate Brandon Johnson on his big win! Sign our card to congratulate Brandon and thank him for all of his hard work → ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTM-uYj7Sa3_tzCHVHRey5fSgUEGk1d4KNq05QKcYJM8jZ32MFeo907VStNPVsN9dfemIhYOsDGTEQh-Vx83JFwcMAoNdU58Gusa3eYTHs-L8MzXWH3g_fnWBrylcPxcEVaGR5rhlMVn2EgmTLj8lPrPKCaZugsU_bvTAClsVzi-1ag8GyasMZCKqd0lSl0XCteKOBqJYz0g_ANcD5iJDA7r5VL4TcbGqASCDIXWyxAeKaVA9-xR6jLOyZ0Ic11WhBsYFcTMogIVFE5rAWBmdgSQJ7K0rJJr1_TBTkd1s_LgVjF4c4WtQ0JQAfAr0tWDZ_jTS7NVXFcLObNIUcoQ_srIR9pmf9_eGEHiI8H6Y1saReA0u-diCB5vbRnhbd6cGb/3v3/qpVe4jK4S_OPEyPCqlJLXw/h2/JSmP-uxkCrkUz2qxf5EX7WERBuwWsvJe5tEv9upCheQ)
| [SIGN THE CARD](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTM-uYj7Sa3_tzCHVHRey5fSgUEGk1d4KNq05QKcYJM8jZ32MFeo907VStNPVsN9dfemIhYOsDGTEQh-Vx83JFwcMAoNdU58Gusa3eYTHs-L8MzXWH3g_fnWBrylcPxcEVaGR5rhlMVn2EgmTLj8lPrPKCaZugsU_bvTAClsVzi-1ag8GyasMZCKqd0lSl0XCt8zlclbDqN51V-yizqT60wWPts7zgDq7UUHBXlASkEMXzb5zFq4n2X4-HUOVVYtJcyu42DhpZ6X0BP0EUEqjLWPzGmeTAuNczQEMT4SVP2sgLFfeuuSY6eStP7gLkyaS-mB7ijNhp1t1w4riXc5iwRGEoc0jV4Huhxu5R6X2RR12NSSzlMCl1aCqJt-5E6MSQ/3v3/qpVe4jK4S_OPEyPCqlJLXw/h3/geh1tAiB-LKYWl2sZP6DvQ-tvdRI4ZdNRDuwNwXPi7I)

Thank you for all that you do, Peter — in Chicago and across the country.

All of us @ The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLj9igQbEwcOEg-YNXuMxNiADlivY9OF6W0eTa9zGRXfcO6lIM_1ii2gPDzfS93suN_NrSgP3OvAgpIY-Cn7P_dm8BOeYwscsLyDWAcbjSYV7IXvY-8aJbjOj7okA8_3zdRqk8ss6MFrvJlU891mejLoRzTncp9Tb4J9VRaQ9_q0n5RLVNoq-iOeW6466pPj63QxvMvR3A2l952jtODP6-xnCBeMy20MEn6atlJIOzwaEhACBH4guLZ5a8wpYqRgGv2vuNTzhJbSPks-bzZactGfOwmihdQpDdUcUrP6kZxITMqn0LPOUCiwnVHoLJBSGtV5Fx9aIhKBi7gYPg5Vj5zUjucRxTcKF7uE8_G47U2wn1JZBlkvofb_5kjG0AcUkow/3v3/qpVe4jK4S_OPEyPCqlJLXw/h4/RYRQkP56bLk7IePtXMp7SnG_LyKV_8k-Jju_UqcWUTY) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: YOU made this possible, Derek
body:
I have good news, Derek: We just reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!!
| | |
---
I have good news, Derek: We just reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!!
**My team set an ambitious target, and we JUST made it – and none of it would have been possible without you, Derek. **
This was the first real “win” for our 2024 bid. I know that seems far away, but if my time in Washington has taught me anything, it’s that the early signs are important. Reaching this goal puts us in a good spot for what’s to come – and can help us stay focused on our goals.
As an Air Force veteran, entrepreneur, teacher, and mother, I remain committed to a life of service and duty – to our community, Commonwealth, and our country. This year, next year, and beyond, this commitment will remain at the heart of everything I do. **I’m so, so grateful to have you by my side, Derek. **
There’s work to be done.

Chrissy

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a689efffe8a048a8a9e6c160a92c8c19&_e=M1CiB8FA1hcyAjTA8Z3DFfYgK-GNcQJEX5pJd_CIuDiY9bqR9nypotqcLz7k1-O-fhe8dmlfc8cRs5CiUEZTBHHWCTTnQ3PBupBWQk-aY27ea-2HSjjzVC17HmLpDbUCZau2bi0J29W7ZXIlJEqJ4ZMAFieFRj9rLSKDnTA54BTnH6y4o0IVaWkwKMC0-13LoL-SqoqjasWmNnJf466e44tJ34wurz-mTkrHD26imyNJ_SF8NCTD3I4eFVS120oxR4js1Me1OJY0tQddG6_Dc3ZqlTjNgeKak1ZFvak0gjzrytXO9yBSC-x_mjiTtE2UkZ0q2Y7mFuK3itBWT1zN9rx3LJEuTSZ1O_uqNRFFKhLunUbKcgCAEFmG54HwVnA8CNLSe7gj-w0B3fYl7bjQDsYTWLazFNvsKbb9AVuuKM8%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a689efffe8a048a8a9e6c160a92c8c19&_e=M1CiB8FA1hcyAjTA8Z3DFfYgK-GNcQJEX5pJd_CIuDiY9bqR9nypotqcLz7k1-O-fhe8dmlfc8cRs5CiUEZTBHHWCTTnQ3PBupBWQk-aY27ea-2HSjjzVC17HmLpDbUCZau2bi0J29W7ZXIlJEqJ4ZMAFieFRj9rLSKDnTA54BTnH6y4o0IVaWkwKMC0-13LoL-SqoqjasWmNnJf466e44tJ34wurz-mTkrHD26imyNJ_SF8NCTD3I4eFVS120oxR4js1Me1OJY0tQddG6_Dc7q-5HQk8gcQaCSe_lx7Jt5FhusGanPpLRsHj4MWMPGH96d0ni9FtvPDk95GDGBR3wet6r5L6eFei7-SDWny0ocQzKkJDcCWYoGmPRosUug6RAAVKQLjZ2nBsUQ6lJV58_Cs21gfPywFBdLRh3yPZP4%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a689efffe8a048a8a9e6c160a92c8c19&_e=M1CiB8FA1hcyAjTA8Z3DFfYgK-GNcQJEX5pJd_CIuDiY9bqR9nypotqcLz7k1-O-fhe8dmlfc8cRs5CiUEZTBHHWCTTnQ3PBupBWQk-aY27ea-2HSjjzVC17HmLpDbUCZau2bi0J29W7ZXIlJEqJ4ZMAFieFRj9rLSKDnTA54BTnH6y4o0IVaWkwKMC0-13LoL-SqoqjasWmNnJf466e44tJ34wurz-mTkrHD26imyNJ_SF8NCTD3I4eFVS120oxR4js1Me1OJY0tQddG6_Dc3fvMgkWvcKsZiKtksSyNXtlUuVZcB2fD_QdChgGS1ewqcG9Eta8w1r5E9MZfUIwxEKHy8NKR9sn9lRhvZKRdlGnN0OWp6ruBGp3VdGpius_IZSACJxareuCrXgFXu8l5iXXAPPvDdfBMvsFVNwnHuc%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a689efffe8a048a8a9e6c160a92c8c19&_e=M1CiB8FA1hcyAjTA8Z3DFfYgK-GNcQJEX5pJd_CIuDiY9bqR9nypotqcLz7k1-O-fhe8dmlfc8cRs5CiUEZTBHHWCTTnQ3PBupBWQk-aY27ea-2HSjjzVC17HmLpDbUCZau2bi0J29W7ZXIlJEqJ4ZMAFieFRj9rLSKDnTA54BTnH6y4o0IVaWkwKMC0-13LoL-SqoqjasWmNnJf466e44tJ34wurz-mTkrHD26imyNJ_SF8NCTD3I4eFVS120oxR4js1Me1OJY0tQddG6_Dc-wnKB93Ny9T_sEJtdnmxRJUkEV3fz0V6lH49smmjgiFZeadrMIQxo7lgOQB-IPnBsQBKEipRrixpSlTqhTDnbwo--Bj1D2AMy4m6qBI37aIL0k7QYGfwKOXL7lOgLzTYksFNhzcfK5aARw8_FOuphQ%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

Peter, Today we are reaching out to say thank you. Thank you for all you have done over the past few years to make Indiana better. Whether you’ve donated your time, your energy, or resources to our mission, we know that sometimes it’s not easy to build a better future against so much power and money on the other side of the aisle. We appreciate all the faith you put in us to live and work with our values. [**If you’re with us, and want to see Hoosiers get access to the education, health care, and wages that we deserve, chip in to the Indiana Democratic Party and be a part of our effort to make sure we have Democrats representing us in the years to come.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61320294/399792199/1643342139?refcode=230404-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkyNDhkYy1kM2QzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JpwrN_9NYcdg-zi-ODdN0xr-fCFXRSTSNdWtsz7Bgbs=) **This year could be a turning point for Indiana.** When we look back a few years from now, we want to be able to say that 2023 was the year we took back Indiana from extreme right wing control, and began investing in our party, people, and places across Indiana. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Sad and pathetic
body:
this was a failure of leadership at the most senior levels with zero accountability for anyone up and down the chain of command. Sad and pathetic.| | | [HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=0a6af7ff51d44af3a07eeea140a3cc2c&_e=MmKqteq3huKoyS_qW0eKy71LGeZktWuUvohu94YFQOlO9GBCp4fV7RIZIhioAUVnLbjxD6FZ53zS9Gplb5YAnQCgOLg6lhsrAEnXw8FvoXWBsFYOrcTFI7Pi108cGn45aXIKb-BuG7rZTOQxGmckTmUnHCcDPbytsgZUZoc0a7n86j1rMPUC_aiHhHLr_uIc31TQOa5E8r1W4t7vHXc8q5QP39RPqJFya1orEXnXTj5VhkXMnBS59Ma5JkyFROA4C6wHdq5mgf1KyZEvfcgihGIQ_i8hlN7QeHFo6pk-t1f-gw2pi39E4XDzgi_Df9jt446r_Rad3YXLgFqdHuL-PqyRpBqbk3olQcf0hypxyA2kprUXBDBmOlx-jbeDT9fq)
---
Biden’s Afghanistan Blunder sent our world into absolute _chaos_. And yet, the Administration _still_ denies any responsibility for their callous, cold-hearted, incompetency.

**Just last week, Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin said he has NO REGRETS about how the U.S. military ended its war in Afghanistan in August 2021.**

Peter, this was a failure of leadership at the most senior levels with zero accountability for anyone up and down the chain of command. Sad and pathetic.

It’s up to House Conservatives alone to hold this disgrace of an administration accountable.

[**Please, add your name to our AFGHANISTAN INVESTIGATIONS petition to support our work and hold Biden accountable for the countless lives lost.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=0a6af7ff51d44af3a07eeea140a3cc2c&_e=MmKqteq3huKoyS_qW0eKy71LGeZktWuUvohu94YFQOlO9GBCp4fV7RIZIhioAUVnLbjxD6FZ53zS9Gplb5YAnQCgOLg6lhsrAEnXw8FvoXWBsFYOrcTFI7Pi108cGn45aXIKb-BuG7rZTOQxGmckTmUnHCcDPbytsgZUZoc0a7n86j1rMPUC_aiHhHLr_uIc31TQOa5E8r1W4t7vHXc8q5QP39RPqJFya1orEXnXTj4v5TDG5AY_ovGee6q7kdEIMX_qBV-SAgU226H23mQmje20BO0Y0Sx3zL9TSJQn7T5iKdOJHSlJGxjqVWQRZScZwAXzTobaPE8nnzFaJaqlUFIlEOkHnPQqxU2dX9rHDqyQG7LJzhZG9RKURVbUNPq1)

[SUPPORT THE AFGHANISTAN INVESTIGATIONS](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=0a6af7ff51d44af3a07eeea140a3cc2c&_e=MmKqteq3huKoyS_qW0eKy71LGeZktWuUvohu94YFQOlO9GBCp4fV7RIZIhioAUVnLbjxD6FZ53zS9Gplb5YAnQCgOLg6lhsrAEnXw8FvoXWBsFYOrcTFI7Pi108cGn45aXIKb-BuG7rZTOQxGmckTmUnHCcDPbytsgZUZoc0a7n86j1rMPUC_aiHhHLr_uIc31TQOa5E8r1W4t7vHXc8q5QP39RPqJFya1orEXnXTj4VXuEJ2dESUEOChxZSMRccxyak39uWWXtzVrQDGbw7Njd5pJcT2IOkw8StJF1xmDJ19vB-CKRAg-NHDcgyD06Rsw-IkgtwDysCFn6MsdPEEEVbJzXTEiIDPgeTgqjIxQv-tflPXsaSZ3mEmcnFPOTI)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Jim Jordan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2066%2E5257348%2Ev3ONYV ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek —

Right after it was announced that the twice-impeached, disgraced former
president Donald Trump was indicted, Republicans sprang into action.

First, they issued statements of feigned indignation or issued threats via
Twitter. Jim Jordan tweeted, “Outrageous.” Speaker Kevin McCarthy said,
“the House of Representatives will hold Alvin Bragg and his unprecedented
abuse of power to account.”

As we have witnessed before, Republicans would rather act like Trump’s
defense counsel than uphold the rule of law. It’s what they did during the
Russia, Ukraine, and January 6th investigations, and it is their standard
playbook.

Then, they took to Fox News, Newsmax and OAN to say how “unfair” this was
to the former president. They even attacked me personally, and repeatedly,
as if I had something to do with Trump’s indictment.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2066%2E5257348%2Ev3ONYV ]The Sacramento Bee: Kevin McCarthy: Adam Schiff 'lied to the American public'
and 'should never become Senator'

Then, some of Trump’s ardent supporters, like Marjorie Taylor Greene,
announced that they would go to New York City to protest.

Already, we know that Trump said an indictment would lead to “death and
destruction,” and called on his supporters to “take our country back.” And
we all know how that ended when he made similar statements in the run-up
to January 6th. Let’s pray nothing like that happens again.

Here’s what may take place next (because we’ve seen this playbook before
when I led Trump’s investigation and impeachment):

Jim Jordan and Kevin McCarthy are going to fire off letters and subpoenas
to the Manhattan DA and his staff, demanding documents, testimony, and
seeking to obstruct the trial.

If that doesn’t work, they’ll hold public hearings where they will try to
use public pressure to force the Manhattan DA to slow down.

And finally, they’ll start smearing Joe Biden. If they can’t stop Trump’s
legal problems, they will hope to distract the public’s attention with a
fire hose of disinformation directed at the Biden family.

I’m going to be in the middle of many of these fights — now as a senior
member of the Judiciary Committee. Ironically, by removing me from the
Intelligence Committee, McCarthy may have allowed me to even more
effectively counter their attacks on the rule of law from my new position.

And in the Senate, I will be even more effective in pushing back. Indeed,
this is what Californians have come to expect of their Senators, to throw
themselves into the fight, and work to protect the rule of law and uphold
our democracy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2066%2E5257348%2Ev3ONYV ]Can you chip in $10 to help me ensure that even while I’m holding Trump
accountable, our campaign still is gathering the resources we’ll need to
compete statewide in California? Even $3 goes a long way:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=apr2023_abs_em.RDZ0hA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2066%2E5257348%2Ev3ONYV ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em.O2ILzB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2066%2E5257348%2Ev3ONYV ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=apr2023_abs_em.c2HEr4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2066%2E5257348%2Ev3ONYV ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Hey Derek — Right after it was announced that the twice-impeached, disgraced former president Donald Trump was indicted, Republicans sprang into action. First, they issued statements of feigned indignation or issued threats via Twitter. Jim Jordan tweeted, “Outrageous.” Speaker Kevin McCarthy said, “the House of Representatives will hold Alvin Bragg and his unprecedented abuse of power to account.” As we have witnessed before, Republicans would rather act like Trump’s defense counsel than uphold the rule of law. It’s what they did during the Russia, Ukraine, and January 6th investigations, and it is their standard playbook. Then, they took to Fox News, Newsmax and OAN to say how “unfair” this was to the former president. They even attacked me personally, and repeatedly, as if I had something to do with Trump’s indictment. [ ]The Sacramento Bee: Kevin McCarthy: Adam Schiff 'lied to the American public' and 'should never become Senator' Then, some of Trump’s ardent supporters, like Marjorie Taylor Greene, announced that they would go to New York City to protest. Already, we know that Trump said an indictment would lead to “death and destruction,” and called on his supporters to “take our country back.” And we all know how that ended when he made similar statements in the run-up to January 6th. Let’s pray nothing like that happens again. Here’s what may take place next (because we’ve seen this playbook before when I led Trump’s investigation and impeachment): Jim Jordan and Kevin McCarthy are going to fire off letters and subpoenas to the Manhattan DA and his staff, demanding documents, testimony, and seeking to obstruct the trial. If that doesn’t work, they’ll hold public hearings where they will try to use public pressure to force the Manhattan DA to slow down. And finally, they’ll start smearing Joe Biden. If they can’t stop Trump’s legal problems, they will hope to distract the public’s attention with a fire hose of disinformation directed at the Biden family. I’m going to be in the middle of many of these fights — now as a senior member of the Judiciary Committee. Ironically, by removing me from the Intelligence Committee, McCarthy may have allowed me to even more effectively counter their attacks on the rule of law from my new position. And in the Senate, I will be even more effective in pushing back. Indeed, this is what Californians have come to expect of their Senators, to throw themselves into the fight, and work to protect the rule of law and uphold our democracy. [ ]Can you chip in $10 to help me ensure that even while I’m holding Trump accountable, our campaign still is gathering the resources we’ll need to compete statewide in California? Even $3 goes a long way: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thanks for always having my back. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 150 E. body:
We’re preparing for the next stage.
#
Derek —
A lot has happened since VoteVets launched our campaign to ban Tucker, Hannity, and Ingraham on Military bases.
We rolled out our first video.
We raised enough to get that video on TV screens at some of the largest Military bases in the country.
We made FOX feel the heat with coast-to-coast news coverage about our campaign.
And now, we’re preparing for the next stage.
We want to send our team to Capitol Hill to rally our Congressional allies and push the Pentagon to take action. We want to put billboards up around every Military installation in the country. And yes, we want to run MORE TV ads.
This campaign is about more than just FOX — it’s about defending our Democracy and ensuring our National Security. The stakes are high, and we can’t do it without you.

subject: I am blown away with gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for the incredible outpouring of support you showed this campaign ahead of our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2023.

We knew that the NRCC would study my quarterly report and look for any signs of weakness. Thanks to you, we showed our strength — and let the NRCC know that we’re not backing down.

It’s your strong grassroots support that allows me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions. Let’s keep this momentum going so I can hold my seat in 2024 — we’re only just beginning!

Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team.

We showed our strength at the end of last quarter — but if we get complacent, the NRCC will go on the offensive. Will you chip in $ or more today to get this quarter started off strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2304?amount=]

Grateful to have you by my side,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: [#]I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for the incredible outpouring of support you showed this campaign ahead of our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2023. We knew that the NRCC would study my quarterly report and look for any signs of weakness. Thanks to you, we showed our strength — and let the NRCC know that we’re not backing down. It’s your strong grassroots support that allows me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions. Let’s keep this momentum going so I can hold my seat in 2024 — we’re only just beginning! Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team. We showed our strength at the end of last quarter — but if we get complacent, the NRCC will go on the offensive. Will you chip in $ or more today to get this quarter started off strong? [=] Grateful to have you by my side, Josh Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. name: Dr. Ibraheem Samirah
subject: Let me tell you a little about myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
My name is Ibraheem Samirah and I’m running for State Senate. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347518/399830927/-1410322864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M3OGEzOS1mOWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYM2LMJLeF_3B-qjaQ-AdtZsPtLjiPciXtZkTxeiHvs=&emci=67c78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6cc78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) Derek, my name is Dr. Ibraheem Samirah and I’m running for Virginia State Senate to fight for progressive reform for all Virginians. I wanted to take the time to tell you a little about myself. Growing up in the Chicago suburbs, I enjoyed a typical American childhood—watching basketball in the bleachers, riding bikes with my brothers, and then getting around to my homework. That all changed in middle school when my father traveled to Jordan to care for his ailing mother and was denied re-entry to the U.S. by the Bush Administration. My family uprooted and relocated to stay together and fight for my father’s reinstatement. It took eleven years, but we won. That experience taught me that while the American dream is real, our country’s entrenched prejudice can take it away at any moment. I worked hard in school so I could one day return to the country I loved. I attended American University and went on to Boston University for dental school. In 2019, I was elected to the Virginia House of Delegates as a representative of Loudoun County. For three years, I tried to drive our country towards the promise of what America can be in order to address our country’s injustices so that nobody else’s American dream can be stolen and pushed out of reach. **I took on MAGA Republicans, confronted Donald Trump, fought corruption, and championed a progressive vision that would create better, more cohesive schools, high-quality jobs, lower costs, enshrine healthcare as a human right, and fight the climate crisis that threatens the future of our planet.** Today, I’m a small business owner working to build out of the pandemic through my dental practice, helping everyday Loudouners become healthier with more opportunities to succeed. **I’m running for State Senate because we need a Virginian Green New Deal, state-level Medicare for All, and quality, affordable housing for all. Compromising our values for so-called “centrist” solutions with MAGA Republicans just isn’t going to cut it.** **[I fought for Loudoun in Richmond before and I’m ready to fight for Virginians again — but first, I need your support. If you’re ready to join the fight, will you chip in today and become one of the founding donors of my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347519/399830928/859557738?refocde=em-20220405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M3OGEzOS1mOWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYM2LMJLeF_3B-qjaQ-AdtZsPtLjiPciXtZkTxeiHvs=)****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347520/399830929/859557738?refocde=em-20220405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M3OGEzOS1mOWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYM2LMJLeF_3B-qjaQ-AdtZsPtLjiPciXtZkTxeiHvs=)**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347521/399830930/859557738?refocde=em-20220405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M3OGEzOS1mOWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYM2LMJLeF_3B-qjaQ-AdtZsPtLjiPciXtZkTxeiHvs=) Loudoun deserves a Senator who will actually represent and fight for the working people of our state. It’s time we take back our state and build progressive solutions that can work for all Virginians. Thank you for your support, Dr. Ibraheem Samirah | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347522/399830931/966826497?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M3OGEzOS1mOWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYM2LMJLeF_3B-qjaQ-AdtZsPtLjiPciXtZkTxeiHvs=&emci=67c78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6cc78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347523/399830932/1897281395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M3OGEzOS1mOWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYM2LMJLeF_3B-qjaQ-AdtZsPtLjiPciXtZkTxeiHvs=&emci=67c78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6cc78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347524/399830933/827697321?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M3OGEzOS1mOWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYM2LMJLeF_3B-qjaQ-AdtZsPtLjiPciXtZkTxeiHvs=&emci=67c78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6cc78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347525/399830934/1000175125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M3OGEzOS1mOWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYM2LMJLeF_3B-qjaQ-AdtZsPtLjiPciXtZkTxeiHvs=&emci=67c78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6cc78a39-f9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: North Carolina, Rep. Tricia Cotham, who ran just a few months ago on codifying abortion rights, has betrayed everyone by switching to the Republican Party. Replace this turncoat, so Republicans don’t try it again.
body:
She ran as a progressive, then switched parties
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1558cf8e-6329-4066-b6f8-2dce992433bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Sometimes, the level to which Republicans will stoop in their deceit is exhausting. ** **_In North Carolina, Rep. Tricia Cotham, who ran just a few months ago on codifying abortion rights, has betrayed everyone by switching to the Republican Party. This gives the GOP a supermajority, allowing them to override a veto of any crazy bill they pass by Democratic Gov. Roy Cooper._** _Right now they're promising to pass a 12-week abortion ban, and Cotham, unbelievably, has signaled she'd support it. So, my friends, the fight continues, as it always does._ _**Cotham's in a 60% Democratic district. She doesn't belong in the seat--we must toss her out of it as soon as possible. For that--and the coming presidential race--we need a STRONG North Carolina Democratic Party.**_ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to boot this traitor, Cotham, and stop Republicans from attacking our rights in North Carolina?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60db3d99-d306-4a37-b841-abdaa4ec32c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for continuing to fight for what's right. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---|---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/cothamandncdemocraticparty-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31603e52-b5de-4699-aa7b-8839befee1eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: I'm running for Nashville Mayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter, this is important, so I want to get right to it.
This morning, we officially launched our campaign for Mayor of Nashville. I'm a mom, a bridge-builder, and a state senator running a people-powered campaign to make Nashville residents the primary focus and to stop the state's hostile takeover of my hometown. We set a Launch Day Donor Goal to raise $21,277 before MIDNIGHT—can you chip in $35 or more to become a launch day donor today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
SUGGESTED ACTION: BECOME A LAUNCH DAY DONOR >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Why am I running for mayor?
It's simple: I don't see anyone else running who will defend our interests—who will ensure our city's growth finally puts residents first - instead of special interests and out-of-town developers.
As a mom, state senator, and a music business executive I've been able to find success by being a unifier.. And that's exactly what this campaign for Nashville Mayor is about: bringing people together.
But we need a groundswell of people-powered support to get there, Peter, and that's why launch day donors are critical to our campaign.
Let me pull back the curtain and explain...
Our city is in a moment of greed versus good. Because of the critical issues we face like congestion, affordable housing, and a hostile takeover by the controlling party we need a proven leader and bridge-builder to defend our city and make sure that Nashville emerges from these challenges stronger than ever. I know that I'm that leader.
This style of people-centric leadership was critical to
1️⃣ Co-sponsor nearly 100 passed bills in the legislature
2️⃣ Secure over $190 million in funding for the department of childrens' services
3️⃣ Turning our budget around when we were heading for crisis in Oak Hill (and cutting my own salary as an elected official)
This election is a key turning point for our city. I'm running to get us the best deal for Nashville and our people, but I need your help to get there. Please, Peter, can you become a Launch Day Donor today and help us raise the $21,277 we need before MIDNIGHT to start this campaign off right? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
BECOME A LAUNCH DAY DONOR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230405_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

subject: I’m officially running for reelection
