body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61323020/399801604/-595108264?refcode=X_040523_Rosen_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTMwMzlhZi1kYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0rejhQPhUMW6uI5NCehoSfOmjAgwmZEjQYBQoQHfYM=) I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: **Today, I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!** In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of my campaign by **[splitting $20 between Michael Bennet’s campaign and my own](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61323023/399801607/-595108264?refcode=X_040523_Rosen_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTMwMzlhZi1kYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0rejhQPhUMW6uI5NCehoSfOmjAgwmZEjQYBQoQHfYM=), b****ut first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:**
1. Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. **That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors within the first 24 hours of our campaign launch – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend:** [**So please, will you split $20 between my campaign and Michael’s to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61323026/399801611/-595108264?refcode=X_040523_Rosen_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTMwMzlhZi1kYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0rejhQPhUMW6uI5NCehoSfOmjAgwmZEjQYBQoQHfYM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jacky Rosen & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61323028/399801641/-595108264?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_040523_Rosen_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTMwMzlhZi1kYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0rejhQPhUMW6uI5NCehoSfOmjAgwmZEjQYBQoQHfYM=)******

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The fight for abortion rights is playing out in the states, but we need to revoke the filibuster and restore the nationwide right to an abortion.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20655%2E3422442%2EfIpxd5)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-20230405-1?refcode=EMAG05_1_WIS_20230405_V1_F&refcode2=20655_3422442_fIpxd5&akid=20655%2E3422442%2EfIpxd5)
Good news from Wisconsin, where Judge Janet Protasiewicz beat an extremist Republican and has tilted the balance of the state's Supreme Court. _Many thanks to everyone who donated to our earlier fundraiser for Judge Janet._
After the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade,_ the fight for abortion rights is playing out at the state level. **But Republicans have promised that if they take back control of Congress and the White House, they'll pass a nationwide abortion ban.** With a nationwide ban, there'd be nothing state lawmakers could do to restore the right to an abortion.
We can't forget about the federal fight for abortion rights, or deem access to abortion in just some states "good enough." We need to send a warrior like Katie to the Senate to revoke the filibuster and codify the right to an abortion into law.
**For abortion access, every single election and every single seat matters.[Chip in today to help power Katie's fight to protect abortion at the federal level.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-20230405-1?refcode=EMAG05_1_WIS_20230405_V1_F&refcode2=20655_3422442_fIpxd5&akid=20655%2E3422442%2EfIpxd5)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-20230405-1?refcode=EMAG05_1_WIS_20230405_V1_F&refcode2=20655_3422442_fIpxd5&akid=20655%2E3422442%2EfIpxd5)**
Onward,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG05_1_WIS_20230405_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=20655_3422442_fIpxd5&akid=20655%2E3422442%2EfIpxd5)**

subject: Help stop the extremist anti-voter agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Help ensure our team has the resources we need to be successful in the fight for voting rights in elections and legislative sessions to come. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61323835/399804152/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230405_f_recap_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWY4OGRhOS1kY2QzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p86kj4fQCVXK3Iqk61oYK8NIO5GKggAH707EIHQSG0E=&emci=a8cfdc75-d8d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=41f88da9-dcd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | The Georgia legislative session has officially come to a close! We’re reflecting on just how much we accomplished last month with the support of voting rights activists like you, despite the obstacles anti-voter extremists continued to throw our way. [_**Chip in to help Fair Fight Action stop future legislative attacks on the freedom to vote.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61323836/399804153/-108917480?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230405_f_recap_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWY4OGRhOS1kY2QzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p86kj4fQCVXK3Iqk61oYK8NIO5GKggAH707EIHQSG0E=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61323837/399804154/-108917480?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230405_f_recap_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWY4OGRhOS1kY2QzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p86kj4fQCVXK3Iqk61oYK8NIO5GKggAH707EIHQSG0E=)
---
**Despite these extremist attacks, we made major strides in our pro-voter movement:**
**→** **Expanded** voting access by giving employees time off to vote early through SB 129;
**→ Thwarted** extremist legislators’ effort to strengthen mass voter challenges;
**→** **Blocked** extremist legislators’ attempts to eliminate drop boxes;
**→** **Saved** Saturday voting during runoff elections;
**→** **Stopped** a dangerous mass intimidation effort to livestream the faces of voters who used ballot drop boxes;
**→** **Prevented** the legislature from giving conspiracy theorists their own independent election investigators to target election workers and voters of color;
**→** **Averted** bad-faith attempts to remove oversight and accountability for prosecutors investigating allegations of election violations;
**→** **Stopped** anti-voter attempts to make it easier to throw out mail ballots;

But our efforts to stop anti-voter attacks are far from over. Despite these major wins, the Georgia legislature rammed through the last-minute passage of voter suppression bill SB 222, which criminalizes election workers and county officials simply for attempting to fund the rising cost of elections. And this year, anti-voter extremism is on the rise across the country — in 2023, lawmakers have proposed over 150 voter suppression bills.
We have the power to stop this anti-democratic agenda in its tracks — together.

Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

clean_body: I have never been more determined than I am right now. | | | Friend, I never thought this could happen in America - but it has. The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom. Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: Chance to Make History!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Alfonso For Congress]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9b4b4e99d634/chance-to-make-history?e=16d812e81c)
---
## I want to be candid with you:

**I’m not a career politician. I’m just a guy who loves Michigan and truly believes our community deserves better.**

As the son of immigrants, I know what it takes to earn my way. I know that it’s not always easy, and man, it can get really hard.

After traveling the world as a U.S. Marine, I transitioned out of the military and bought my first house here in Michigan and never looked back.

**Michigan is my home, the people are my family, and the quality of life is worth fighting for. That’s why I’m committed to flipping MI-04 blue!**

Honestly: Our leaders just aren’t cutting it.

I may not fight in the military anymore, but the fight here on our home turf has just begun. I consider myself a soldier of working class families, and together, we can build a West Michigan that reflects our community.

Our leaders love to say they want to be a leader for the working class. But truly, I can’t remember the last time our leaders took our concerns seriously.

**It's time we have a leader who tackles the hard crap. That’s why I’m asking for your support today.**

I won't back down from a challenge. I’m here to tell you that together, we CAN:

\-- Improve water quality and protect the environment,
\-- Enhance veteran services by ensuring access to timely and quality services,
\-- Work to uplift working class families with the resources we need, access to healthy foods, and much more.

This is only the beginning, I envision a West Michigan that reflects the needs of its people, and I know it’s possible.

No matter who you are, where you come from, or what your social status is, **I will make sure your concerns are addressed**. I can be the voice you’ve been looking for– but I need your urgent help today.

Will you join me today by chipping in $5 or whatever you can to say you, too, see a better future for Michigan?
|

"Hard working Americans deserve to retire without anxiety and fear, and those that are unable to work should not be forced into poverty. We need to properly fund and maintain Social Security so that future generations, like my daughter, can benefit from it."

But truly, I can’t remember the last time our leaders took our concerns seriously. It's time we have a leader who tackles the hard crap. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. I won't back down from a challenge. I’m here to tell you that together, we CAN: \-- Improve water quality and protect the environment, \-- Enhance veteran services by ensuring access to timely and quality services, \-- Work to uplift working class families with the resources we need, access to healthy foods, and much more. This is only the beginning, I envision a West Michigan that reflects the needs of its people, and I know it’s possible. No matter who you are, where you come from, or what your social status is, I will make sure your concerns are addressed. I can be the voice you’ve been looking for– but I need your urgent help today. Will you join me today by chipping in $5 or whatever you can to say you, too, see a better future for Michigan? | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Hard working Americans deserve to retire without anxiety and fear, and those that are unable to work should not be forced into poverty. We need to properly fund and maintain Social Security so that future generations, like my daughter, can benefit from it." | Michigan’s 4th Congressional District | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | [Paid for By Alfonso For Congress]() | | | Copyright (C) *|2023| |Alfonso For Congress|. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: |P.O Box 1375 Holland Michigan 49422| Want to change how you receive these emails?You can or |

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Yesterday, as Donald Trump surrendered to arrest, Marjorie Taylor Greene
showed up in New York City to spread misinformation and hateful rhetoric.

Jamaal Bowman was there to stand up to MTG’s hate and division and defend
his community:

Justice Democrats [1]Verified @justicedems
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132916?t=1001&akid=28335%2E1203867%2EycRQ5P ]@justicedems This is the correct way to respond to MTG or any white
nationalist coming to your town 👇🏿👇🏾👇🏽👇🏼👇🏻

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132917?refcode=em20230405-28335&t=1002&akid=28335%2E1203867%2EycRQ5P ]Peter, will
you make a contribution to Justice Democrats to help us support candidates
like Jamaal Bowman who aren’t afraid to stand up to hate and fight for
their communities?

Jamaal was elected to Congress to fight for racial justice, economic
equality, health care for all, and so much more. So when right-wing
extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene spread lies and stoke division, he
has to fight back.

These hateful attacks aren’t going to stop,
Peter. We’re proud to have been
a part of electing Jamaal and the other Justice Democrats in Congress
defending their communities from white nationalists like MTG. And we need
to ensure that we can elect even more progressives to join them to
challenge the political establishment and deliver for working people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132917?refcode=em20230405-28335&t=1003&akid=28335%2E1203867%2EycRQ5P ]Can you help us fight back against dangerous right-wing extremism? Make
a contribution to Justice Democrats today to help us recruit and elect
even more progressive community leaders to fight for us in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132917?refcode=em20230405-28335&t=1022&akid=28335%2E1203867%2EycRQ5P ]Contribute $3

We won’t stop standing up for working people and continuing the push for
policies that match the scale of the crises we face and actually serve the
everyday people of this country. Thanks for being a part of this movement.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=28335%2E1203867%2EycRQ5P ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=28335%2E1203867%2EycRQ5P ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230405-28335-footer&t=1025&refcode2=28335_1203867_ycRQ5P&akid=28335%2E1203867%2EycRQ5P

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=28335%2E1203867%2EycRQ5P

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: | | | | MUST READ| Peter, we are thrilled to share that Politico named Lori as one of the 40 most influential people who helped shape culture, race, and politics. This important article about Lori was recently published in Politico's "The Recast" newsletter. This article is a Must Read! | The article highlights Lori's impressive career in public service, including her current position as the Congresswoman for Oregon's 5th Congressional District, her tenure as the first female Mayor of Happy Valley, and her work as a dedicated advocate for education, small businesses, and public safety. We urge you to take a few minutes to read the article and learn more about Lori's vision for Oregon. Thank you, Team Lori | | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Team Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

clean_body: I have never been more determined than I am right now. | | | Friend, I never thought this could happen in America - but it has. The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. body:
|
---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524527:6CmFGFGSN:m:1:3391001263:3CD5D9B73C7D5BBB4B19B15B1EAEAE07:r "Sign the petition
demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524527:6CmFGFGSN:m:1:3391001263:3CD5D9B73C7D5BBB4B19B15B1EAEAE07:r "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

# NHGOP Call to Action
---
| | Rally to Support Parental Rights! We need your help to make your voice heard!! On Tuesday, April 18th the House Education Committee will have a hearing on [SB 272](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/5dOTIj3xb/c?w=OQouZw9ofoAcafMTi8_cRgVQWz3CCXApeQGCZco4xxU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuY291cnQuc3RhdGUubmgudXMvYmlsbF9zdGF0dXMvYmlsbGluZm8uYXNweD9pZD0xMDc5JmluZmxlY3Q9MiIsInIiOiI0NGUyYjQ2OS1kZmEwLTRhMTEtMjIyMi1jNjgwYWYyZjI0OWMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiNmMzMTdlMy03MWE0LTQ5YzItYTQxNS00MDdkMjA3ZTZlYjEifQ), a bill establishing a parents' bill of rights in education. WE NEED YOUR HELP! Here's How you can Help:1\. Attend the Rally to Support Parental Rights in EducationWhen: Tuesday, April 18th at 9:00amWhere: In front of State House in Concord2\. Attend the hearing on SB 272What: Public Hearing for Parental Bill of Rights (SB 272)When: Tuesday, April 18th, 10:00amWhere: Representatives Hall, State House3\. Go online to register your support for SB 272 NOW![When filling out the form be sure to complete all the steps to let the House Education Committee know that you SUPPORT SB 272.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/5dOTIj3xb/c?w=LNkptMZWu-v_9CWduJ8zPbF3fPxBjEE97ejuKKOruqY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9nZW5jb3VydC5zdGF0ZS5uaC51cy9ob3VzZS9jb21taXR0ZWVzL3JlbW90ZXRlc3RpbW9ueS8_bWNfY2lkPWI1ZTVmZWZhN2MmbWNfZWlkPTk4MGRhMDAwYzIiLCJyIjoiNDRlMmI0NjktZGZhMC00YTExLTIyMjItYzY4MGFmMmYyNDljIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYjZjMzE3ZTMtNzFhNC00OWMyLWE0MTUtNDA3ZDIwN2U2ZWIxIn0)Step 1: Fill in your Name, Town, and Contact InfoStep 2: Fill in the Date, 3/30/2023Step 3: Select House Education Committee, Select SB 272, Select "I am a member of the public", Indicate that you SUPPORT THIS BILLStep 4: Upload or type any Testimony (optional)Step 5: Review and Submit! [Can't make the hearing in person? Use this form to make your voice heard during the House Education Hearing, and register your support for SB 272](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/5dOTIj3xb/c?w=LNkptMZWu-v_9CWduJ8zPbF3fPxBjEE97ejuKKOruqY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9nZW5jb3VydC5zdGF0ZS5uaC51cy9ob3VzZS9jb21taXR0ZWVzL3JlbW90ZXRlc3RpbW9ueS8_bWNfY2lkPWI1ZTVmZWZhN2MmbWNfZWlkPTk4MGRhMDAwYzIiLCJyIjoiNDRlMmI0NjktZGZhMC00YTExLTIyMjItYzY4MGFmMmYyNDljIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYjZjMzE3ZTMtNzFhNC00OWMyLWE0MTUtNDA3ZDIwN2U2ZWIxIn0). Thank you,NHGOP Action Alerts Any questions? Respond to this email.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: I'm personally asking, friend:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it’s Chuck. The team showed me some distressing numbers just now.

As we always expected, the Republicans are starting off strong. The election experts at FiveThirtyEight say winning in 2024 will be _even tougher_ for us than it was in 2022. Early polls show statistically TIED races in multiple states, and right now the donations we need to pull Democrats ahead have NOT picked up as much as we need them to.

**I’m sorry to say our window of opportunity to take an early advantage is closing. The situation is so critical that I've just authorized an _extremely rare_ TRIPLE-Impact Match to help close the fundraising gap before our next major deadline.**

**[Please, I’m personally asking you to make a matched $5 donation today to help protect our Democratic Senate majority. This is one of the most consequential elections in our lifetimes, and your gift will have TRIPLE the impact until our _crucial_ fundraising deadline tonight. >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12714?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230405-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230405-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10369%2E9716520%2EkBG0T4)**

The good news is, meeting our $50,000 goal tonight would improve our position by leaps and bounds -- but it's going to take a team effort.

It is _vital_ that we meet our goal. If we fall short, the next set of polls I review will almost certainly be worse.

President Biden and all of our Senate candidates are counting on this grassroots team, so I hope you'll help make a difference today. _**Don't let this rare Triple-Impact Match expire before we OFFICIALLY reach this must-hit goal!**_

**[Please, I’m counting on you -- step up today with a TRIPLED donation of $5 or more to defend and expand our Democratic Senate majority:](https://go.dscc.org/go/12714?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230405-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230405-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10369%2E9716520%2EkBG0T4)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED:

clean_body: | | | Hi, it’s Chuck. The team showed me some distressing numbers just now. As we always expected, the Republicans are starting off strong. The election experts at FiveThirtyEight say winning in 2024 will be even tougher for us than it was in 2022. Early polls show statistically TIED races in multiple states, and right now the donations we need to pull Democrats ahead have NOT picked up as much as we need them to. I’m sorry to say our window of opportunity to take an early advantage is closing. The situation is so critical that I've just authorized an extremely rare TRIPLE-Impact Match to help close the fundraising gap before our next major deadline. The good news is, meeting our $50,000 goal tonight would improve our position by leaps and bounds -- but it's going to take a team effort. It is vital that we meet our goal. If we fall short, the next set of polls I review will almost certainly be worse. President Biden and all of our Senate candidates are counting on this grassroots team, so I hope you'll help make a difference today. Don't let this rare Triple-Impact Match expire before we OFFICIALLY reach this must-hit goal! If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Two reminders from last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Just in case you needed a reminder. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61362590/399838857/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12W_EGR_E_20230405_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTcyNjIyOC0wNGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jb0f8-_VQ59DyVyxF_XenprWm_mUEP68cqfpKJ355kg=&emci=13726228-04d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=15726228-04d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

Just in case you needed a reminder that when we work together, we win together — here are TWO:
1. Brandon Johnson just got elected mayor of Chicago — a major progressive victory against entrenched special interests — even though he got dramatically outspent on TV ads.
2. Judge Janet Protasiewicz just flipped a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court and secured a brand-new majority that’s pro-abortion rights, anti-gerrymandering, and pro-voting rights.

How did these campaigns win? By getting organized at the grassroots level. By making it clear who they were fighting for. By running on popular, urgent, progressive issues, like ensuring access to a great public education for every child in Chicago and protecting the right to an abortion across Wisconsin. I was very happy to fight by their side, and I’m running for re-election to the Senate to keep fighting for big, bold action for working people. [**If you’re ready to keep working together and winning together, and if a donation would make sense for you right now, please chip in $3 or any amount — and help build our grassroots movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61362591/399838858/-226559928?amount=3&refcode=EMZ12W_EGR_E_20230405_V1S2&ms=EMZ12W_EGR_E_20230405_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTcyNjIyOC0wNGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jb0f8-_VQ59DyVyxF_XenprWm_mUEP68cqfpKJ355kg=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3fa0bd6ffad482a994b562cb02394b1&_e=E2DVrUiZlIGpKllVFV4d8G1GzExhRCQU7jaQ8q8GGu9X3BZOYkQzApEnrG3dKKQpZmXMSN6CFvSuLTMXsK9EfkZBDCawgAiBHfxGIUgK1MT0UkFvP08zGv-1fkcbMFdx2_p7W23aBWP2vZAo0bxMv7dL3O_gvzzitPYLWmvwSTrR0PwWmAFXNBp3c9BRJ-9FrXTdefYxXocpsRO5f94rmRg_JoAz5ucZpyge6U7hDRhlZhen-hbMSq7Eo-S4La-QDvXzul1pkMEaM_UNpUb6GQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3fa0bd6ffad482a994b562cb02394b1&_e=E2DVrUiZlIGpKllVFV4d8G1GzExhRCQU7jaQ8q8GGu9X3BZOYkQzApEnrG3dKKQpZmXMSN6CFvSuLTMXsK9EfkZBDCawgAiBHfxGIUgK1MT0UkFvP08zGv-1fkcbMFdxal5D1Z-X6DUTMuKq_a0FYgTCkdMIpUeExfrIUL3RBwY0dDIcLfskQszVQqgLGtNqIkJsSq76vXJLznn0PK3U1UCExPfV83K1opo2N5D0pSCT71MI1aEpRMXfgjHGM0sScnWurBQOPcwUxaXXpDv0dg%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3fa0bd6ffad482a994b562cb02394b1&_e=E2DVrUiZlIGpKllVFV4d8G1GzExhRCQU7jaQ8q8GGu9X3BZOYkQzApEnrG3dKKQpZmXMSN6CFvSuLTMXsK9EfkZBDCawgAiBHfxGIUgK1MT0UkFvP08zGv-1fkcbMFdxJPLgm54ybWlLUhLgaW71MUuEfg63LzHcymDBGaytoDHxk5unXB7ucinjq4tOV3CUeKYqcUVYUJ7Q_zKmUiebbOzwWFufq-fdPyMphp_jrM9pIbkAiZgLiIBuLNf4_sUvdktN0XMi1oJQV2Xoo2ijLg%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3fa0bd6ffad482a994b562cb02394b1&_e=E2DVrUiZlIGpKllVFV4d8G1GzExhRCQU7jaQ8q8GGu9X3BZOYkQzApEnrG3dKKQpZmXMSN6CFvSuLTMXsK9EfkZBDCawgAiBHfxGIUgK1MT0UkFvP08zGv-1fkcbMFdxqWEyxKKUeZ_mxclMUXmyldPTo4lkoX2DYLjy8hSFWiovNROQNcX3g-14qo4oGO7ey5sgWpPzxczYqT8b6iUK7alom9LPxYcxIF6ry9XmpIODakGWzmS5JFwSG543OFru_mVYc0EAx3wh_LTM8MZBpQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: big wins for progressives last night are just the start!

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230405_FR_Midwest_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Midwest&t=1009&akid=4181%2E5885482%2EoRA6xC ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Thanks to your surge of support,
progressives won big last night in Chicago and St. Louis, and we’re just
getting started! City by city, our working class coalition is building
power from the bottom up.

With your help, Our Revolution mobilized our 100,000 members in Chicago to
power Brandon Johnson to victory over rightwing Democrat Paul Vallas in
the Mayor’s race – defeating one of the most entrenched establishment
machines in American politics!

Our organizing work also paid off big in St. Louis last night, electing an
exciting slate that secures progressive control of city government.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8412?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230405_FR_Midwest_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Midwest&t=1010&akid=4181%2E5885482%2EoRA6xC ]These victories prove that when we invest in organizing, there is no
challenge we can’t overcome. Can we count on you to pitch in to help build
on this momentum in upcoming elections in Philadelphia, Houston, and
beyond?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8434?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230405_FR_Midwest_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Midwest&t=1011&akid=4181%2E5885482%2EoRA6xC ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8435?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230405_FR_Midwest_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Midwest&t=1012&akid=4181%2E5885482%2EoRA6xC ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

The victory of Brandon Johnson in Chicago and our progressive trifecta in
St. Louis kicks off our work to build progressive cities across the
country and take back power from the rightwing at every level of
government.

As Our Revolution ally US Rep. Delia Ramirez put it last night, “We built
a multiracial multiethnic working peoples movement and we won.”

These are major wins that show when we organize, we can overpower big
money in politics and reclaim our communities. Local power is where we can
make the most direct impact in people’s lives with investments in
education, jobs, health care, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230405_FR_Midwest_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Midwest&t=1017&akid=4181%2E5885482%2EoRA6xC ]Let’s celebrate these victories and get to work! Please chip in now to
make sure we build on this momentum to win crucial upcoming races in
Houston, Philadelphia, and beyond!

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Maurice Mitchell, Working Families Party
subject: BREAKING: Massive upset in Chicago

body:
This was a testament to the amazing things that working people can accomplish. | | | **Peter — last night, Brandon Johnson overcame a deluge of far-right money and misinformation to be elected the next Mayor of Chicago!** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUZTF46IiBn_ghUGgRBE7Tx9w2pltKXyh_sUgy9e3on28FU3eV02hAuSp8bjtgc7dtRzFg5bE11OYtJ_mqR_Ewgm0nq5uv2g9cWQ0G7q-CIxxCN32-PnsBtaFIWi6Ta4NA0LnX_kAKEoLFBWJx-Abhw52FBf6D8WHNfLIFi_8kHgVIkNzTKbnInrV73ec3LCd3_NU9fP2Q-tMd4KlAAP8e2HkTIEH-Z3xQnnRITKtNT6IbVjjFLF1uVCbQJZq4xFozdZg-VtdJqs2CgpbNAlDdZ4GAzRDOnCuB0cty3Sbt8tvDeuWDsR6khR3F9ourTI-V/3v3/cvamS9NeTyiF0Dv2N6SjNQ/h0/4CTBmR-R37TZOXulXh_4G40WW5V2rOt16ZV-UyjD13A) Back in December, Brandon was polling at around 3%. Now, this boldly progressive former union organizer and teacher is about to be sworn in as the next mayor of the third-largest city in the country. This is a massive upset. It is a rebuke of the right-wing narrative that voters in big cities are supposedly so afraid of each other that they are lurching to the right and seeking safety in discredited “tough on crime” policies of the 80’s and 90’s. **But more than anything, it is a testament to the amazing things that working people can accomplish when we come together across our differences behind a positive vision for safe and thriving communities.** All of us at the Working Families Party have never been more proud to stand with Brandon, or with our local partners at United Working Families in Illinois. They have been organizing for years and years to make this moment possible. Now comes the hard part. We need to keep building a Chicago for the many, with strong schools, good jobs, and safe communities. And we need to double down on the organizing that will let us replicate wins like this across the country, in every kind of community. [**If you’re as inspired by last night as I am, please make a split contribution today to United Working Families and WFP. We’re building the kind of ambitious year-round progressive infrastructure that makes victories like this possible — even when all the pundits say it’s impossible — and I know we’ve only just scratched the surface of what we can accomplish together.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUZTF46IiBn_ghUGgRBE7Tx9w2pltKXyh_sUgy9e3on28FU3eV02hAuSp8bjtgc7dtl3fP9ENU0z2v5ij6NqRdXrDZY0kMnW1NHdh_DZzKe752uf2c1anvHk94qL3fCY8djaiBHw6dSYiEcrWBTMPGJIlVDcuuE1WXMq1wONz2ACKCupyyLhERQ_zW9PVWkf3yumzFFwLLwdXQ8lBFfJWUknpDdyTlHn4bsARq30QrQHS-ubrbARCWhxW3354sgdbpBlvcfDqNSSdgk1jQ-HEudUn6FlEkzKJEUPLl3JOXHUdi22-dpKptZAk1K7Bnde2c/3v3/cvamS9NeTyiF0Dv2N6SjNQ/h1/hqlzNq6d769LcvyFrYQpdm1QdFChPYdVmdKJRRNIIOo) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUZTF46IiBn_ghUGgRBE7Tx9w2pltKXyh_sUgy9e3on28FU3eV02hAuSp8bjtgc7dtMrIm3FaKqWhFqVQxuJDlLTUcxLTW4_iCZleJc_Bn0RRTBXCNPrnKVXY2SieQGP9tlLUSz4sgMeEyctguWNXLPUm4mYW31hw3nD7c7GuLflaH5OkuL7ASI2-gxwdCr1XpIRPNI0yjI6Mw1kf9WOuLm_2jPMnLepSr_GLJoz8XEb9Tki6oNVu1VqQwEBIcHxp_CXQGgQpJaw1W2CZMnL1lnm5X6obph3q66tCqCH_ha8agFO9QejLhmWMawaya7mWn/3v3/cvamS9NeTyiF0Dv2N6SjNQ/h2/YsgXrzDfn1o8dyNZwec94XnNIMJmMatKTm0ryRo5g8c)** Of course, Brandon’s victory wasn’t the only big one for working people last night:
* In Wisconsin, WI WFP-endorsed Judge Janet Protasiewicz handily defeated her right-wing extremist opponent to win a critical seat on the state Supreme Court. She will now be the deciding vote on the court, which could play a pivotal role in protecting abortion rights and the 2024 presidential election,
* Elsewhere in Chicago, UWF champions Angela Clay, Desmon Yancy, and Will Hall are projected to win their races for City Council, which combined with wins in February for Jessie Fuentes and Julia Ramirez, mean that the UWF-aligned bloc will be larger than ever before,
* And while ballots are still being counted in Denver’s municipal elections, Colorado WFP-endorsed candidates including Shontel Lewis appear in good shape to make it to a June runoff.

These kinds of nights don’t happen by accident. They are the result of months of focused voter turnout efforts and years of day-in, day-out organizing in communities to expand people’s notions of what is possible in our politics. **And all of it is only possible because of grassroots supporters like you, Peter.** That’s the work we are committed to at the Working Families Party. And I don’t know about you, but nights like last night only make me want to redouble that commitment. [**If you’re feeling the same way, split a contribution to United Working Families and WFP today so we can keep building a Chicago for the many — and replicate victories like these in elections this year across the country.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUZTF46IiBn_ghUGgRBE7Tx9w2pltKXyh_sUgy9e3on28FU3eV02hAuSp8bjtgc7dtzxlEkDerGJvoFDlsP7ckb6Dzn_kyrthABTSdd3SK3HjfqcDUKXnn-2WX9UCRMR4TdZqtGTw9CPaBUFakpwqMSHf7IFS7bF6ABqJIvjYCfbJVZNexgChuYDEbFIRlLYiKI0LNTz4kadmKa6G1z2de27bGfiwlXltDoh9eUhyOzyN3pEYgPA4mA6-LtyZLnefyCf2TUZ9GGu0j5Znet5uIFNgsiOSPM9RD_78KQUFgNb3-f6pKZ1eKrwBggQQU8e9Q/3v3/cvamS9NeTyiF0Dv2N6SjNQ/h3/zG0Q-pgRXGaICfMTQp8E2LoLxgl0refeqZnXYI6MDGI) In solidarity, always, Maurice Mitchell
National Director

Back in December, Brandon was polling at around 3%. Now, this boldly progressive former union organizer and teacher is about to be sworn in as the next mayor of the third-largest city in the country. This is a massive upset. It is a rebuke of the right-wing narrative that voters in big cities are supposedly so afraid of each other that they are lurching to the right and seeking safety in discredited “tough on crime” policies of the 80’s and 90’s. But more than anything, it is a testament to the amazing things that working people can accomplish when we come together across our differences behind a positive vision for safe and thriving communities. All of us at the Working Families Party have never been more proud to stand with Brandon, or with our local partners at United Working Families in Illinois. They have been organizing for years and years to make this moment possible. Now comes the hard part. We need to keep building a Chicago for the many, with strong schools, good jobs, and safe communities. And we need to double down on the organizing that will let us replicate wins like this across the country, in every kind of community. Of course, Brandon’s victory wasn’t the only big one for working people last night: In Wisconsin, WI WFP-endorsed Judge Janet Protasiewicz handily defeated her right-wing extremist opponent to win a critical seat on the state Supreme Court. She will now be the deciding vote on the court, which could play a pivotal role in protecting abortion rights and the 2024 presidential election, Elsewhere in Chicago, UWF champions Angela Clay, Desmon Yancy, and Will Hall are projected to win their races for City Council, which combined with wins in February for Jessie Fuentes and Julia Ramirez, mean that the UWF-aligned bloc will be larger than ever before, And while ballots are still being counted in Denver’s municipal elections, Colorado WFP-endorsed candidates including Shontel Lewis appear in good shape to make it to a June runoff. These kinds of nights don’t happen by accident. They are the result of months of focused voter turnout efforts and years of day-in, day-out organizing in communities to expand people’s notions of what is possible in our politics. And all of it is only possible because of grassroots supporters like you, Peter. That’s the work we are committed to at the Working Families Party. And I don’t know about you, but nights like last night only make me want to redouble that commitment. In solidarity, always, Maurice Mitchell National Director Working Families Party P.S. name: Team Nikki
subject: Nikki is making it happen in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress
body:
Team, Nikki’s only been a member of Congress for a few months now, but she’s already getting down to work to deliver results for our district.

Nikki just introduced the Leveraging and Energizing America’s Apprenticeship Programs (LEAP) Act, which would provide more opportunities for folks seeking jobs by supporting apprenticeship and pre-apprenticeship programs.

This bipartisan legislation will be a huge win for both employees and employers, and Nikki’s leading the charge to make it happen. Can you support her fight in the House for workers by chipping in $10} today?

CHIP IN » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PT&amount=10

We already knew that Nikki is a champion for working families, and now she’s fighting for workers across the country. She’s continuing to create more avenues to success in the job market for workers, just like she always has.

We’re proud to stand with Nikki in her introduction of her first piece of legislation in Congress. This is a huge step, but she’s just getting started when it comes to tackling the challenges Illinoisans face. Can Nikki count on you to stand with her by contributing $10 or whatever you’re able to now? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PT&amount=10

- Team Nikki

--

Paid for by Nikki For Congress

Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

clean_body: Team, Nikki’s only been a member of Congress for a few months now, but she’s already getting down to work to deliver results for our district. Nikki just introduced the Leveraging and Energizing America’s Apprenticeship Programs (LEAP) Act, which would provide more opportunities for folks seeking jobs by supporting apprenticeship and pre-apprenticeship programs. This bipartisan legislation will be a huge win for both employees and employers, and Nikki’s leading the charge to make it happen. Can you support her fight in the House for workers by chipping in $10} today? CHIP IN » We already knew that Nikki is a champion for working families, and now she’s fighting for workers across the country. She’s continuing to create more avenues to success in the job market for workers, just like she always has. We’re proud to stand with Nikki in her introduction of her first piece of legislation in Congress. This is a huge step, but she’s just getting started when it comes to tackling the challenges Illinoisans face. Can Nikki count on you to stand with her by contributing $10 or whatever you’re able to now? - Team Nikki -- Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Peter, this is important:

This Mississippi governor election is going to come down to the wire. Every move we make counts, and one mistake could derail everything.

That's why we’re reaching out.

We could really use your input as one of our most informed supporters. We're making some big decisions on how to invest our resources to ensure that Brandon reaches as many Mississippi voters as possible. We need your thoughts as we make these difficult calls.

[Peter, do you have two minutes to complete our exclusive campaign strategy survey before the end of today? It would mean the world to Brandon to receive your input directly >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61326130/399811958/-124557100?refcode=ea.ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E2ZDhiMjctZTZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t83ozl7VoVZ9S43DASwxuuoBReYCCh0_pxhGiMyoimE=&emci=aff4c821-c1d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782) | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61326131/399811959/-124557100?refcode=ea.ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E2ZDhiMjctZTZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t83ozl7VoVZ9S43DASwxuuoBReYCCh0_pxhGiMyoimE=&emci=aff4c821-c1d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782)**

This isn’t just another governor election. This is an opportunity for Mississippi to say goodbye to Tate Reeves, a self-serving leader who’s put the good people of our state through the wringer.

It’s been nearly four years of never-ending corruption scandals, backward leadership, and abandonment. We need change.

The only way Brandon can defeat Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward is if we work together to pull off an upset win in November. That’s why we want to get your input on our messaging and outreach strategies.

We’re a team, Peter. So we need to make sure we’re on the same page – especially as we head into our very first public filing deadline at the end of the month. [So before the end of today, would you be able to take our strategy survey to help Brandon win big?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61326132/399811961/-124557100?refcode=ea.ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E2ZDhiMjctZTZkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t83ozl7VoVZ9S43DASwxuuoBReYCCh0_pxhGiMyoimE=&emci=aff4c821-c1d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ca6d8b27-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782)

Now, _The Cook Political Report_ has labeled both races as toss ups for 2024. With our help, these pro-choice champions can HOLD their seats, but the work starts _now_.

**Donate today to support women like Yadira and Marie facing tough reelection fights this cycle:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61326369/399812433/541775293?sourceid=1048865&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjI0MGVkOS1lNmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuZF7996wvyB3VE9UIaOQZmmvWXOCDM8ys1VjV2M4_w=&emci=85a8f7e3-d9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=02240ed9-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

With House gavel in hand and a five-seat advantage, Speaker McCarthy and anti-choice Republican representatives have continued their work to restrict abortion access nationwide. In this post-_Roe v. Wade_ political landscape, one thing has never been clearer: **flipping the House and restoring our Democratic majority is _essential_.**

Last cycle, Reps. Yadira Caraveo (CO-08) and Marie Gluesenkamp Perez's (WA-03) victories kept Republicans' seat advantage slim — but both were won by _less than a single point_. Not surprisingly, _The Cook Political Report_ has already rated both of their reelection races as _toss ups_.

[**Peter, this is an all-hands-on-deck scenario. Donate now to support the Democratic pro-choice women who can protect *vital* seats in our fight to FLIP the House.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61326373/399812436/541775293?sourceid=1048865&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjI0MGVkOS1lNmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuZF7996wvyB3VE9UIaOQZmmvWXOCDM8ys1VjV2M4_w=&emci=85a8f7e3-d9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=02240ed9-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

Democratic pro-choice women are the reason we overcame last cycle's predicted red wave and ensured Republican's majority in the House was _razor-thin_.

For example, Rep. **Yadira Caraveo** ran and won Colorado's newly drawn 8th Congressional District — a race the GOP's House fundraising arm spent _millions_ trying to gain. And in Washington State, Rep. **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez's (WA-03)** victory came as a shock to pundits who predicted her anti-choice extremist opponent winning by a landslide.

Both of these victories were close calls, Peter, and _The Cook Political Report_ has already rated each as toss ups going into the 2023-2024 cycle. We know Republicans have their sights set on flipping these seats, and we can't cede a single inch in the early days of these races. ****That means our work begins _now_. Donate to help women like Yadira and Marie facing tough fights in the battle to take back the House from anti-choice Republicans this cycle:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61326400/399812464/541775293?sourceid=1048865&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjI0MGVkOS1lNmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuZF7996wvyB3VE9UIaOQZmmvWXOCDM8ys1VjV2M4_w=&emci=85a8f7e3-d9d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=02240ed9-e6d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

### We are excited to announce the launch of the 11th state Freedom Caucus.
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/810494a9-29af-44e2-b8d4-83df0f2d564a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---
Friends,
We are incredibly excited to announce the launch of the Louisiana Freedom Caucus. Baton Rouge is the 11th state capital in America with a Freedom Caucus operating under the State Freedom Caucus Network.
There are a lot of liberals pretending to be conservatives in the Pelican State who are actively stopping conservatives from winning on issues such as school choice, election integrity, protecting our children, and fighting back against wokeness.
The newly formed LAFC will set out to change that.
Connie Hair will serve as our State Director in Louisiana. Connie has been working in politics and media for her entire adult life. She has worked on campaigns for Governors, U.S. Senators, Congressmen, and Presidents in capacities ranging from volunteer door knocker to campaign manager.
Connie has also worked for three members of Congress and a United States Senator as a speechwriter, a communications director, and spent 12 years as Texas Rep. Louie Gohmert's Chief of Staff.
She now heads back to her home state of Louisiana to lead the LAFC.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26e91b0f-19fa-45c8-94c5-44341374e6ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The founding officers of the Louisiana Freedom Caucus will include Rep. Alan Seabaugh as Chairman, Rep. Larry Frieman as Vice Chairman, and Rep. Beryl Amedee as Secretary-Treasurer.
[Louisiana Freedom Caucus @LAFreedomCaucusThe Louisiana Freedom Caucus is excited to announce the election of its founding officers: Chairman: Rep. Alan Seabaugh. Vice Chairman: Rep. Larry Frieman Secretary-Treasurer: Rep. Beryl Amedee #lalege ](https://substack.com/redirect/dc8c87c1-5d17-4506-9f3a-2ec4222eadeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[5:23 PM ∙ Apr 5, 2023
* * *
10Likes5Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/dc8c87c1-5d17-4506-9f3a-2ec4222eadeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Louisiana Congressman Clay Higgins, a member of the House Freedom Caucus, also gave his endorsement to the newly-formed LAFC saying, "As a core member of the House Freedom Caucus, I fully support this effort to bring principled, Constitutionalist leadership to Louisiana's State Legislature."
You can follow the new caucus on [Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/35db7282-fc29-42d4-b682-3d6ba08bfad5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Facebook](https://substack.com/redirect/94abd0b4-1a60-4ee0-8870-32c2a2647f8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and read their full press release here.

Baton Rouge is the 11th state capital in America with a Freedom Caucus operating under the State Freedom Caucus Network. There are a lot of liberals pretending to be conservatives in the Pelican State who are actively stopping conservatives from winning on issues such as school choice, election integrity, protecting our children, and fighting back against wokeness. The newly formed LAFC will set out to change that. Connie Hair will serve as our State Director in Louisiana. Connie has been working in politics and media for her entire adult life. She has worked on campaigns for Governors, U.S. Senators, Congressmen, and Presidents in capacities ranging from volunteer door knocker to campaign manager. Connie has also worked for three members of Congress and a United States Senator as a speechwriter, a communications director, and spent 12 years as Texas Rep. Louie Gohmert's Chief of Staff. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Join the VP Today!
body:
The Vice President will be reflecting on her historic trip to the continent of Africa. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,
We hope that you are having a wonderful start to your Spring! As the flowers bloom, and the days get longer, we invite you to spend a bit of your time with us. There is a lot to celebrate, from the Vice President returning from her historic trip to Africa to the start of Arab American History Month. Today at 4:15 PM, please join the Vice President on a call where she will reflect on her recent trip. This conversation will be co-moderated by author Jessica Nabongo and director of the NMAAHC Kevin Young. Thank you all so much for your help and support.
Best,
Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
|
---
| **Vice President Harris Reflects on Historic Trip to the Continent of Africa** **Today, Wednesday, April 5 at 4:15 PM,** the Vice President will participate in a moderated conversation reflecting on her historic trip to the continent of Africa at the National Museum of African American History and Culture (NMAAHC). This conversation will be co-moderated by author Jessica Nabongo and director of the NMAAHC Kevin Young. To view the livestream, please go to [WhiteHouse.gov/live.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7f6495865b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| [WATCH HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=673fb62980&e=d6c5c7d7ec "WATCH HERE")
---
| Last week, Vice President Harris concluded a historic visit to Ghana, Tanzania, and Zambia, where she outlined how opportunity and innovation on the African continent will shape the future of the world and strengthen U.S. partnerships and alliances. In Ghana, the Vice President [delivered a speech](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=31c0020f72&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to thousands of young Ghanaians about the exciting future of Africa, [reflected on](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d90204c8e7&e=d6c5c7d7ec) the brutal legacy of slavery at Cape Coast Castle, and highlighted the creative spirit of [young artists](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=95997a2890&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [women entrepreneurs](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=eea948bafe&e=d6c5c7d7ec). In Tanzania, she held a [bilateral meeting](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ab9f8480f9&e=d6c5c7d7ec) with President Samia Suluhu Hassan, participated in a wreath-laying ceremony at the National Museum and U.S. Embassy Bombing Memorial, and met with entrepreneurs at the SNDBX Co-Working Space. In Zambia, Vice President Harris held a [bilateral meeting](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=341aebe860&e=d6c5c7d7ec) with President Hakainde Hichilema, met with the Speaker of the National Assembly, Nelly Mutti, and visited the location that records indicate is the former residence of her grandparents. On her final day on the continent, she highlighted the importance of climate-smart agriculture and climate resilience at [Panuka Farm](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d24d995efd&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and convened business and philanthropic leaders to [discuss digital inclusion](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=30bfba0d2f&e=d6c5c7d7ec). During the trip, Vice President Harris announced [more than $1 billion](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8eb2401d4e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in private sector commitments to empower women across the continent, and [more than $7 billion](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=00fc590b19&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in private sector commitments that will support climate resilience, adaptation, and mitigation across Africa.
---
|
---
|
---
| **In Defense of Public Education** Yesterday, AFT President Randi Weingarten delivered a major speech, In Defense of Public Education. In her speech, AFT President Randi Weingarten expanded on four key points to help public education address the needs of all students and overcome learning loss: **students learn by doing; the revival and restoration of the teaching profession; addressing shortages; and deeper partnerships with parents and the community. ** **There is no upside to school vouchers.** They drain money from public schools and most of the schools who receive funds are not required to follow most civil rights laws protecting LGBTQ and students with disabilities. The voucher program Ron DeSantis is pushing would divert $4 Billion from public schools. The state is already 44th in per pupil spending and 48th in teacher salaries. DeSantis is sending taxpayers’ dollars in the wrong direction. **In a time when our public schools and the educators who work in them are under repeated political attack, our students and families need support and solutions, not divisive political rhetoric.** We’re all concerned about learning loss and students who are struggling, and we have clear ideas on how to fix it, strengthen it, and help transform children’s lives. Working together, teachers, parents and administrators continue to do the work daily to help kids succeed and overcome the last few years, both in school and beyond. And while opponents are quick to ban books, censor curriculum and demonize teachers and school staff, voters are very clear: they want us to prioritize what kids need, not the culture wars that are designed to create animosity and tear communities apart. Below is a toolkit that includes sample social media content, graphics, email language and other resources that culls out the main themes of the speech, as well as examples to help you highlight the ideas the speech proposes. Please help us amplify on social media by following @AFTunion and @rweingarten on Twitter using the hashtag #WhatKidsNeed. And please find the toolkit here: [http://Go.AFT.org/SpeechToolkit](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=589fa711f4&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
---
|
---
|
---
| **Arab American Heritage Month** _In celebration of Arab American Heritage Month, DNC Chair Jaime Harrison and DNC Ethnic Council Chair James Zogby released the following statement:_ “This Arab American Heritage Month, we celebrate the culture, contributions, and achievements of Arab Americans across our country. This vibrant and diverse community, with roots in 22 countries in the Middle East and North Africa and numerous cultural and religious traditions, represents the best of who we are. President Biden understands that, and it is why the Biden-Harris administration recognized April as National Arab American Heritage Month for the first time nationally in 2021. On behalf of the Democratic Party, we’re proud to celebrate and support Arab Americans for the tremendous impact they have on our party and country.”
---
| [Statement Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ade22cb173&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Statement Here")
---
|
---
| **Recap of Events** **March 29th - Women of Color Stakeholders Call:** In celebration of Women’s History Month, the DNC hosted a call on the importance of uplifting women of color in the political and advocacy movement last week. The call was moderated by the DNC’s Deputy Executive Director Monica Gardiola and joined by other incredible leaders across the movement, including Minnesota Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, NARAL Pro-Choice America President Mini Timmaraju and Founder of #WinWithBlackWomen Jotaka Eaddy. **March 31st - Trans Day of Visibility Event:** In celebration of the International Trans Day of Visibility, the DNC hosted a panel on the importance of uplifting the trans and non-binary community. The call included DNC Chair Jaime Harrison, as well as movement leaders Charlotte Clymer, Josie Caballero, Vivian Topping, Evan Minton, and Marisa Richmond.

The DNC also issued the following statement on Transgender Day of Visibility:
---
| [Statement Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9804eca489&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Statement Here")
---
| | | _Copyright © 2023 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=daaa845390) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=daaa845390).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)
---

Friend, Yesterday, twice-impeached former President Donald Trump faced 34 felony criminal charges around his illegal attempts to pay hush money to women (and cover it up) during his 2016 campaign. **History will remember Donald Trump not only as the first president to be impeached twice, but the first president to be charged with a crime.** **Because of Rashida Tlaib’s unwavering leadership and commitment to this accountability early on, Trump didn’t get away with his lawlessness, and she made sure of that. She led the fight to impeach Trump in the House, and succeeded—twice.** [**Chip in what you can today so we can keep holding Trump, his enablers, and other fascist policymakers accountable. Together, we can secure justice for all.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wM2n0g3DL_Pr8JmdRUBx4mwEygjSLjGovt8hMpVoe4O1Soezy-uBVFuCYmTDlDeLidQN89BM_OJowPdxT670FbtmqiOg3JQSUPY_7jZUls4R8DeFlCNt7YT-4Knyoy16tza5fCXnJJE0AxDHQGGDjeGFc2aw_f8ppXeo_DFWnxphZPSwZDqnsdBO1N-0ZjZnzhSyv9UVMYrBaSO3P4xm5joDUgQeJIMOZgTMJV-SjNVWgJ9yVSR-GgScnc31NOqKxEjcm99rVz0ccnW24Yo92MwNwASVgnqiKQhPy-Lnca1Q/3v3/ozZo7NqxQPSk68zQdC94PA/h1/oa13qsG5J8y2M2NLyFwOwvISCyB0YCL4F6y-fA_o2h0) In 2016, in response to Trump’s proposed Muslim ban, Rashida protested at his speech at the Detroit Economic Club, demanding he read the Constitution and noting that his plans for a Muslim ban were unconstitutional. In 2019, in her first months in Congress, she introduced a resolution to impeach Donald Trump. Even though Trump consistently proved that he was a lawless president and unfit for public office, Democratic leaders told us it was politically impossible to impeach him. They didn’t want to risk the potential blowback. But Rashida kept fighting, working alongside grassroots movements to shift what was possible in order to do what was right. **Despite right-wing hate and threats from Trump, Rashida did not give up. Together, we followed through on that promise to impeach the corrupt and treasonous former president. Twice.** **The fight for accountability is not over: This trial and other criminal investigations will continue over the next year. The violence, destruction, and oppression of Trumpism will not end until we as a country do the hard work of reckoning with white supremacy and finally building a government that serves all of us.
It wasn’t just Trump who spent months spreading vile lies about the election he lost, attempting to disenfranchise Black voters in particular. More than 150 congressional Republicans attempted to overturn the results of 2020’s legitimate election.
And now, even more right-wing state lawmakers (including another fascist Republican presidential candidate) are rapidly translating hateful rhetoric into local policy — banning books and undermining our rights to bodily autonomy, voting, gender expression, and more.
