clean_body: History will remember Donald Trump not only as the first president to be impeached twice, but the first president to be charged with a crime. | | | Friend, Yesterday, twice-impeached former President Donald Trump faced 34 felony criminal charges around his illegal attempts to pay hush money to women (and cover it up) during his 2016 campaign. History will remember Donald Trump not only as the first president to be impeached twice, but the first president to be charged with a crime. Because of Rashida Tlaib’s unwavering leadership and commitment to this accountability early on, Trump didn’t get away with his lawlessness, and she made sure of that. She led the fight to impeach Trump in the House, and succeeded—twice. In 2016, in response to Trump’s proposed Muslim ban, Rashida protested at his speech at the Detroit Economic Club, demanding he read the Constitution and noting that his plans for a Muslim ban were unconstitutional. In 2019, in her first months in Congress, she introduced a resolution to impeach Donald Trump. Even though Trump consistently proved that he was a lawless president and unfit for public office, Democratic leaders told us it was politically impossible to impeach him. They didn’t want to risk the potential blowback. But Rashida kept fighting, working alongside grassroots movements to shift what was possible in order to do what was right. Despite right-wing hate and threats from Trump, Rashida did not give up. Together, we followed through on that promise to impeach the corrupt and treasonous former president. Twice. The fight for accountability is not over: This trial and other criminal investigations will continue over the next year. Trump must also be held to account for conspiring to overturn an election, inciting a fascist insurrection, and fueling white supremacist violence. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The violence, destruction, and oppression of Trumpism will not end until we as a country do the hard work of reckoning with white supremacy and finally building a government that serves all of us. It wasn’t just Trump who spent months spreading vile lies about the election he lost, attempting to disenfranchise Black voters in particular. More than 150 congressional Republicans attempted to overturn the results of 2020’s legitimate election. And now, even more right-wing state lawmakers (including another fascist Republican presidential candidate) are rapidly translating hateful rhetoric into local policy — banning books and undermining our rights to bodily autonomy, voting, gender expression, and more. We’re watching them follow the fascist playbook, which means our work is even more urgent. Thank you, Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Replace Sinema
subject: FW: Add your name in support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
Honoring all that Cesar Chavez achieved | |
---
Peter – did you catch our request last week? We’re gathering signatures to tell Congress to pass **_the PRO Act_** to **protect and expand workers’ rights**. Kyrsten Sinema has been one of the main obstacles to passing this important legislation. If you haven’t added your name yet, there’s still time!**[Please sign the petition and share with a friend if you can >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlyXI0yZnO32zZrZ1l9vR8WRPZr0IIB7JRspN7WXVgBlqPeSOqR3nX24RXZlkDr1bFx_BCLZaoMsNb2eE_sl6448gbm1g3QTjqL6Cz7RT_0GR-5ljKdFvU7LVNJ0zkdwgidPVSDy1k8mtaVE8jwt2xaJ7b-Gopw1VE7Xg7LyLRG_YqoltgZ1p06a-8uxoAqhpguoGZ5RiapXioLwQ5YG44KoU2f595_XubqE3ibQm0op5KaTYTbeGbBUjioXSSFkto/3v3/eVsGgOHuSealqAFYxhQuOA/h0/wno3B3-GDVorE-3gUtGSyJ61Xd8qQvTs-GhQXLNryGg)** We appreciate you taking the time to fight for workers rights, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 **—PREVIOUS EMAIL—
**
Peter – Today we honor the life and legacy of Arizona-born civil rights leader and labor icon Cesar Chavez. Chavez was a leader and tireless champion of the United Farm Workers. He believed nonviolent, collective organizing was the way to fight for bargaining rights, a minimum wage, and justice in the workplace. His belief in the dignity of labor and all the rights that come with it continue to influence leaders worldwide. On this Cesar Chavez Day, we’re **calling on Congress to protect and expand workers’ rights** to organize and bargain collectively by passing**the**** _PRO Act_****.** This is the cause Cesar worked tirelessly for – to protect working families from the rich and powerful that would rather sell them out and bleed them dry. We deserve better,[**add your name here to tell Congress to pass the Pro Act >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlyXI0yZnO32zZrZ1l9vR8WRPZr0IIB7JRspN7WXVgBlqPeSOqR3nX24RXZlkDr1bGJHck2jQi8L44S24x3qrxMVMM4n9MS79o5Yd11z2yskUy0fzy6hiKBMrn3ukNVIYv7OH4UfysMy8TzaB6jBsT_1jbYNMYbSBJnhmrxkpdVIlTVQmHL98EahA6WQzETBdwOgo5RXtgDVg7nzy6QUqDPjOYmEm4kUgFFdhGM-cPCHyfKkb7j7d_XwY-ot59zr00/3v3/eVsGgOHuSealqAFYxhQuOA/h1/Ac6hD0JN1Nxb5objhyF0IYR2sDPcqMW3m0-3RO4_DHc) Of course Kyrsten Sinema took to Twitter to send out a commemorative tweet. It is classic Sinema to exploit the legacy of Cesar Chavez while failing to live up to it – she must have forgotten voting thumbs down for a $15 minimum wage and preserving a tax loophole to save Wall Street billions of dollars. Every single day that Sinema puts corporate interests ahead of working people, she disgraces the legacy that Cesar Chavez built. Sinema could actually protect working families from the rich and powerful, but instead she sold out to private interests. Chavez was right–**organizing together is the best way to enact change.** That’s why we’re so grateful to have you on board to help us secure honest, trustworthy leadership for Arizona. Together we will replace Sinema with someone on the side of working people, not corporate interests. Happy Cesar Chavez Day! -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: where my story began
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327119/399814323/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFiM2NhYy1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3l6VK5RgUE16ZV8BDPkTpsoEGPhSiUflI3VdrPCUtiw=&emci=e9ab3cac-e8d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f2ab3cac-e8d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
I just launched my first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate here in Nevada – and I couldn’t be more grateful for the outpouring of support from people like you. **As we kick things off, I want to share a bit more about why I’m in this fight.** It really comes down to where my story began: in a working-class family, as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. At a young age, my loved ones instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I’ve carried them with me throughout my entire life. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327123/399814324/-982647225?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFiM2NhYy1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3l6VK5RgUE16ZV8BDPkTpsoEGPhSiUflI3VdrPCUtiw=) These values drove me to become the first in my family to graduate from college – working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace and taking out student loans to cover the cost. They drove me while I worked as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field – seeing inequality in our workforce firsthand. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327125/399814325/-982647225?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFiM2NhYy1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3l6VK5RgUE16ZV8BDPkTpsoEGPhSiUflI3VdrPCUtiw=) And they drove me during my first Senate race when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds to become only the second woman senator in Nevada's history. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327128/399814326/-982647225?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFiM2NhYy1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3l6VK5RgUE16ZV8BDPkTpsoEGPhSiUflI3VdrPCUtiw=) To this day, my path is lit by these guiding lights. They fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans, no matter who you are or where you come from. **But right now,_The Washington Post_ is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. That’s why the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat.** I simply can’t fight back and defend my battleground seat without your critical grassroots support. **That’s why I have to ask:[Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Martin Heinrich’s now – before our crucial midnight deadline – to become one of the essential Reelection Founding Donors we need to win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327131/399814327/-982647225?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFiM2NhYy1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3l6VK5RgUE16ZV8BDPkTpsoEGPhSiUflI3VdrPCUtiw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Jacky Rosen and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61327135/399814328/-982647225?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFiM2NhYy1lOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3l6VK5RgUE16ZV8BDPkTpsoEGPhSiUflI3VdrPCUtiw=)

I’m excited to share that I'm on Jane’s new game show, “Hot enough for you?” as this week’s special guest!

| Hey there, it’s Bradley Whitford, and I have a special announcement!

I’m excited to share that I'm on Jane’s new game show, **“Hot enough for you?”** as this week’s special guest!

Jane tests me on my pop culture knowledge and, most importantly, the biggest issue facing every generation – climate change.

**Our leaders have, time and again, voted to undermine the climate movement.** From voting to lifting the ban on exporting crude oil to the recent approval of the oil drilling project in Alaska. Big oil has been lining the pockets of our politicians to favor the fossil fuel industry for decades.

**The clock is ticking to take climate action, but the good news is we still have an opportunity to act.** We need to rally against the fossil fuel industry to end their generations-long stranglehold on our government and eliminate their influence on our political system.

My good friend Jane and the incredible team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC are hard at work supporting climate champions with a proven record of climate action, _**but they can’t do it alone.**_

It takes all of us to build grassroots strength and demand immediate climate action. [_**Her team is trying to get 100 grassroots contributions before midnight. clean_body: I’m excited to share that I'm on Jane’s new game show, “Hot enough for you?” as this week’s special guest! | Hey there, it’s Bradley Whitford, and I have a special announcement! I’m excited to share that I'm on Jane’s new game show, “Hot enough for you?” as this week’s special guest! Jane tests me on my pop culture knowledge and, most importantly, the biggest issue facing every generation – climate change. = | = Our leaders have, time and again, voted to undermine the climate movement. From voting to lifting the ban on exporting crude oil to the recent approval of the oil drilling project in Alaska. Big oil has been lining the pockets of our politicians to favor the fossil fuel industry for decades. The clock is ticking to take climate action, but the good news is we still have an opportunity to act. We need to rally against the fossil fuel industry to end their generations-long stranglehold on our government and eliminate their influence on our political system. My good friend Jane and the incredible team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC are hard at work supporting climate champions with a proven record of climate action, but they can’t do it alone. It takes all of us to build grassroots strength and demand immediate climate action. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Together, we can demand action. Thanks everyone, Bradley Whitford = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: Will you add your name to support extreme risk protection orders?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Extreme risk protection orders—aka red flag laws—save lives.
Extreme risk laws are key in helping to keep guns out of the hands of people who pose a danger to themselves or others. Family members or law enforcement petition a court to temporarily remove firearms when there are immediate signs of violence.
[**Will you add your name today to show your support for extreme risk laws? It’s a simple action, but it shows that we have a strong coalition of supporters who are willing to take a stand to keep our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_erpopet_apr23/?source=em230405-1-30&refcode2=4880.3935704.BLCDlN&akid=4880%2E3935704%2EBLCDlN)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_erpopet_apr23/?source=em230405-1-30&refcode2=4880.3935704.BLCDlN&akid=4880%2E3935704%2EBLCDlN)**
The perpetrator of the Nashville shooting was able to obtain seven guns from five local stores within a short period of time, even though the shooter’s parents thought their child shouldn’t have access to firearms.
In this situation, extreme risk protection orders could have made a difference.
After the passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, we worked to secure funding to help states build out their extreme risk protection order programs. Now it’s up to us to make sure states are actually implementing extreme risk programs.
[**So please, add your name today to join us in calling on states to take action and build robust extreme risk protection order programs.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_erpopet_apr23/?source=em230405-1-30&refcode2=4880.3935704.BLCDlN&akid=4880%2E3935704%2EBLCDlN)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_erpopet_apr23/?source=em230405-1-30&refcode2=4880.3935704.BLCDlN&akid=4880%2E3935704%2EBLCDlN)**
Thank you for taking the time to use your voice,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=4880%2E3935704%2EBLCDlN) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Beshear
subject: We finally legalized medical cannabis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Andy's administration is creating lasting change for millions. Peter,

Last year, Andy signed an executive order decriminalizing medical cannabis for certain conditions and helping those suffering to get the aid they need. **And now, he's signed medical cannabis legalization into law!**

Kentuckians with cancer, epilepsy, MS, PTSD, and other debilitating conditions deserve access to pain-reducing and potentially life-saving medication.

An overwhelming amount of Kentuckians — 90%! — support legalized medical cannabis. Andy is proud to have taken this step to improve the lives of millions of Kentuckians. This was a big victory, but we know there is more work to do in the years ahead to move our Commonwealth forward.

**Peter, Andy is up against 12 Republican opponents and millions of dollars in spending from their campaigns and outside groups. To win this race in November and keep making progress for Kentucky, we're going to need your help.[Will you chip in right away and help re-elect Andy for a second term and move our state forward? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61330016/399815883/-428057120?refcode=em23_230405_cnnbis_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230405_cnnbis_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4a9d6b17-ebd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTlkNmIxNy1lYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpR3UAf3ndZgbh5atrRInWRW6yZJbQgRX_oW-5Ve8lM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61330017/399815884/-428057120?refcode=em23_230405_cnnbis_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230405_cnnbis_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4a9d6b17-ebd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTlkNmIxNy1lYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpR3UAf3ndZgbh5atrRInWRW6yZJbQgRX_oW-5Ve8lM=)

name: American Briefing
subject: BREAKING: Robert F Kennedy Jr. registers to run for president as Democrat
body:
And Florida Senate Passes Six-Week Abortion Ban, Heads To Gov. DeSantis' Desk

And Florida Senate Passes Six-Week Abortion Ban, Heads To Gov. DeSantis' Desk
| | |

subject: Oh no...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

It's Speaker Kevin McCarthy, and I have an urgent update for you that has me nervous...

I just got word that the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee has already begun attacking Rep. Derrick Van Orden in the press and online. **If the attacks have started already, you can be sure the money will follow. **

**[That's why I'm reaching out. If the Democrats are starting now, then that makes me nervous. I'm launching a Rapid Response Fund to fight the lies the Democrats are spreading, and we need 500 donors before Midnight to hit our goal!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524888:J1JeIFGNi:m:1:3331421248:C31467B674F7435F1D7FB08FE25D64A9:r "That’s why
I’m reaching out, Peter. If the Democrats are starting now, then that makes me nervous. I’m launching an emergency Rapid Response Fund
to fight the lies the Democrats are spreading, and we need 500 donors before Midnight to hit our goal!")**

THE RAPID RESPONSE FUND")
---
Rep. Van Orden has only been in Congress for a couple of months, and I've already been able to see what a strong conservative he is going to be. He's a former Navy SEAL who doesn't accept "because that's how it's been done before" as an answer. He's here to change the status quo and fight for you - _that 's why the Democrats are chomping at the bit to defeat him._

**We need all hands on deck if we 're going to hold this seat. I'll be frank - losing this seat could mean losing the House. Thank you so much for giving me some peace of mind and stepping up,

Speaker Kevin McCarthy

name: Larry Hogan
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
| | | Dear fellow American, As I step into the next phase of life after my eight years as Governor, I can't help but look back at all the success we had together over the last few years in Maryland and across the country with _An America United_.
---
| | _**In fact, one year ago we celebrated some major wins together.**_ _** **_**➡️ First** , we defeated the worst gerrymandered Congressional map in the country. This was a major win for Maryland and for fair elections. We brought it to the national spotlight to help change the course of history so that other states can follow our lead. **➡️ Second** , we passed the most _**HISTORIC**_ tax cut ever in Maryland. We led the way for other states and D.C. politicians to help Americans during a time of uncertainty and skyrocketing inflation. **➡️ Third,** we announced the Maryland Cancer Moonshot, investing over $216 million to accelerate all of Maryland's efforts to detect, prevent, treat, and find a cure for cancer so we can save more lives. As a survivor of cancer, I pledged to fight for those who are fighting this terrible disease. **_Our goal was and will always be to encourage leaders across the country to put the people they serve first, and to follow Maryland's lead – because what we did worked!_**
---
| | Together, we must continue to spread the “people over politics” message. I believe in our institutions and know that when we cut out the toxic partisan divisiveness, we _**WILL**_ get things done. [**Please join An America United and me to build a better path forward and invest $10 or whatever you can to help keep this national message alive!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=1fd3aa491e5242468acc7b067c74eb2e&_e=CnQklHNk5uQJpk1C2UgLSlKjChnEMfgkgvDGWb0C4rweYA_46ZMhghtCPUeyg3xTOFgF_SJ3l0x8-EmmEdY8mN36phcolEa7EdZ2krWB2QB1NMGS8J2MpVHjn-mefp0HGf24GhDs8-c18MR_56stFcXqqumUWzWeBo1BZ6fAAA4oqd_CTPjC4eSvxti1uvmQolrkCems7IQiaNb-igse6L9ajFLdpv3NXVNkLDxIQuIDQtmTVuqoE3opsbW1aOn8vrE3ajSSKDBoZXrbpOe2WA%3D%3D) Thank you,**Larry Hogan** _Former Governor of Maryland_

| | **First of all, thank you for being a part of this movement, Peter.** It was close there at the end, but we hit our grassroots fundraising goal for Q1. Building a people-powered campaign like this is never easy, but because of you we're on pace to keep this seat in the hands of working Oregonians. Our fundraising work now will fuel the critical work of the campaign, including:
* Hiring grassroots organizers
* Putting volunteer coordinators on the ground
* Planting a yard sign in the yard of everyone who wants one
* And making sure our message reaches every corner of this district.

Last year, we built a historic movement and were**still growing, Peter, and that's entirely because of folks like you.** Thank you for your support; together we're going to hold this seat and take back the House next year. clean_body: | | | | First of all, thank you for being a part of this movement, Peter. It was close there at the end, but we hit our grassroots fundraising goal for Q1. Building a people-powered campaign like this is never easy, but because of you we're on pace to keep this seat in the hands of working Oregonians. Our fundraising work now will fuel the critical work of the campaign, including: Hiring grassroots organizers Putting volunteer coordinators on the ground Planting a yard sign in the yard of everyone who wants one And making sure our message reaches every corner of this district. Last year, we built a historic movement and werestill growing, Peter, and that's entirely because of folks like you. Thank you for your support; together we're going to hold this seat and take back the House next year. As I’m sure you’ve heard by now, Donald Trump recently became the first former president in our nation’s history to be indicted – and yesterday, he turned himself in to authorities to be arraigned on over 30 criminal charges.

subject: Trump is inciting his supporters to mayhem, like he did before January 6th at his previous campaign rallies starting in 2016, which led to death, injury, and destruction, culminating in an attempted coup. We must stop him now.
body:
Trump’s at it again
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdead20c-e4c7-4417-b482-d2c79b797832/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Trump's indicted, but won't go gently into that good night. He's a parasite, sucking strength from our democracy, while slurping up every last media appearance. _** **_Today he was in New York City for his arraignment on the 30+ indictments the DA, Alvin Bragg, filed against him._**_In response, he held a rally there and is doing the same back in Florida tonight. _**_All while attacking our institutions, to continue his project of weakening our democracy to install himself a dictator._** **[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Indivisible's Action Fund, enabling citizens to fight authoritarianism at the ballot box?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td44f8d27-620b-4b04-a424-50b5c205a984/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a0d152d-bf3e-4ba6-9d52-f5607aca8171/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Nick Freitas
subject: You deserve a choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
| | | [](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=49ff34fbc1b448b781c369ab649e5259&_e=wiKx07Ye9GsNhgV6NjFP9f7l7fRo8u9OdQTBsiun8bXW3jSkdHQYoYo86L8POmRz23O0kSr23l9BdnBpX4hwghv0uvYLjVlYtbp9sY_ZjuRkk0jWwCuxDNObWIbZqW0YRA1oHkrPd-qACGQ4P1AqkMZ35hxabdYzu-5UpszKQWhRq9yTO2I7uAsB-ijqqhww0S1d7D8eYXdlskpSLi1n1um7VGM1tcRoPL7ZwXoPsSa5xDoE5zb_ingHWxI7Uq4D2RbcaF13OJ_diYrokorTBg%3D%3D)
---
Imagine an educational system that requires parents to hand over their children to a government run institution for 6-8 hours a day for no other reason than proximity to the building.

Sounds crazy, right?

But that is what public education in the Commonwealth of Virginia has become. It robs parents of choosing better alternatives, and enabled what happened in Loudoun County and Fairfax County School Districts.

That’s why the biggest priority of my term this year has been the **fight for school choice in Virginia with H.B.1371**. I’m humbly asking you to sign the petition below to let my colleagues in the House of Delegates know they have the backing of parents and concerned citizens in the Commonwealth

---
[**YES-- I support School Choice!**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=49ff34fbc1b448b781c369ab649e5259&_e=wiKx07Ye9GsNhgV6NjFP9f7l7fRo8u9OdQTBsiun8bXW3jSkdHQYoYo86L8POmRz23O0kSr23l9BdnBpX4hwghv0uvYLjVlYtbp9sY_ZjuRcjS-KHJVpgH4hBN9pJQv3R7ArfSX0dPwLzFMGlq1rhQApXSW3l84k0Wz_7xICH1GbCFd5etgraRVw4SOYJw04hcEaxLPVzh3g-lgdJckkiQ9YQYoDCK_26KbEciC_Di9LPCDKB9JeottTziJcjNk4bMJyLak7JkUVnxuH_nPehw%3D%3D)
---

H.B.1371 will do something never done before: allow parents to completely opt out of public schools by applying for an Education Savings Account. Any student eligible to enroll in a public school can enroll for a savings account, with the account used to cover the cost of tuition at any educational institution of their choice.

I’ve always been a believer in personal freedom and responsibility. It’s a very simple concept: you know better than any bureaucrat could what your family needs at any given time.

I know giving you and your children the option of sending them to the right school will set them up for a lifetime of success. No one should get in the way of their future, least of all government administrators.

_Will you _**[sign your name](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=49ff34fbc1b448b781c369ab649e5259&_e=wiKx07Ye9GsNhgV6NjFP9f7l7fRo8u9OdQTBsiun8bXW3jSkdHQYoYo86L8POmRz23O0kSr23l9BdnBpX4hwghv0uvYLjVlYtbp9sY_ZjuTYUZTrose_XCsqsgRKeiMchwUAHglRO07r_eouL61SGDcUYjLQrxEXqzvy-uBw0tfORrWfsedkCn5_6_GJ-xlokdGDNpAYA1cxennDMHX7HPBF9J0Ct0vKEVz46VqaXyZ-YgP_aqOkIffmPTtmMH9AtZzJ_Z_LrYDsOibUN93Gdg%3D%3D)**_ to my petition asking the General Assembly to back school choice?

_
---
[**YES-- I support School Choice!**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=49ff34fbc1b448b781c369ab649e5259&_e=wiKx07Ye9GsNhgV6NjFP9f7l7fRo8u9OdQTBsiun8bXW3jSkdHQYoYo86L8POmRz23O0kSr23l9BdnBpX4hwghv0uvYLjVlYtbp9sY_ZjuRh2gOBV299nMauY-U9KHN0373SyBNEJSufLV8HlXq4sDNirqIetE8YDmMH3rDzghdSmsjcalCOCu4Gzi9YUCJ20ZrGNxNyUAZcIjD5oJQc9lmhVBd0d685_4irCynoFX_HyIWv0F2r1gQVVqGLDbbQ_BNIqNUw4-_Mt3Fc8fJg4Q%3D%3D)
---
We saw what happened in Loudoun County, patriot. Government-run institutions with clear political agendas FAILED in protecting their students. When caught in the act of covering it up, they lied and slandered parents defending their children.

What happened in Loudoun County should be a wake-up call to all parents in the Commonwealth. We shouldn’t have our most vulnerable be at the mercy of an agenda-driven school administration. We MUST free the children of the Commonwealth to chart their own destinies.

Will you step up and sign our petition? I’m counting on you.
---
[**Support School Choice in VA**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=49ff34fbc1b448b781c369ab649e5259&_e=wiKx07Ye9GsNhgV6NjFP9f7l7fRo8u9OdQTBsiun8bXW3jSkdHQYoYo86L8POmRz23O0kSr23l9BdnBpX4hwghv0uvYLjVlYtbp9sY_ZjuRy8OPMZxZvABAyXYWdCcKEYB9AzuFZqPvKJW0xOovE7DrzdHFvbE1hwvgEJAbBxI0wyb7EDikKi5vwNyH7VaNIhcFxP5KKq7I2B_XmGcrhAh_SLubk14VXWsFbABRk8Fxt5pvKvRVD88Od5gq3xd_3IOENIvIxXPVB5WghB0d9ZA%3D%3D)
---
Thanks, Nick
---
[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=49ff34fbc1b448b781c369ab649e5259&_e=wiKx07Ye9GsNhgV6NjFP9f7l7fRo8u9OdQTBsiun8bXW3jSkdHQYoYo86L8POmRzTiP8e8e6gEF5eSQxUZmBAI-96WstO9Dg7v7O51tpZDetSOZN-gxVWo3QWDl097JyHnUrpyZ_9RUQOEJVwOvCFyHh8P5WI7V4PWn2csEiQvmBcovA32tYW6YQ6IZPFVXHcNOZqnE21KXtLBJjk0rMMMU_Kyz3160FYApqsZ8GdRBbP0f9XNsE4vf3ZQc8yiMU)
---
| |
---

[Unsubscribe](http://links.nickforva.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_s=49ff34fbc1b448b781c369ab649e5259&_t=wr_neKzWh3e-G3UG5yrsHD-VhMsSi9NQguKwguv9IU5gRvAVdEDCEd3XSrJddm9cK39X8eWn6h74n1wk-K1UmOWnNA5qsiXA4FTnNrQIods%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

| I wanted to personally share the big news, Derek: **Today I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!**

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[split $10 between my campaign and Chris’s today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61333762/399822398/985018259?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGFiNjMzMC1lZWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kuXx0X7xrDAVWSuMTsUJ_3G5QVaF30ogzs015qYH15k=) But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:**
1. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.

2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.

3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back _as early as possible_ to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. **That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors within the first 24 hours of our campaign launch – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, Derek:**

[**So please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Chris’s to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61333763/399822399/985018259?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGFiNjMzMC1lZWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kuXx0X7xrDAVWSuMTsUJ_3G5QVaF30ogzs015qYH15k=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

I wanted to personally share the big news, Derek: **I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!** In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [split $10 between my campaign and the DNC and help power Democrats up and down the ballot to victory.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjtgRm0QsJgc3Jey-IR0CHeqZaKKv5ZB3u0U5_ah5HzIfklF12ckSF1sZi0VwypQ6iSHiLvVraP7QrMKM4BZiO32wrbraQSc53ObF2Y2D9Nbrnq3thrcuhARC0u2on5JEfLmk8s0osWyzeoaSgEkBj3df_d7FfahnMhaB_jw_Ewdj4mt3DAHmCgCb4K11KknlJigGOyr9l2DsQyvdALFdK7rAVA6jr-WldwCi1snrjo0bWu6LSzGjki0hfFg2uStMaE4QpiHPFNriWEXkr58w-7cokMwMAFICiaZf86xHAFzvImVFi_h8y4JZaoHQx4TrwFeecEqfY8pFcOo61OUusUhRXfWQ0U5DPfECgD_KQNHAzPyxuTX27K23H3x1KcnHSwZOTd1nji79wwYEfqLuM-x1OdYjsSH79i4YDfyLmDQ/3v3/xrASkwiGQuqlucHKMdMKEQ/h0/09rCx6_YE5TQ0Mn7t2_AN-74bARb19mmWTCaeIlJzD4) But first, let me explain why your support -- right now -- is so important:
1. Experts say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes -- making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we came up short in the race for Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a **top** target for defeat -- and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back _as early as possible_ to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. **That’s why I’m counting on you to donate to my reelection campaign, Derek:** [So please, will you split between my campaign and the DNC to support my first reelection campaign, back Democrats running across the country, and defend our Senate majority? ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjtgRm0QsJgc3Jey-IR0CHeqZaKKv5ZB3u0U5_ah5HzIfklF12ckSF1sZi0VwypQ6iSHiLvVraP7QrMKM4BZiO32wrbraQSc53ObF2Y2D9NeWZpqFtrvenbtCJj5sX9Z6iwbxJuq4vS59rrtL4b8bpXmNGuu-gJLZNe35w-aIa3yi6GdBqXekM4nWHQEk2dKCsRqYDCTXD30E3IcYQQvjxM-25hvNyFCSKubjM6iueIMfaPpEO7LvGwLwlrO76ojFs7HvZJR8D-s_K-7oCN3h_i2OvT8XdtcFAt5awYIhNMLyljHte6I4QV-_bKKzSZR0GbKvM5ueDTHkXbLT9PXjf26oPtSfRAdBASfGmvTluxs0XvpTBGi7suC_1WtZ1-UGxVpcsPPA25Y7sx27e0HwVbdbz-R5UwByZ_Gy_NEQLOQ/3v3/xrASkwiGQuqlucHKMdMKEQ/h1/RbIYAS3uxI49ljXo1NzdVQjsxuIbmkA_NRZ0nuteAwk)

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, let me explain why your support -- right now -- is so important: 1. Experts say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat. 2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes -- making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we came up short in the race for Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points. 3. The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a top target for defeat -- and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me. With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. | | **We’ll keep this short: TikTok is digital fentanyl.**

It’s clutching our kids in addiction while it steals our data and tracks our every single move.

_And their executives are doing it all with the Democrat party’s blessing._

subject: Judicial Watch Statement on Trump Indictment
body:
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton made the following statement
regarding the unprecedented indictment of President Donald Trump by
Democrats in New York...

[alt_text]

[*****]
April 05, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62826&L=29240&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXRydW1wLWluZGljdG1lbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=5e4d933e5fb2cfde503cd9a366bfc585514384cab47fdb863dcd350db05cb026]

What a sad day for America. And what a blow to the rule of law and
our republican form of government. Today, President Trump and the
American people were abused and victimized by New York Democrat
politician Alvin Bragg, who abused his office to try to jail a man he
must know to be innocent. This is an indictment about nothing based on
non-crimes and politics. It is a rigged prosecution to rig an
election. The courts must end this malicious prosecution before the
nation is irreparably damaged. In the meantime, Congress must
immediately investigate Bragg’s election interference and his
political attack on Trump’s civil rights. Judicial Watch has already
launched a series of Freedom of Information Act inquiries into this
unprecedented attack on the American way.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: why I’m in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
---
Team: I just launched my first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate here in Nevada – and I couldn’t be more grateful for the outpouring of support from people like you. **As we kick things off, I want to share a bit more about why I’m in this fight.** It really comes down to where my story began: in a working-class family, as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. At a young age, my loved ones instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I’ve carried them with me throughout my entire life. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61337098/399824299/-205715276?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA2Mjg1My1mMWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dru3BvAGBs5BwCwuF2bwYrta3USCkTbLz7-9-2gvWEU=) These values drove me to become the first in my family to graduate from college – working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace and taking out student loans to cover the cost. They drove me while I worked as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field – seeing inequality in our workforce firsthand. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61337102/399824300/-205715276?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA2Mjg1My1mMWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dru3BvAGBs5BwCwuF2bwYrta3USCkTbLz7-9-2gvWEU=) And they drove me during my first Senate race when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds to become only the second woman senator in Nevada's history. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61337105/399824301/-205715276?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA2Mjg1My1mMWQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dru3BvAGBs5BwCwuF2bwYrta3USCkTbLz7-9-2gvWEU=) To this day, my path is lit by these guiding lights. They fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans, no matter who you are or where you come from. **But right now,_The Washington Post_ is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. clean_body: Team: I just launched my first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate here in Nevada – and I couldn’t be more grateful for the outpouring of support from people like you. As we kick things off, I want to share a bit more about why I’m in this fight. It really comes down to where my story began: in a working-class family, as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. At a young age, my loved ones instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I’ve carried them with me throughout my entire life. = These values drove me to become the first in my family to graduate from college – working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace and taking out student loans to cover the cost. They drove me while I worked as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field – seeing inequality in our workforce firsthand. = And they drove me during my first Senate race when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds to become only the second woman senator in Nevada's history. = To this day, my path is lit by these guiding lights. They fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans, no matter who you are or where you come from. But right now,The Washington Post is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and FiveThirtyEight says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. That’s why the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat. I simply can’t fight back and defend my battleground seat without your critical grassroots support, friend. That’s why I have to ask:= Thank you. Your support will go such a long way – especially in these crucial early days. – Jacky Rosen | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

subject: proof that Democrats are continuing to deliver results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
**First:** Senate Democrats passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ capping out-of-pocket insulin costs for seniors on Medicare at $35 per month.
**Then:** Major drugmaker Eli Lilly followed suit and capped the cost of insulin at $35 for all Americans using their products.
**Now:** All three of the leading insulin producers in the U.S. have agreed to substantially reduce their prices for all users.
The implementation of these changes will allow millions of Americans to afford their essential medication, but there is still work to be done. It is time for drug makers across the country to follow our lead and make everyday medication affordable for all Americans.

name: Team AOC
subject: Alexandria on Trump’s indictment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is about due process.
#
_“What we need to see is an actual government that works for people no matter what party you’re a part of instead of which partisan person you’re most loyal to.” -AOC_
* * *
Alexandria was a guest on **Late Night with Seth Meyers** last night and here’s what she had to say about Trump’s indictment:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230405.RiDpbo&refcode=em20230405-4088-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58)
_This is not about guaranteeing one outcome or another. This is about due process. And the lack of formal due process for so long really created this question of “Do we really have an equal society, no matter your income, no matter how powerful you are?” And the presence of this process demonstrates that we should have one law that applies to all people no matter who you are or where you come from._
_I see this in a legislative context and sometimes you see in a legal context the idea of “We don’t want to try unless we know what the outcome is before we start.” We don’t want to hold a vote on something unless we know for sure that it’s going to pass. There’s been so much legal speculation over the last week... is this is a good idea? Is it not a good idea?_
_If there is evidence for a crime, which is what Alvin Bragg has asserted and put before a grand jury, and the jury themselves move forward with an indictment, then this is the process that must happen in our society._
_And once again there will be another jury of their peers to convict or acquit. But we should not make these decisions solely on whether you know that you’re guaranteed to be successful from the start. I think people need to see these charges where there is evidence for it and I believe that the presence of that due process is what makes our system fair. It’s a consequence in and of itself. And I think it’s important._
_Some House Republicans seem to have interpreted their role as just defending and working for Donald Trump, sometimes more than working for the kinds of people that they’ve been elected to serve. We’re seeing more energy for defending former president Trump than for passing gun safety legislation, than for helping with health care for people impacted by the oil spill in Ohio. What we need to see is an actual government that works for people no matter what party you’re a part of instead of which partisan person you’re most loyal to._
[If you agree with Alexandria, please chip in $3 right now so we can support her campaign and keep Alexandria in Congress to hold Trump and his right-wing allies accountable.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230405.RiDpbo&refcode=em20230405-4088-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230405.RiDpbo&refcode=em20230405-4088-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58)**
Thank you so much and we’ll keep you updated as the incident unfolds.
Team AOC
P.S. To watch AOC’s full interview on Late Night with Seth Meyers, [**click here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17960?t=4&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58).

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230405?refcode=em20230405-4088-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=5&refcode2=4088_2526796_hjUs58&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230405-4088-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=6&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=4088%2E2526796%2EhjUs58)
---|---|---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Can I count on you to be a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
I wanted to personally share the big news, Derek: **Today I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!**
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[split $5 between my campaign and John Fetterman today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230405-1?refcode=em20230405-1-8322&refcode2=8322_434096_xsqSJh&akid=8322%2E434096%2ExsqSJh) But first, let me explain why your support — right now — is so important:**
1. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes — making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat — and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back _as early as possible_ to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. **That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors within the first 24 hours of our campaign launch — and I’m counting on you to be one of them, Derek:**
**[So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and John Fetterman to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230405-1?refcode=em20230405-1-8322&refcode2=8322_434096_xsqSJh&akid=8322%2E434096%2ExsqSJh)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230405-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230405-8322&refcode2=8322_434096_xsqSJh&akid=8322%2E434096%2ExsqSJh)**
Thank you so much, Derek. Your support today is absolutely crucial. I’m grateful.
— Jacky Rosen
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230405-1?refcode=em20230405-1-8322&refcode2=8322_434096_xsqSJh&akid=8322%2E434096%2ExsqSJh)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230405-8322-footer&t=1&refcode2=8322_434096_xsqSJh&akid=8322%2E434096%2ExsqSJh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:

They are not protected. Children are now political pawns as the Democrats want Americans victimized no matter the cost. **[Will you help us protect both our children and our Second Amendment Rights?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524991:64knwFGN7:m:1:3331421248:A817E80389983CED3964D3AB6B7F60E6:r "Will you help us protect both our children and our Second Amendment
Rights?")** Congress needs to spend more time protecting the children in the United States than the children in the Ukraine. It's time we make our children more valuable than the politicians who walk around with armed security details. Why not just support our police and punish the criminals? **[Donate $25, $50, or $100 TODAY and help us stand up to the gun grabbers in Washington.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62524991:64knwFGN7:m:1:3331421248:A817E80389983CED3964D3AB6B7F60E6:r "Donate $25, $50, or $100 TODAY and help us stand up to the gun
grabbers in Washington.")** Biden has been slow walking his gun control laws into our lives as he ignores the rising crime rate and demands Congress defunds our police. He was even silent when Antifa was burning up the city of Atlanta earlier this year and attempting to kill cops in that city. And let's not forget the blind eye he's turned to the Soros-funded prosecutors who fail to uphold the laws and punish these violent offenders. Biden would just prefer to use his ban to trample on our Constitutional Rights and circumvent the powers of Congress with his Executive Orders by making laws without authority. | **Executive Order 13962** \--Preventing and Combating Gun Violence **Executive Order 13964** \-- Review of the Department of Justice's Use of Firearms Trafficking Statutes **Executive Order 13966** \--Community Violence Intervention **Executive Order 14022** \--Reducing Gun Violence

Biden is looking for ways to make it easier to accuse you of a mental health disorder so government agents can seize your guns while he turns over 10 million Americans into criminals overnight for failing to register guns utilizing pistol braces.
He is not looking to hire police officers to remove criminals from our communities.

As Mayor, my top priority is to make sure every Philadelphian is safe and feels safe. My community safety agenda will not only ensure a swift and effective response to violence when it occurs; it will invest in solutions to stop violence from happening in the first place. **That’s the message at the heart of our first TV ad, and I want you to see it before it hits airwaves tomorrow. [Please click here to watch our brand new commercial, and consider chipping in to keep it on air »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61345812/399829584/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_FR_AC90_20230405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ2OTlmZC1mN2QzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XaQv6_Jm5fbJOTxgsSspjBsePLDETC3npdkhOIAaDLE=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61345814/399829585/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_FR_AC90_20230405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ2OTlmZC1mN2QzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XaQv6_Jm5fbJOTxgsSspjBsePLDETC3npdkhOIAaDLE=) | [DONATE TODAY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61345816/399829586/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_FR_AC90_20230405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ2OTlmZC1mN2QzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XaQv6_Jm5fbJOTxgsSspjBsePLDETC3npdkhOIAaDLE=)

Other candidates in this race have spent millions of dollars on ads to tell voters how they’ll _manage violent crime_. We are the only campaign willing to talk about investing in our youth and in solutions that _end the public safety crisis_.
For 30 years, I’ve been fighting to make our communities safer by keeping people in their homes, creating good jobs with family-sustaining wages, investing in education, and creating school safety zones.
As Mayor, I’ll align all city departments, agencies, and community partners around an all-hands-on-deck approach that treats the gun violence crisis like the emergency that it is. We will fix our 911 system, expand mental health support, overhaul victim's services, stabilize our young people, and reclaim our neighborhoods for neighbors.
**We can build a safer and more vibrant Philadelphia, but first, we need to win this race on May 16th. With ten other candidates and millions of dollars spent on ads, it’ll take a huge grassroots fundraising push.**
**So what do you say: Will you chip in any amount to help keep my first ad on TV? Our vision for community safety is proven and popular, and if enough voters know about it, we will win.**

subject: Thankful for you

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61346795/399830131/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230405_ST_TY_0_WL_Jimmy_NA_NA_EOQTY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWUzNTNiZS1mOGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMYXOPB1v590uqNrIHWDu3V99fVE1TT6OSEIkRxxSW0=&emci=79013fb8-f8d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0ee353be-f8d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

I thank you for your continued support.

Last fundraising quarter, I met my goals due to your generosity.

Peter, as I’ve demonstrated in my service to the constituents of California’s 19th Congressional District and in my legislative efforts in Congress, it is my responsibility to cut through the politics and deliver service and policies that improve people’s lives.

Despite all that has transpired over the last six years, my obligations as a U.S. Representative have remained the same — to serve my constituents and make our country stronger.

As I continue to fight for affordable housing, farmers and farmworkers, our environment, accessible and affordable health care, public safety, immigration reform, and so much more for California’s 19th Congressional District, I’m humbled and appreciative to have your enduring support.

As I go toe-to-toe against our most pressing challenges, I thank you, again, for standing with me shoulder-to-shoulder in my service to our communities and country.

Together,

Jimmy Panetta
---

name: Sara (personal)
subject: Thank you so much 🥰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230405_em_sjj_tysm [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230405_em_sjj_tysm]
Wow , folks!
Thanks to this community, we surpassed our goal of securing 400 grassroots supporters by the end of March! This accomplishment means so much to me personally - knowing there are so many of you out there who are willing to dig deep and pitch in when I need you. Thank you.
Trust me when I say that fundraising in a 24-hour news cycle can be tough - especially when there are infinite asks being made of people at any given moment. And let’s be honest, in a political environment that’s often awash in lies, scandals, and, these days, indictments - values like transparency, honesty, and trust just aren’t always sexy.
But those values are incredibly important to me, and I know they are to you, too. That’s what I love about this group - we have each other’s backs. Your commitment not just to my campaign but also to our shared values and progressive beliefs is so encouraging to me.
Thanks to folks like you, I know we really do have the power to take back the House next year and push for progress in our politics.
Talk soon.
-Sara

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Friends,

As we witness this historic moment, I shared my reflections on former President Donald Trump’s arraignment with MSNBC. You can read my full op-ed here. [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/trumps-indictment-war-alvin-bragg-only-going-get-worse-rcna78249]

Our justice system was built to — and will — withstand this test as Trump’s case is brought forth in New York state court.

Prior to being indicted, Trump tried his best to take a wrecking ball to our rule of law. He warned of “death and destruction” from his supporters following Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg’s indictment, posted (since deleted) images of himself implying a threat of violence against Bragg, and relentlessly attacked the judge assigned to his case.

Knowing Trump, it will get worse. His platform has always been to exploit Americans’ distrust of government and the good people who work for it. Following his arraignment, he railed to his supporters, "If they can do this to me, they can do this to anyone.” I would argue the opposite is actually true: If criminal charges can be brought against anyone, they should be applicable to someone as powerful as the former president.

That’s why this indictment and the process that will play out are an opportunity to restore America’s faith in government and the ideals our country was founded upon.

So let us not celebrate this indictment or make it a cause for distraction. Let us instead celebrate the rule of law for its equal application to all Americans.

READ MORE » [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/trumps-indictment-war-alvin-bragg-only-going-get-worse-rcna78249]

Thank you,

— Eric Swalwell
ericswalwell.com [ericswalwell.com]
Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? Press here to sign up in just two clicks >> [http://go.txting.io/shfylh] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy.
Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. | | | Hey team -- It’s Christie, Executive Director of the DSCC.

I wanted to reach out to you personally to explain why this moment is so vitally important to defending the Senate in 2024, but first:

[**Can you make a $5 donation to the DSCC before tonight's deadline? Every dollar you give will make a _huge_ difference in protecting and expanding our razor-thin Senate majority.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230405-Christie-PersonalLongForm-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230405-Christie-PersonalLongForm-ETG-sl1&akid=10289%2E9716520%2Een_YLQ)

There’s a lot at stake in the 2024 Senate elections. Right now, Republicans are hellbent on gutting voting rights, reproductive rights, Medicare, and Social Security -- but they can't do it without a majority in the Senate. We need to stop them from taking back power, but Democrats are facing a _historically_ difficult Senate map. **And the GOP is already preparing to dump millions into ads attacking our senators.**

That’s what makes this moment so _crucial_. Winning campaigns are determined in the early months of the election cycle. That’s when we can build up resources, construct an airtight strategy, and prepare to defend our incredible senators in battleground states. **That all comes down to what this grassroots team is able to do _right now._**

Anybody in politics will tell you, time is the one resource in an election that you can never get back. And with our critical deadline just hours away, your donation today could be what makes the difference between protecting our Democratic majority or watching McConnell take back power in 2024. **So please, before the midnight deadline:**

**[Chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help defend and expand our razor-thin Senate majority -- it truly could make all the difference. >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230405-Christie-PersonalLongForm-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230405-Christie-PersonalLongForm-ETG-sl1&akid=10289%2E9716520%2Een_YLQ)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Today, I’m launching my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347848/399831036/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDBlZjI1N2EtZjlkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UrJWrW2F5l1g3a2bUsdO8I8YL_niYDPaTU08y21JzXQ=)
---
I wanted to personally share the big news, Peter: **Today I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!** In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**split $25 between my campaign and HER Time today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61347851/399831037/-742210237?amount=25&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDBlZjI1N2EtZjlkMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UrJWrW2F5l1g3a2bUsdO8I8YL_niYDPaTU08y21JzXQ=) **But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:**
1. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins.**** The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024.**** Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back _as early as possible_ to win. Fellow American,

The New York Manhattan District Attorney has started a disturbing precedent for American politics by indicting the President of the United States who is running for office.

DA Alvin Bragg is effectively prosecuting a federal crime under the guise of state law. That has profound consequences. **It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals._Full stop._**

The Manhattan DA explicitly _**campaigned**_ on investigating former President Trump. This is a textbook case of politicizing prosecutorial power.

The argument that Trump shouldn't be "above the law" is a **straw man** : the only reason the DA is even considering this case is _because_ it's Donald Trump.

It's going to take leaders to step up and demand action against this abuse of power.

DA Bragg’s prosecution sets a dangerous precedent that will lead to many more politically targeted prosecutions.

President Biden can unify the country by issuing a pardon now. If he fails to do so and I am elected president, I will pardon Trump on Jan. 20, 2025.

**[Fellow American, will you join me in denouncing politically motivated indictments?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=494199e7351c4083839ab5c2d1ae1d72&_e=xq4S2Ry6YtsJ_U5zo2aXpmaZGFdkqF08-6afXYze45DakoVOmCh-g-7nHcEyiv9QMkRCoXvIelK4Hm4gwmoPAwL_DS3jTwrMlqly1Ji5M7N3mkFqYTlVUEF4hJ6oGR0xxmbH0XHjSo8sstJBBvEwypJjJ3yMsgio_z6mriSUPUW-fjtWpKHDdhFuJh4bj3T82ZdjYkYBQtA4nO5Ofcbp_GoNEBazcaHQ_xtyb5zLqt0g3zw9W_SNPDhCWWVex-xY0SLU5oojh7pf9kGwCjCA30gWjk-dXO4gkCpj0v8G_aJkVX2QORbCufUTo2XG1BtjhaQSOcR6HZBHx8ESK3CTFu39TpsGvahazIynn38pF9H_Q7Rn_ACTjzY4T_j_gjTM_2CyL0f0GD8tSgWL6IdzqXeoydv3WsBgsBJJWk-SXlIHMSSQRw0L5QQzr9yYH9OxE53P0qK7kUmNFpF-AgGeVumco8N5HNiBPY5mdXp1twem3DBM4Apq0OL2BY67V4AHuuvannZJEoTX4OHx6kAhwg9krnACj7jW8d0ePILq7YMGuxFqG-BUi1vBLBoWV9Eg)**

The reason I'm doing this is because the rest of the Republican field has been far too weak on this important issue in the country today.

This is about principle, not a person. This is about our country, not one man.

**So I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't: put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic.**

This indictment marks a dark moment in American history and will undermine public trust in our electoral system itself.

It's time to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, **[and I hope you'll join me today.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=494199e7351c4083839ab5c2d1ae1d72&_e=xq4S2Ry6YtsJ_U5zo2aXpmaZGFdkqF08-6afXYze45DakoVOmCh-g-7nHcEyiv9QMkRCoXvIelK4Hm4gwmoPAwL_DS3jTwrMlqly1Ji5M7N3mkFqYTlVUEF4hJ6oGR0xxmbH0XHjSo8sstJBBvEwypJjJ3yMsgio_z6mriSUPUW-fjtWpKHDdhFuJh4bj3T82ZdjYkYBQtA4nO5Ofcbp_GoNEBazcaHQ_xtyb5zLqt0g3zw9W_SNPDhCWWVex-xY0SLU5oojh7pf9kGwCjCA30gWjk-dXO4gkCpj0v8G_aJkVX2QORbCufUTo2XG1BtjhaQSOcR6HZBHx8ESK3CTFu39TpsGvahazIynn38pF9H_Q7Rn_ACTjzY4T_j_gjTM_2CyL0f0GD8tSgWL6IdzqXeoydv3WsBgsBJJWk-SXlIka821X43hbJvOzDHXOmRfZD47SJhqcqXpEVS1GIWwaMb5qjXDeTSvenWZhY5eOQXR1zRZ97sqjvUcYf1irX32m9oKBMISxGvqDTvBw-lR4iOFtPhxxvv2o2SE-dm-gDFvITN6lRszbExyHh_cK4bP)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This is about principle, not a person. This is about our country, not one man. | | Fellow American, The New York Manhattan District Attorney has started a disturbing precedent for American politics by indicting the President of the United States who is running for office. DA Alvin Bragg is effectively prosecuting a federal crime under the guise of state law. That has profound consequences. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals.Full stop. The Manhattan DA explicitly campaigned on investigating former President Trump. This is a textbook case of politicizing prosecutorial power. The argument that Trump shouldn't be "above the law" is a straw man : the only reason the DA is even considering this case is because it's Donald Trump. It's going to take leaders to step up and demand action against this abuse of power. DA Bragg’s prosecution sets a dangerous precedent that will lead to many more politically targeted prosecutions. President Biden can unify the country by issuing a pardon now. If he fails to do so and I am elected president, I will pardon Trump on Jan. 20, 2025. | The reason I'm doing this is because the rest of the Republican field has been far too weak on this important issue in the country today. This is about principle, not a person. This is about our country, not one man. So I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't: put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic. This indictment marks a dark moment in American history and will undermine public trust in our electoral system itself. It's time to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, Thanks for standing on the side of principle over politics, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. I am calling people like you to be the voice against the political persecution through prosecution of the 45th president. GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.
