body:
I wanted to personally share the big news, friend

I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: **Today I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!** In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**split $25 between my campaign and Brittany Pettersen’s today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61350216/399832267/1174905948?refcode=email_040523_rosen-launch-pettersen-split&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzkwMWQzZC1mYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhCbAF0p2sj8XOJaouQrqmDh_4JxfIyVOigKhq865zw=) **But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:**
1. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

**With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors within the first 24 hours of our campaign launch – and I’m counting on you to be one of them,****friend:** **[So please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Brittany Pettersen's to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61350217/399832268/9962277?refcode=email_040523_rosen-launch-pettersen-split&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzkwMWQzZC1mYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhCbAF0p2sj8XOJaouQrqmDh_4JxfIyVOigKhq865zw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61350218/399832269/1174905948?refcode=email_040523_rosen-launch-pettersen-split&express_lane=true&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzkwMWQzZC1mYmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhCbAF0p2sj8XOJaouQrqmDh_4JxfIyVOigKhq865zw=)

body:

## **Happy Wednesday! Colorado members: Do you care about protecting your Tabor refunds?[Sign AFP's petition today.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-t/) **Trump Enters a Plea** According to the unsealed documents at Trump's arraignment, **[he has been charged with 34 counts of falsifying business records.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-i/) **In an interesting twist, moments before he appeared in court**,[Stormy Daniels was ordered to pay Trump!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-d/)** **CO District Deceiving Parents** Colorado school district has **[created a tool kit for teachers to methodically deceive parents](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-h/)** on in-school social transitions leaving parents in the dark. **IRS Budget** The**[Internal Revenue Service will release its long-awaited spending plan for $80 billion in new funding this week](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-k/)**, according to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen. _What will they be spending the money on?_ **Legal Election Fraud** This group is **[steering large sums of a Swiss billionaires money to liberal causes](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-u/)** and it's not against the law. **OPEC Cuts Oil Output** Saudia Arabia announced they are cutting oil output by well over one million barrels a day starting in May **[but the resident of the White House isn't worried](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-o/).** **Biden Postpones Announcement** Biden's advisers and close allies**[don't expect him to announce a run for re-election any time soon](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-x/) **as the date continues to be pushed back. **Anti-Christian Violence Rising** **[What we're seeing is a product of a society that has lost it's way](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-m/).** Citizens are being labeled as domestic terrorists for having conservative and faith-centered values. _What can we do to turn this around?_

**Speaking of Hush Money** Trump's indictment has drawn comparisons recently to the**[failed hush-money case against former Democratic senator](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-c/) **and presidential candidate John Edwards. _Do you remember this case?_ **Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* Nancy is **[losing it](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-a/)**.
* Waiting for the next company to **[do something stupid](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-f/)**.
* He's so **[confused](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-z/).**
* Here's**[your sign](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-v/).**

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurldtk-trhiujldw-e/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. body:
It's clear now how high the stakes are in 2024.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61353282/399834008/823540626?refcode=ea.5a5fd196-fdd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5a5fd196-fdd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTVmZDE5Ni1mZGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNTvSRHjdDl4NyQu3H_w44xvFTvfeG3_Fha1htEW2tI=&emci=e703b87b-f5d3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5a5fd196-fdd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Hello Peter, You may have heard the news that State Representative Tricia Cotham, who is from a safe Democratic district, intends to switch her party affiliation and give Republicans supermajorities in both chambers of the General Assembly. This is a shocking announcement that will have a real effect on Roy’s ability to hold his vetoes of dangerous legislation. It’s clear now how high the stakes are in 2024. North Carolina is a true swing state, but to prevent a radical shift toward the right, Democrats must win everywhere. **We must not only hold the Governor’s office but also break the supermajorities in Raleigh — and we have to prepare NOW.** **[We’re urgently asking you to donate to support our fight for North Carolina. The future of our state is on the line>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61353283/399834009/676408098?refcode=ea.5a5fd196-fdd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5a5fd196-fdd3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTVmZDE5Ni1mZGQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNTvSRHjdDl4NyQu3H_w44xvFTvfeG3_Fha1htEW2tI=)** Peter, we will not lose faith in our ability to protect against the worst impulses of the radical right wing. The representative who is switching parties has been a strong advocate for many Democratic priorities — including abortion rights, voter protections, public schools, and LGBTQ+ rights. Roy will continue to work to convince her and other legislators to uphold our fundamental rights and freedoms. **But we can’t ignore the fact that our political landscape has changed. clean_body: It's clear now how high the stakes are in 2024. | Hello Peter, You may have heard the news that State Representative Tricia Cotham, who is from a safe Democratic district, intends to switch her party affiliation and give Republicans supermajorities in both chambers of the General Assembly. This is a shocking announcement that will have a real effect on Roy’s ability to hold his vetoes of dangerous legislation. It’s clear now how high the stakes are in 2024. North Carolina is a true swing state, but to prevent a radical shift toward the right, Democrats must win everywhere. We must not only hold the Governor’s office but also break the supermajorities in Raleigh — and we have to prepare NOW. = Peter, we will not lose faith in our ability to protect against the worst impulses of the radical right wing. The representative who is switching parties has been a strong advocate for many Democratic priorities — including abortion rights, voter protections, public schools, and LGBTQ+ rights. Roy will continue to work to convince her and other legislators to uphold our fundamental rights and freedoms. But we can’t ignore the fact that our political landscape has changed. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Yesterday, Wisconsin stood up for democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friend,
We did it!
Last night, an overwhelming majority of Wisconsin voters elected liberal Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the State Supreme Court. Once again, Wisconsinites have indicated that they will not let MAGA right-wing candidates take away their fundamental democratic freedoms, whether that be abortion access or voting rights. **_Yesterday, Wisconsin stood up for democracy._**
This is huge. The Supreme Court of Wisconsin will now have a liberal majority for the first time in 14 years.
And make no mistake, we were a part of that change. Thousands of you stood together in support of Judge Janet, and with your support, we raised nearly $30,000 for her to take on Dan Kelly’s attacks.
I am proud of the great strides we have made as a team thus far, and I hope you are too. But our work doesn't end here, there is much more to be done. With a competitive 2024 ahead of us, we must continue to fight for changemaking progressive candidates across the country.
I hope you will continue to stand by my side in The Long Run.
Together,
Mandela Barnes
[**Mandela Barnes launched The Long Run to support changemaking candidates win critical races across the country. But he needs your support to continue fighting for progressive change in our country. Can you please make a $3 donation to The Long Run to support our movement?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.76jeGr&refcode=em230405-1-t1&t=1&akid=4335%2E196590%2Ec8pmnC)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.76jeGr&refcode=em230405-1-t1&t=2&akid=4335%2E196590%2Ec8pmnC)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4335%2E196590%2Ec8pmnC). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=4335%2E196590%2Ec8pmnC)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=4335_196590_c8pmnC&akid=4335%2E196590%2Ec8pmnC)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4335%2E196590%2Ec8pmnC)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Trump Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: As Trump’s MAGA crowd cheered himon…
body:
As his MAGA crowd cheered him on, Trump tore into the legal team behind his indictment and the judge overseeing his case | | |
---
| | **At Trump’s post-arraignment rally in Mar-a-Lago last night, he spent nearly _30 minutes_ spewing his signature election fraud lies, hate, and anti-democratic rhetoric. ** As his MAGA crowd cheered him on, Trump tore into the legal team behind his indictment _and_ the judge overseeing his case – **calling him a “Trump-hating judge, with a Trump-hating wife” and claiming that the U.S. is now a “failing nation.”** Trump’s right-wing supporters are proudly standing behind him – they’re ready to fight tooth-and-nail against _any_ attempt to bring him to justice and are _flooding_ him and his MAGA allies with donations. But Democrats aren’t backing down from this fight – **grassroots Democrats across the country are _pouring in_ gifts to counteract Trump’s MAGA donors and show that Democrats are determined to hold Trump’s allies in the states accountable. As his MAGA crowd cheered him on, Trump tore into the legal team behind his indictment and the judge overseeing his case – calling him a “Trump-hating judge, with a Trump-hating wife” and claiming that the U.S. is now a “failing nation.” Trump’s right-wing supporters are proudly standing behind him – they’re ready to fight tooth-and-nail against any attempt to bring him to justice and are flooding him and his MAGA allies with donations. subject: The race has begun

body:
Republicans are jumping in to challenge our district. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61355270/399835161/-818894537?refcode=EM_FR_230405FR_N_MK_90DA_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDhjYmIwNS1mZmQzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0ergpRlN-48_UDCvuZzqqLxxw-9CL3djTOqkrLcMMU=)

The race for OH-09 has begun – Marcy Kaptur’s first opponents have entered the race to try and flip this seat.

No matter who ends up being Marcy’s opponent next fall, we know that they’ll be backed by millions of dollars from Kevin McCarthy and far-right PACs. That’s why we’re urging you to become an early donor and double down on your support for Marcy Kaptur.

name: NDRC Battleground Update
subject: BREAKING: A resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
It couldn’t have happened with people like you, team
|
---

**This is huge, team: Judge Janet Protasiewicz just won Wisconsin’s state supreme court race!**

[**_This victory wouldn’t have been possible without supporters like you. Will you pitch in to help the NDRC continue fighting to strengthen our democracy?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61356034/399835731/394769393?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230405_FR_4O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ODlmMzRjLWZmZDMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0ufBnJHU1FfG4NkCBzqm6BzoL0u4JysnF5MH50MpC8g=) The _New York Times_ called this race “the year’s biggest election” – and for good reason.

For years, Republicans used tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold onto unearned power in Wisconsin. Experts went so far as to label the state a “democracy desert,” because the GOP had made it _nearly impossible_ for Democrats to win a majority in the state legislature, even when they earned more votes statewide.

**But last night, Wisconsin voters elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz _by double digits_ , making it clear that they’ve had enough of these anti-democratic power grabs.** | **“Despite the fact that, for more than a decade, Wisconsin Republicans have put in place multiple structural barriers to fair representation, including a gerrymandered legislature, voter suppression laws, and a conservative court majority that was wildly out of step with the public, the people did not give up – instead they stayed engaged.

And that is an important lesson for how democracy can ultimately win in this ever enduring fight.”

– Attorney General Eric Holder**
---
Still, the Wisconsin GOP is not going down easy. Before the election results were even officially certified, Republicans already began floating the idea of _impeaching_ Judge Protasiewicz!
**Team, thanks to supporters like you, our movement won a huge victory last night. But Republicans who seek to undermine our democracy aren’t giving up, so we must continue in our efforts to defend it.

Will you donate today to help the NDRC keep on fighting for fairness all across the country?**

clean_body: It couldn’t have happened with people like you, team | This is huge, team: Judge Janet Protasiewicz just won Wisconsin’s state supreme court race! = The New York Times called this race “the year’s biggest election” – and for good reason. For years, Republicans used tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold onto unearned power in Wisconsin. Experts went so far as to label the state a “democracy desert,” because the GOP had made it nearly impossible for Democrats to win a majority in the state legislature, even when they earned more votes statewide. But last night, Wisconsin voters elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz by double digits , making it clear that they’ve had enough of these anti-democratic power grabs. | “Despite the fact that, for more than a decade, Wisconsin Republicans have put in place multiple structural barriers to fair representation, including a gerrymandered legislature, voter suppression laws, and a conservative court majority that was wildly out of step with the public, the people did not give up – instead they stayed engaged. And that is an important lesson for how democracy can ultimately win in this ever enduring fight.” – Attorney General Eric Holder Still, the Wisconsin GOP is not going down easy. Before the election results were even officially certified, Republicans already began floating the idea of impeaching Judge Protasiewicz! Team, thanks to supporters like you, our movement won a huge victory last night. But Republicans who seek to undermine our democracy aren’t giving up, so we must continue in our efforts to defend it. Will you donate today to help the NDRC keep on fighting for fairness all across the country? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: where my story began
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Peter: I just launched my first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate here in Nevada – and I couldn’t be more grateful for the outpouring of support from people like you. **As we kick things off, I want to share a bit more about why I’m in this fight.**

It really comes down to where my story began: in a working-class family, as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. At a young age, my loved ones instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I’ve carried them with me throughout my entire life. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61356960/399836156/-443571634?amount=15&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjFkYTc0NS0wMGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UTl4OePrBr6DY5eNqPMuf48dSmu7cpw3nUubYGEcJM=) These values drove me to become the first in my family to graduate from college – working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace and taking out student loans to cover the cost.

They drove me while I worked as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field – seeing inequality in our workforce firsthand. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61356962/399836158/-443571634?amount=15&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjFkYTc0NS0wMGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UTl4OePrBr6DY5eNqPMuf48dSmu7cpw3nUubYGEcJM=) And they drove me during my first Senate race when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds to become only the second woman senator in Nevada's history. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61356964/399836160/-443571634?amount=15&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjFkYTc0NS0wMGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UTl4OePrBr6DY5eNqPMuf48dSmu7cpw3nUubYGEcJM=) To this day, my path is lit by these guiding lights. They fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans, no matter who you are or where you come from.

**But right now,_The Washington Post_ is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. That’s why the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat.** I simply can’t fight back and defend my battleground seat without your critical grassroots support, Peter. **That’s why I have to ask:** **[Please, will you split $15 between my campaign and Yadira Caraveo’s now – before our crucial midnight deadline – to become one of the essential Reelection Founding Donors we need to win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61356972/399836162/-1334195895?amount=15&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.05_b1_jr_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjFkYTc0NS0wMGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UTl4OePrBr6DY5eNqPMuf48dSmu7cpw3nUubYGEcJM=)** Thank you. Your support will go such a long way – especially in these crucial early days.

– Jacky Rosen |
---

name: Team DPVA
subject: How we protect abortion in VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---
Derek, Last night’s victory in Wisconsin is a signal to the rest of the nation that abortion rights are a massive mobilizing issue that will drive pro-choice voters to the polls, even in off-year elections. Yesterday morning’s news that North Carolina Democratic State Rep. Did you hear the news?

Launched 100 years after the Equal Rights Amendment was first brought to Congress, the mission of the caucus is to _finally_ codify the ERA and constitutional gender equality. For far too long, women and LGBTQ Americans have faced inequity — in the economy, under the law, in the eyes of fellow Americans, and so much more. It’s high time for us to follow through on our promise of liberty, justice, and _equality_ for all. By affirming the ERA as the 28th Amendment in our Constitution, we’ll be sending a clear message: **We demand gender equality.** For the sake of you, your friends, our communities, future generations, and the millions of women and LGTBQ Americans who are impacted by gender-based bias and discrimination. **Becca and her colleagues are going to do everything in their power to finally codify the Equal Rights Amendment.** As she helps lead this fight, we’re so proud of the work she’s doing to achieve full equality for women in Vermont and across the country. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: your support made all the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Hi there, I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for the incredible outpouring of support you showed Districts for Democracy as we launched this new initiative. Your generosity allowed us to _**surpass**_ our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal, meaning our team is starting their work with the resources they need to have an immediate impact, while continuing to grow. Thanks to your grassroots support, we can stand up for the ideals we’ve taught our kids to cherish – the freedom to speak, to ask hard questions, and to learn. In the months ahead, we will hold elected officials and school board members accountable, and support candidates committed to democratic values and to keeping partisan culture wars out of our kids’ lives. Folks, I’m beyond grateful for your commitment to supporting us. **[From Florida to New Jersey, the book banning MAGA extremists got a head start, but we’re in the fight now and finished our first quarter strong. Will you chip in $10 or more today to keep building our momentum as the new quarter begins?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61360106/399837749/-1360078148?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230405_FR_ThankYou_0_WL_NA_NA_NA_NA&refcode2=a3a2aace-02d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2EyYWFjZS0wMmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YEJi9hUMQS7If3iPd1qySgtqSZOJ-gmOlgP3o8H5ilU=)** Talk soon, Tom Malinowski
---
* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

clean_body: | | Hi there, I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for the incredible outpouring of support you showed Districts for Democracy as we launched this new initiative. Your generosity allowed us to surpass our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal, meaning our team is starting their work with the resources they need to have an immediate impact, while continuing to grow. Thanks to your grassroots support, we can stand up for the ideals we’ve taught our kids to cherish – the freedom to speak, to ask hard questions, and to learn. In the months ahead, we will hold elected officials and school board members accountable, and support candidates committed to democratic values and to keeping partisan culture wars out of our kids’ lives. Folks, I’m beyond grateful for your commitment to supporting us. = Talk soon, Tom Malinowski * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Can I count on you to be a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win.

| I wanted to personally share the big news, Peter: **Today I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!**

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to[****_**split $5 between my campaign and Fight for Progress today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61365039/399840182/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230405-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNDQxYWFhLTA1ZDQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmoT_FVE9HbYuDtviIs0vxYUv04dS8hSuptCaaUH2dI=) **But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:**
1. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. **That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors within the first 24 hours of our campaign launch – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, Peter:**

[_**So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and Fight for Progress to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61365040/399840183/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230405-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNDQxYWFhLTA1ZDQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmoT_FVE9HbYuDtviIs0vxYUv04dS8hSuptCaaUH2dI=)

clean_body: With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. | I wanted to personally share the big news, Peter: Today I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada! In a moment, I’m going to ask you to= But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important: 1. Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat. 2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points. 3. The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me. With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors within the first 24 hours of our campaign launch – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, Peter: = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, Peter. Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America – but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying – and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.

clean_body: I have never been more determined than I am right now. I have never been more determined than I am right now. | | | Friend, I never thought this could happen in America – but it has. The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges – even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you – I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying – and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom. Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Team Jayapal
subject: SIGN ON: Ban ALL congressional stock trading!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Right now, members of Congress can still buy, trade, and sell stocks — literally profiting off of confidential, insider knowledge. Help Pramila put an end to it.
#
Peter,
Earlier this year, we asked you to join our movement in demanding a ban on all congressional stock trading.
Over 3,980 of you signed our petition and agreed with Pramilia that politicians should be serving their constituents, not their own wallets.
**Now, Pramila has introduced bipartisan legislation to finally put an end to individual stock trading by members of Congress and their spouses.**
The pressure is working, Peter — but we have to make sure we’re not slowing down.
[**That’s why today we’re asking you to add your name in support of The Bipartisan Ban on Congressional Stock Ownership Act — add your name now »**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/bipartisan-ban-congressional-stock-ownership-act/?source=em20230405-2340&refcode=em20230405-2340&t=1&akid=2340%2E420207%2E1XZuuO)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/bipartisan-ban-congressional-stock-ownership-act/?source=em20230405-2340&refcode=em20230405-2340&t=2&akid=2340%2E420207%2E1XZuuO)**
Right now, members of Congress can still buy, trade, and sell stocks — literally profiting off of confidential, insider knowledge.
Members of Congress shouldn’t be able to use their positions to enrich themselves instead of delivering for their constituents. It’s corruption, and it’s unacceptable.
**The Bipartisan Ban on Congressional Stock Ownership Act goes beyond other proposals, like the TRUST Act, to ban stock trading in many ways:**
* Bans Members of Congress and their spouses from owning and trading individual stocks, bonds, commodities, futures, and other securities including an interest in a hedge fund, a derivative, an option or other complex investment vehicle.
* Establishes a civil penalty of up to $50,000 for each violation to be enforced by the Department of Justice and the U.S. Office of Special Counsel.
* Voters are looking to progressive leaders like Pramila to give them a reason to trust in our government and democracy again. That’s why we need to enact strict rules on stock trading and ensure that members of Congress aren’t profiting at the expense of the American people.

[**Peter, please show your support for The Bipartisan Ban on Congressional Stock Ownership Act by adding your name now.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/bipartisan-ban-congressional-stock-ownership-act/?source=em20230405-2340&refcode=em20230405-2340&t=3&akid=2340%2E420207%2E1XZuuO)
Thank you,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230405-2340-footer&t=4&refcode2=2340_420207_1XZuuO&akid=2340%2E420207%2E1XZuuO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Lynese, Senior Advisor for Team Cori
subject: The Congressional Caucus for the Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori is helping lead the fight to finally pass the Equal Rights Amendment.
#
I have some exciting news to share:
**Cori, alongside Rep. Ayanna Pressley, launched a new Congressional Caucus for the Equal Rights Amendment 100 years after the amendment was first introduced in Congress.**
Black women have been on the forefront of the fight for equal rights in our country, so it is fitting that this renewed push to establish constitutional gender equality is being led by Cori, Ayanna, and other members of the Congressional Black Caucus.
[**Please consider showing your support for their work to include gender equality in the Constitution by chipping in $5 today.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230405.Na0rze&amount=5&refcode=em20230405-2463&t=1&akid=2463%2E1082990%2E--EoVu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230405.Na0rze&amount=5&refcode=em20230405-2463&t=20&akid=2463%2E1082990%2E--EoVu)**
This caucus will aim to:
* Affirm the Equal Rights Amendment as the 28th amendment to the Constitution;
* Raise awareness within Congress to establish constitutional gender equality as a national priority;
* Partner with an inclusive multi-generational, multi-racial coalition of advocates, activists, scholars, organizers, and public figures; and
* Center the people who stand to benefit the most from gender equality, including Black and brown women, LGBTQ+ people, people seeking abortion care, and other marginalized groups.

When the U.S. Constitution was first drafted, women, Black and brown folks, and all marginalized groups were intentionally written out. This exclusion has persisted for almost the entire life of our nation.
**Equality is long overdue, Peter. That’s why Cori is helping lead the fight to finally publish the Equal Rights Amendment.**
**[Please consider showing your support by contributing today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230405.Na0rze&amount=5&refcode=em20230405-2463&t=21&akid=2463%2E1082990%2E--EoVu)**
—Lynese, Senior Advisor

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230405?refcode=em20230405-2463-footer&t=22&refcode2=2463_1082990_--EoVu&akid=2463%2E1082990%2E--EoVu) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

subject: They’ve shown their hand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
It was NEVER about justice...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHM2Bg4cNjUzaGRqvTU1V4iM54ks8KGgindf18RZff6vafR-zQuTANfPzpRHwTAnf0iAIR6EQAnfXj9aU6_Tzbf7ORyayq97Sl8EwDpY6Kv6vNKQcHxsNPaZr4DbAAxo640jayVgabJ7p3W2Bp0CGhMSyWQk31dtt6QVg26PuMOJCipZQWqLKEqmp5M5XswCnVT-0pouXEs_Bjd4N_TvIapwDFkQ3dPaVoek44CjgvhOlOxcZzJ742dub-Uu0Azo8vfR44pv67Rz44XjrccxxA4JSIBx4hDpRy0utVOl_pa961QxzWFSyDPaxDKPn3NDpdxnZGEssgX92TowuT4FoWyn06fyRgTxSSUbYxUAswlDuyFsj_in19v58O_w9sDPj6i7AlezvdXef6ezZ2fNh4GXkwttLztC3a3_wEAAP__pRuNIQ)
---
Friend,
Yesterday, the radical Left Democrats crossed a line that has never been crossed in the history of our once great Republic.
**As it stands, Soros, his hand-picked District Attorney, and the Deep State have turned our country into a Third World nation that CRIMINALIZES dissent and ARRESTS its political opposition for committing _NO CRIME_.**
But let’s be honest, the consequences for our country of their never-ending witch hunts never once crossed their minds...
Their one and only goal – _as they’ve openly admitted_ – is to**“****get Trump.”**
_Because I’m the one thing that stands between them and**YOU**._

body:

Friend, have you had the chance to meet my friend, Jim Banks, yet?

Jim Banks is running for Senate and could really use your help to make sure we don’t lose another seat to the Democrats. After 2022 when we lost seats, we can’t take a chance on the 2024 map. We have to start now, and we have to take every single race seriously.

I think you’d like Jim a lot. You have a lot in common with him:

**✅ You’re both willing to say what’s on your mind
✅ You’re both strong conservatives
✅ You both think we need to get our national debt in check
✅ You both care about leaving our country a better place for our future generations

** On top of this, Jim Banks:

**✅ Fought for our country in Afghanistan
✅ Grew up for a time in a trailer park
✅ Lived the American Dream**
| [ **TAKE BACK THE SENATE: SUPPORT JIM BANKS** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=4887fb0343824f4eb2347612e099401f&_e=G19XEn5r5DtfyBch8bz3n3b7kBprLlcT2ENJ-LnIjkfopjvlrC8FIO9vRzDMiOUN68taNsw5IUHXJs36Xz33W4vruz9MHVgap8pv06mcZrpXo0QmGZ-R4H4_yUsVV_SK8OklZzW9XPCoYAML8R2zJshhsqd1xGjk7_hvqHgVsZwGycvn_uZbGEdIHHy03kDQJk1HIHc675oanbz-V8WelkNeubMYHV4XqSX-dOpc9Dyj_j6rqYC8Zq37oA7-KRClNH46H4-1EuWRoVcLLgwKOJ7m4-3IrVwqSeAC6ZBm138bnmXE0xv8O7ebh_tIxJF9FBIxu8Z5YSfA-k4kYytIuoOzKblcJ4UyroaNy8OjufHERvExeEg5gydxXfOXfs89asfjH1S1ywrO-yTY_63fRrEa101uTO83x2n7Xx1G0C8WlLaNleW2DqXnoPiPPIXmyRrGX4CEG2ntppz4_EvsDwOK_JQ_uUOiNhGZu5sokdeI7tPAZP1h2YQ5AOC0p4XaSC7Zfp9hLezklQUYj3TiePlhn3z2Bmb3VrrVmh6GLcfHVabYTh2fPDwRdm_WUwJFXLNjnzUbHLK_rQVrtwpzqg%3D%3D)
---

Jim has my full support, and I hope he’ll have your full support, too. I can’t say enough nice things about him. He’s exactly what we need in the Senate to get Washington back fighting for you!
[ **DONATE TO JIM BANKS** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=4887fb0343824f4eb2347612e099401f&_e=G19XEn5r5DtfyBch8bz3n3b7kBprLlcT2ENJ-LnIjkfopjvlrC8FIO9vRzDMiOUN68taNsw5IUHXJs36Xz33W4vruz9MHVgap8pv06mcZrpXo0QmGZ-R4H4_yUsVV_SK8OklZzW9XPCoYAML8R2zJshhsqd1xGjk7_hvqHgVsZwGycvn_uZbGEdIHHy03kDQJk1HIHc675oanbz-V8WelkNeubMYHV4XqSX-dOpc9Dyj_j6rqYC8Zq37oA7-KRClNH46H4-1EuWRoVcLLgwKOJ7m4-3IrVwqSeAC6ZBm138bnmXE0xv8O7ebh_tIxJF9FBIxu8Z5YSfA-k4kYytIuoOzKblcJ4UyroaNy8OjufHERvExeEg5gydxXfOXfs89asfjH1S1ywrO-yTY_63fRrEa101uTO83x2n7Xx1G0C8WlLaNleW2DqXnoPiPPIXmJ4nZbWAUYqzyaDHqPmzt32xnj6AE6-ivD91uyJoOZ1HRPfnOQSTVCZEDFsVAlq05hXDn0V8E2KX36uOa0BCnwzFEOXWcv4bRzd1-pWuNkcsWjK2vfI2OxOMwCsxQ7-Y6_8FGWmCLRiCB9UeoyzJyIg%3D%3D)
---

2024 is going to be a telling year after we lost seats during 2022 – which was supposed to be a red wave! **If we can’t pull together to save each and every seat and flip enough seats to take the Majority, the Republican Party will be in crisis mode, and I mean it.**

[**You, friend, have the power to help us make sure that doesn’t happen by donating whatever – and we really mean WHATEVER – you can afford today to help Jim Banks >>**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=4887fb0343824f4eb2347612e099401f&_e=G19XEn5r5DtfyBch8bz3n3b7kBprLlcT2ENJ-LnIjkfopjvlrC8FIO9vRzDMiOUN68taNsw5IUHXJs36Xz33W4vruz9MHVgap8pv06mcZrpXo0QmGZ-R4H4_yUsVV_SK8OklZzW9XPCoYAML8R2zJshhsqd1xGjk7_hvqHgVsZwGycvn_uZbGEdIHHy03kDQJk1HIHc675oanbz-V8WelkNeubMYHV4XqSX-dOpc9Dyj_j6rqYC8Zq37oA7-KRClNH46H4-1EuWRoVcLLgwKOJ7m4-3IrVwqSeAC6ZBm138bnmXE0xv8O7ebh_tIxJF9FBIxu8Z5YSfA-k4kYytIuoOzKblcJ4UyroaNy8OjufHERvExeEg5gydxXfOXfs89asfjH1S1ywrO-yTY_63fRrEa101uTO83x2n7Xx1G0C8WlLaNleW2DqXnoPiPPIXm_rrzNcEZ8PJ5hcvOmHb8hkKqrSZcACeGB7qVNtqDNi_bcESzifob_48R5IRbtID6TGiYQdkLpTGCg8jyrKDryjfAUPxQbaaNBIKN2BXrO0Mkjp7SLxJqgjFBJK6czLgeJNcsPj1sznTJLArnyO7Ucg%3D%3D)

Marco Rubio

clean_body: | Friend, have you had the chance to meet my friend, Jim Banks, yet? Jim Banks is running for Senate and could really use your help to make sure we don’t lose another seat to the Democrats. After 2022 when we lost seats, we can’t take a chance on the 2024 map. We have to start now, and we have to take every single race seriously. I think you’d like Jim a lot. You have a lot in common with him: ✅ You’re both willing to say what’s on your mind ✅ You’re both strong conservatives ✅ You both think we need to get our national debt in check ✅ You both care about leaving our country a better place for our future generations On top of this, Jim Banks: ✅ Fought for our country in Afghanistan ✅ Grew up for a time in a trailer park ✅ Lived the American Dream | Jim has my full support, and I hope he’ll have your full support, too. I can’t say enough nice things about him. He’s exactly what we need in the Senate to get Washington back fighting for you! 2024 is going to be a telling year after we lost seats during 2022 – which was supposed to be a red wave! If we can’t pull together to save each and every seat and flip enough seats to take the Majority, the Republican Party will be in crisis mode, and I mean it. Thank you for answering the call to save our country and our party, Marco Rubio Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

1. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes — making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat — and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back _as early as possible_ to win. name: Team Wiley
subject: re: our kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Team,
We’re bumping Wiley’s message from yesterday because the topic is so important. Please, take a moment to read it, and if you can, support Wiley’s campaign with a donation of any size today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230405-email]
Thank you,
Team Wiley
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230405-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230405-email]Team,
I want to make sure you saw my tweet from last week:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230405-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230405-email]
I’ll be honest. In just the first three months of 2023, we’ve had countless mass shootings in schools. The last thing that elected officials should be concerned about is banning books.
Our children deserve more. They deserve access to all the tools needed to prepare them for a successful future, and they deserve adults who are brave enough to stand up and fight.
So many folks in Congress lose sight of what matters. Their judgment is clouded by the partisan divide.
I will never lose sight of what matters. As a father of two beautiful children, I know the feeling of sending my kids off to school and feeling worried about what may happen when they are out of my sight. I know how important educational opportunities are, and how many American students do not have the same opportunities as others.
While many elected officials say one thing and do another, I will always remain focused on the priorities that matter most. If you can, please consider chipping in a few dollars to support my campaign to keep me fighting this important fight for our future in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230405-email]
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!

| | This is DISGUSTING, Peter.

**The GOP is threatening to EXPEL three lawmakers from the Tennessee House of Representatives, including two Black men, for daring to advocate for gun safety in the wake of yet another mass shooting._WE REFUSE TO LET THEM GET AWAY WITH THIS._** [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oXtxrpByOksal4o4-OGwKQVtXxEBvshBx2z3yRMu0Z1b-JO6H0WFJf44Epoq7AsUWa3qc2PeschQytVM6ImH247rpRf8gXL4M3OcrhfZBIl0tNsBOly2JRblA5ZhigpmLqtIAJaCivTCuZeb3HzTPVQfH_y5PMSdWwJLkL1LYQXNFk5AMKxTKiEjwVQ-9Mcf8Fat-6nAQqFc7lme-uXJfYNehIccDrd_PWkMMz54UZoQufxLTx4h6xclPi49oXwpDSTKGWwuK0s5JXJs3JeSphG7gxqEAt-pWUxN2ThA-tEqeJvJJxJpIIkHtWKIuQ1kKBn-nq6oG3OjkqSvawF8fk5M02NCzdKLp3mQcPLMVyqOZ0J4vp8AjmrTCGcVE1pDLKeEMysgqIgX6fPWlqmXxpGdGr8RLNLRIPBoU4pe4vRY/3v3/NC-CX4RVRe6y1qVu6zEmVA/h1/RP5l5hmKlj_DfdeOchPRmxgCllF7SrwS6dBikTo-HQI)

After a mass shooting that took six lives, the GOP is more interested in punishing progressive Democrats than in protecting kids from more shootings.
_THIS_ is why elections matter.
Republicans are doing everything they can up and down the ballot to erode our fundamental rights, _even going so far as trying to kick our elected officials out of office._

But it gets worse: **The GOP and its MAGA extremists are raising money hand over fist as they gear up for more attacks like these,** and we have to do everything we can to stop them.

[That starts with you, Peter. | Hi there,

I’m writing today to share exciting news about our campaign: thanks to supporters like you recognizing the importance of the FEC filing deadline, **we surpassed our first quarter fundraising goals and were able to take full advantage of the $10,000 contribution match.**

The first quarter of a non-election year is known for being a slow time for fundraising, but our team has always been one to exceed expectations. Thanks to your investments in our movement, we will be able to make early investments in campaign resources that will set us up for success in 2024 and beyond. What’s more, because we had such a strong first FEC report, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time advocating for West Michiganders.

Experts on both sides of the aisle are already saying this district will be a battleground in the fight for the House majority, so it means the world to me to know you have my back.

Gratefully,
Hillary
---
| | _Hillary Scholten is a mom, attorney, and fourth-generation West Michigander representing MI-03 in the House of Representatives.
